description_en: After becoming aware of an actively exploited vulnerability, the manufacturer must submit an early warning notification without undue delay and within 24 hours via the single reporting platform to the designated CSIRT and ENISA.

description_en: (3) The Government of the Republic may further delegate the performance of the tasks referred to in Article 39(1), Article 40(4) and Article 41(1) and (2) of Commission Delegated Regulation (EU) 2024/1366 to the regional co-ordination centre established pursuant to Article 35 of Regulation (EU) 2019/943 of the European Parliament and of the Council on the internal market for electricity (OJ L 158, 14.06.2019, pp 54–124), taking into account the requirements provided in the Administrative Co-operation Act. Principles of ensuring cybersecurity The following principles are taken into account in ensuring cybersecurity: 1) the principle of personality – ensuring the security of a system is arranged by the service provider; [RT I, 30.12.2025, 4 – entry into force 01.01.2026] 2) the principle of integral protection – the service provider ascertains potential risks posed to the system and applies appropriate organisational and technical measures for the protection of the system;

description_en: 77 2018 Computer Misuse and Cybercrimes (7) A service provider who fails to comply with an order under this section commits an offence and is liable, on conviction — (a) where the service provider is a corporation, to a fine not exceeding ten million shillings; (b) in case of an officer of the service provider, to a fine not exceeding five million shillings or to imprisonment for a term not exceeding three years, or to both. (1) A person who obstructs the lawful exercise of the powers under this Part, including destruction of data, or fails to comply with the requirements of this Part is liable, on conviction, to a fine not exceeding five million shillings or to imprisonment for a term not exceeding three years, or to both.

(1) A person who obstructs the lawful exercise of the powers under this Part, including destruction of data, or fails to comply with the requirements of this Part is liable, on conviction, to a fine not exceeding five million shillings or to imprisonment for a term not exceeding three years, or to both.

description_en: ENISA shall be a centre of expertise on cybersecurity by virtue of its independence, the scientific and technical quality of the advice and assistance it delivers, the information it provides, the transparency of its operating procedures, the methods of operation, and its diligence in carrying out its tasks. ENISA shall assist the Union institutions, bodies, offices and agencies, as well as Member States, in developing and implementing Union policies related to cybersecurity, including sectoral policies on cybersecurity. ENISA shall support capacity-building and preparedness across the Union by assisting the Union institutions, bodies, offices and agencies, as well as Member States and public and private stakeholders, to increase the protection of their network and information systems, to develop and improve cyber resilience and response capacities, and to develop skills and competencies in the field of cybersecurity.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：ENISA shall be a centre of expertise on cybersecurity by virtue of its independence, the scientific and technical quality of the advice and assistance it delivers, the information it provides, the transparency of its operating procedures, the methods of operation, and its diligence in carrying out its tasks. ENISA shall assist the Union institutions, bodies, offices and agencies, as well as Member States, in developing and implementing Union policies related to cybersecurity, including sectoral policies on cybersecurity. ENISA shall support capacity-building and preparedness across the Union by assisting the Union institutions, bodies, offices and agencies, as well as Member States and public and private stakeholders, to increase the protection of their network and information systems, to develop and improve cyber resilience and response capacities, and to develop skills and competencies in the field of cybersecurity.

description_en: La seguridad del sistema debe contemplar las acciones relativas a los aspectos de prevención, detección y respuesta, al objeto de minimizar sus vulnerabilidades y lograr que las amenazas sobre el mismo no se materialicen o que, en el caso de hacerlo, no afecten gravemente a la información que maneja o a los servicios que presta. Las medidas de prevención, que podrán incorporar componentes orientados a la disuasión o a la reducción de la superficie de exposición, deben eliminar o reducir la posibilidad de que las amenazas lleguen a materializarse.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：La seguridad del sistema debe contemplar las acciones relativas a los aspectos de prevención, detección y respuesta, al objeto de minimizar sus vulnerabilidades y lograr que las amenazas sobre el mismo no se materialicen o que, en el caso de hacerlo, no afecten gravemente a la información que maneja o a los servicios que presta. Las medidas de prevención, que podrán incorporar componentes orientados a la disuasión o a la reducción de la superficie de exposición, deben eliminar o reducir la posibilidad de que las amenazas lleguen a materializarse.

description_en: The device must provide configurable security features allowing administrators to enable or disable specific services, ports, and protocols based on risk assessment results, ensuring security measures are proportional to the risks.

notes_en: Based on Article 7(1) requirement for appropriate and proportionate technical and organizational measures.
notes_zh: 基于Article 7(1)中关于采取适当且成比例的技术和组织措施的要求。

description_en: ENISA shall contribute to increasing cybersecurity capabilities at Union level in order to support the actions of Member States in preventing and responding to cyber threats, in particular in the event of cross-border incidents. ENISA shall promote the use of European cybersecurity certification with a view to avoiding the fragmentation of the internal market. ENISA shall contribute to the establishment and maintenance of a European cybersecurity certification framework in accordance with Title III of this Regulation with a view to increasing the transparency of the cybersecurity of ICT products, ICT services, ICT processes and managed security services, thereby strengthening trust in the digital internal market and its competitiveness.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：ENISA shall contribute to increasing cybersecurity capabilities at Union level in order to support the actions of Member States in preventing and responding to cyber threats, in particular in the event of cross-border incidents. ENISA shall promote the use of European cybersecurity certification with a view to avoiding the fragmentation of the internal market. ENISA shall contribute to the establishment and maintenance of a European cybersecurity certification framework in accordance with Title III of this Regulation with a view to increasing the transparency of the cybersecurity of ICT products, ICT services, ICT processes and managed security services, thereby strengthening trust in the digital internal market and its competitiveness.

description_en: The device must support or be accompanied by a risk assessment mechanism, allowing entities to conduct risk assessments in accordance with the procedure established in the description of organisational and technical cyber security requirements, and implement technical and organizational measures proportionate to identified risks based on latest technology developments.
description_zh: 设备必须支持或配套提供风险评估机制，允许实体按照组织和技术网络安全要求描述中规定的程序进行风险评估，并基于最新技术发展实施与已识别风险相称的技术和组织措施。
notes_en: This clause primarily targets operating entities, but products must provide corresponding technical support capabilities (such as logging, status monitoring) to assist in risk assessment. Small and micro enterprises are exempt.
notes_zh: 此条款主要针对运营实体的责任，但产品需提供相应的技术支撑能力（如日志、状态监控）以辅助风险评估。小型和微型企业豁免。

description_en: Article 38 (1) Essential and important entities shall notify the recipients of their services on significant incidents that are likely to affect the provision of those services. (2) In the event of a significant cyber threat, essential and important entities shall notify the recipients of their services potentially affected by such a threat on any protective measures or judicial remedies they can use for the purpose of preventing or c ompensating the caused damage and, where appropriate, notify the recipients of the services of the significant cyber threat itself. (3) Essential and important entities shall start the submission of notifications referred to in paragraphs 1 and 2 of this Article within 30 days from the date of the submission of the notification referred to in Article 19, paragraph 1 of this Act.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：Article 38 (1) Essential and important entities shall notify the recipients of their services on significant incidents that are likely to affect the provision of those services. (2) In the event of a significant cyber threat, essential and important entities shall notify the recipients of their services potentially affected by such a threat on any protective measures or judicial remedies they can use for the purpose of preventing or c ompensating the caused damage and, where appropriate, notify the recipients of the services of the significant cyber threat itself. (3) Essential and important entities shall start the submission of notifications referred to in paragraphs 1 and 2 of this Article within 30 days from the date of the submission of the notification referred to in Article 19, paragraph 1 of this Act.

description_en: Must define and execute clear vulnerability handling procedures, including timelines and mechanisms for vulnerability reception, verification, remediation, and public disclosure. Must ensure that vulnerabilities affecting the security of communication networks or information systems are handled and disclosed according to regulations.
description_zh: 必须制定并执行明确的漏洞处理流程，包括漏洞接收、验证、修复及公开披露的时间表和机制。必须确保在发现影响通信网络或信息系统安全的漏洞时，能够按规定进行处理和披露。
notes_en: This requirement covers security in procurement, development, and maintenance, specifically emphasizing necessary procedures for vulnerability handling and disclosure.
notes_zh: 该要求涵盖采购、开发和维护过程中的安全性，特别强调了漏洞处理和披露的必要程序。

verification_method_en: Review vulnerability management policy documents to verify inclusion of disclosure processes; check vulnerability disclosure records from the past 12 months for compliance with established procedures.
verification_method_zh: 审查漏洞管理政策文档，验证是否包含披露流程；检查过去12个月内的漏洞披露记录是否符合既定流程。

description_en: Independent operators shall not be subject to the provisions of this Law relating t Information Security and, if necessary, with other organisations. Independent operators shall not be subject to the provisions of this Law relating to reporting incidents that significantly threaten information security, the provisions on submitting statistical data on incidents and the provisions on proactive scanning of the network of operators of ICT systems of special importance. Independent ICT system operators shall designate special persons or organisational units responsible for internal control of their own ICT systems.

Independent ICT system operators shall designate special persons or organisational units responsible for internal control of their own ICT systems.

description_en: The device must provide configurable logging capabilities to support real-time monitoring and recording of security-related network events and anomalous traffic, enabling organizations to establish cyber threat monitoring mechanisms in accordance with standards determined by regulatory bodies. Log formats must be compatible with mainstream SIEM systems.
description_zh: 设备必须提供可配置的日志记录功能，支持实时监控和记录与安全相关的网络事件及异常流量，以便组织能够按照监管机构确定的标准建立网络威胁监控机制。日志格式需兼容主流SIEM系统。
notes_en: This requirement primarily targets enterprise-grade devices used by Critical Information Infrastructure (CII) organizations. Home routers are generally not within this mandatory scope but are recommended to have basic logging functions.
notes_zh: 此要求主要针对关键信息基础设施(CII)组织使用的企业级设备。家用路由器通常不在此强制范围内，但建议具备基本日志功能。

title_en: Establish Cyber Threat Monitoring Mechanism
title_zh: 建立网络威胁监控机制
verification_method_en: Inspect the device management interface for log configuration options and verify that the device can generate security event logs in standard formats that can be received by external log servers.
verification_method_zh: 检查设备管理界面是否提供日志配置选项，并验证设备能否生成符合标准格式的安全事件日志，且能被外部日志服务器接收。

description_en: All applicable products sold in the EU market must obtain CE cybersecurity certification that meets the requirements of EU 2019/881 regulation. The certification validity period shall not exceed 3 years, and compliance testing shall be re-conducted and certification renewed before expiration.
description_zh: 所有进入欧盟市场销售的适用产品必须获得符合EU 2019/881法规要求的CE网络安全认证，认证有效期不超过3年，到期前需重新进行合规测试并更新认证。
notes_en: Products launched before 2024 can be given a 12-month transition period to complete certification.
notes_zh: 2024年之前上市的产品可给予12个月过渡期完成认证。
regulation_name: Directive (EU) 2022/2555 of the European Parliament and of the Council on measures for a high common level of cybersecurity across the Union, amending Regulation (EU) No 910/2014 and repealing Directive (EU) 2016/1148 (NIS 2 Directive)
title_en: CE Cybersecurity Certification Required

verification_method_en: Check the product's CE cybersecurity certification certificate to confirm that the certification scope covers the corresponding product model and the certification is within the validity period.

description_en: IoT Service Providers must obtain a valid operating license from NTRA before operating within Egypt. Device firmware or management software should include license status verification mechanisms or identifiers.
description_zh: 物联网服务提供商在埃及境内运营前，必须从NTRA获得有效的运营许可证。设备固件或管理软件中应包含许可证状态验证机制或标识。
notes_en: This requirement primarily targets service providers, but manufacturers must ensure products delivered to Egyptian customers meet the network access requirements of licensed operators.
notes_zh: 此要求主要针对服务提供商，但作为网络设备制造商，需确保交付给埃及客户的产品符合持证运营商的网络接入要求。
regulation_name: Egypt NTRA Internet of Things Regulatory Framework
title_en: NTRA Operating License Requirement
title_zh: NTRA运营许可要求
verification_method_en: Verify product documentation and compliance statements for a valid NTRA license; check if device system information includes compliance identifiers.
verification_method_zh: 检查产品文档及合规声明，确认已获取NTRA颁发的有效许可证；检查设备系统信息中是否包含合规标识。

description_en: All third-party components included in the product (including COTS, open-source libraries, middleware) must be under active maintenance. The use of Beta versions, abandoned components, or obscure open-source components without community security tracking is prohibited. For paid components, valid security support services must be purchased.
description_zh: 产品中包含的所有第三方组件（包括COTS、开源库、中间件）必须处于活跃维护状态。禁止使用Beta版组件、已停止维护的组件或无社区安全跟踪的冷门开源组件。若为付费组件，必须购买有效的安全支持服务。
notes_en: This is to ensure continuous security update capability and avoid using 'zombie' code.
notes_zh: 这是为了确保持续的安全更新能力，避免使用‘僵尸’代码。
regulation_clause: Page 20, Section 'Produit incluant ou basé sur un composant tiers...'
regulation_name: ANSSI CSPN First Level Security Certification
title_en: Third-Party Components Must Have Maintenance Support
title_zh: 第三方组件需有维护支持
verification_method_en: Review the Software Bill of Materials (SBOM) to verify the version status, last update date, and validity of vendor support contracts for each third-party component.
verification_method_zh: 审查软件物料清单（SBOM），核实每个第三方组件的版本状态、最后更新日期及供应商支持合同有效性。

title_en:
Section 
1— Short title. > section 4; - Security Governance and Product Requirements requirement
title_zh:
Section 
1— Short title. > section 4; - 安全治理与产品要求要求
verification_method_en: Verify governance documents, product design evidence, test reports, and clause-level conformity statements.
verification_method_zh: 核验制度文件、产品设计证据、测试报告和与原文条款对应的符合性说明。

description_en: Manufacturers must identify and assess potential security risks of all constituent components (including hardware modules, firmware, software libraries, and cloud service dependencies) during design phase and prioritize addressing these risks throughout the product lifecycle.
description_zh: 制造商必须在产品设计阶段识别并评估所有组成部件（包括硬件模块、固件、软件库及云服务依赖）的潜在安全风险，并在整个产品生命周期中优先处理这些风险。
notes_en: Despite comments arguing this exceeds manufacturer control, the regulation insists on security prioritization for all relevant components constituting the product.
notes_zh: 尽管有评论认为这超出了制造商控制范围，但法规坚持要求对构成产品的所有相关组件进行安全 prioritization。
regulation_name: Cyber Trust Mark Program Final Rule
title_en: Security Priority Across All Components
title_zh: 全组件安全优先级
verification_method_en: Inspect product security architecture documents and supply chain risk management records to verify evidence of security assessments for all critical components.
verification_method_zh: 检查产品安全架构文档和供应链风险管理记录，验证是否涵盖了所有关键组件的安全评估证据。

description_en: Article 12 International cooperation ENISA shall contribute to the Union’s efforts to cooperate with third countries and international organisations as well as within relevant international cooperation frameworks to promote international cooperation on issues related to cybersecurity, by: (a) where appropriate, engaging as an observer in the organisation of international exercises, and analysing and reporting to the Management Board on the outcome of such exercises; (d) providing advice and support to the Commission on matters concerning agreements for the mutual recognition of cybersecurity certificates with third countries, in collaboration with the ECCG established under Article 62.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：Article 12 International cooperation ENISA shall contribute to the Union’s efforts to cooperate with third countries and international organisations as well as within relevant international cooperation frameworks to promote international cooperation on issues related to cybersecurity, by: (a) where appropriate, engaging as an observer in the organisation of international exercises, and analysing and reporting to the Management Board on the outcome of such exercises; (d) providing advice and support to the Commission on matters concerning agreements for the mutual recognition of cybersecurity certificates with third countries, in collaboration with the ECCG established under Article 62.

description_en: These documents have been developed and agreed upon within the cybersecurity ecosystem and are strategically linked with other current policy instruments to ensure the country achieves the objectives set forth in the 2023-2026 National Development and Public Investment Plan (PNDIP); To harness the current benefits that technology provides and to manage the challenges brought about by the country’s digitalization and digital transformation with a holistic vision and multisectoral attention, the Government of Costa Rica reaffirms its commitment to maintaining a secure cyberspace by updating its National Cybersecurity Strategy.

description_en: A comprehensive risk analysis must be performed at least annually. The results must serve as the basis for selecting technical and organizational security measures. The risk analysis documentation must include a specific action plan and be updated annually.
description_zh: 必须每年至少进行一次全面的风险分析，分析结果需作为选择安全技术措施和组织措施的基础。风险分析文档必须包含具体的应对措施计划，并每年更新。
notes_en: Risk analysis should cover potential impacts of supply chain, software dependencies, and known vulnerabilities on the product.
notes_zh: 风险分析应覆盖供应链、软件依赖及已知漏洞对产品的潜在影响。
regulation_name: Sweden Information Security for Essential and Digital Services Act (2018:1174)
title_en: Perform Annual Risk Analysis
title_zh: 执行年度风险分析与更新
verification_method_en: Inspect the risk analysis report from the last year to confirm it includes the latest threat models, impact assessments, and corresponding remediation action plans with approval signatures.
verification_method_zh: 检查最近一年的风险分析报告，确认其包含最新的威胁模型、影响评估以及对应的整改措施计划，并有审批签字。

description_en: The device shall provide data metrics capable of assessing the impact of an incident on the number of affected users, duration, and geographic scope to determine if the incident has significant consequences.
description_zh: 设备应提供能够评估事件对用户数量、持续时间和地理范围影响的数据指标，以便确定事件是否具有重大后果。
notes_en: Used to meet the three core dimensions for determining incident severity as per regulations: number of users, duration, and geographic area.
notes_zh: 用于满足法规中关于判断事件严重程度的三个核心维度：用户数、时长、地理区域。
regulation_name: Netherlands Network and Information Systems Security Act (Wbni)
title_en: Incident Impact Assessment Data
title_zh: 事件影响评估数据支持
verification_method_en: Verify that the device management interface or API can export reports on affected session counts, service interruption duration, and source/destination IP geographic distribution.
verification_method_zh: 验证设备管理界面或API是否能导出受影响的会话数、服务中断持续时间及源/目的IP地理位置分布报告。

description_en: The device must support regular and targeted security audits, generate audit reports for review by qualified independent bodies, and allow results to be submitted to the competent authority.
description_zh: 设备必须支持定期和有针对性的安全审计，并能够生成审计报告供合格独立机构审查，且结果可提交给主管当局。
notes_en: Home routers may be exempt from regular independent audits, but enterprise products must comply.
notes_zh: 家用路由器可能豁免定期独立审计，但企业级产品必须满足。

title_en: Support Independent Security Audits
title_zh: 支持独立安全审计
verification_method_en: Check if the device has the capability to export complete security configuration and status reports to support third-party audits.
verification_method_zh: 检查设备是否具备导出完整安全配置和状态报告的功能，以支持第三方审计。

description_en: Manufacturers or operators must establish a regular technical assessment mechanism to identify security vulnerabilities in systems, applications, and network devices. Assessments must be conducted at least annually or before major version updates.
description_zh: 设备制造商或运营商必须建立定期技术评估机制，针对系统、应用程序和网络设备进行安全漏洞扫描和识别。评估频率至少每年一次，或在重大版本更新前执行。
notes_en: The regulation text is truncated here, but explicitly requires regular technical assessments for systems, applications, and network devices to identify potential vulnerabilities.
notes_zh: 法规原文在此处截断，但明确要求对系统、应用和网络设备进行定期技术评估以识别潜在漏洞。

title_zh: 定期技术漏洞评估
verification_method_en: Review vulnerability management program documentation to confirm inclusion of regular scanning schedules; inspect the most recent vulnerability scan reports and remediation records.
verification_method_zh: 审查漏洞管理程序文档，确认包含定期扫描计划；检查最近一次的漏洞扫描报告及修复记录。

description_en: The device or system must have asset inventory management capabilities to automatically identify and record components, functions, and data assets critical to security.
description_zh: 设备或系统必须具备资产清单管理功能，能够自动识别并记录对安全性至关重要的组件、功能及数据资产。
notes_en: Applicable to all network devices and software systems involving complex configurations.
notes_zh: 适用于所有涉及复杂配置的网络设备和软件系统。

description_en: Article 54 (1) Any natural and legal person may anonymously report a vulnerability. (2) Vulnerability reports shall be submitted to the CSIRT vulnerability disclosure coordinator. (3) The CSIRT vulnerability disclosure coordinator shall act as a trusted intermediary, facilitating, where necessary, the interaction between the natural or legal person reporting a vulnerability and the manufacturer or provider of the potentially vulnera ble ICT products or ICT services, upon the request of either party.

description_en: (5) Regardless of subsections 2–4 of this section, this Act applies to a digital service provider if the place of business of its representative is in Estonia or if its representative is established in Estonia. (9) In fulfilling the obligation provided in subsection 1 of this section, a digital service provider may follow the relevant European Commission guidelines and templates.

description_en: The device must support sending security logs to a centralized monitoring system and be compatible with or possess capabilities for log correlation analysis and anomaly detection to support timely detection of cyber security incidents.
description_zh: 设备必须支持将安全日志发送至集中式监控系统，并具备或兼容能够进行日志关联分析和异常行为检测的功能，以支持网络安全事件的及时检测。
notes_en: The regulation requires licensees to implement incident management processes; for network devices, this means providing high-quality log data that can be integrated into monitoring systems.
notes_zh: 法规要求持牌人实施事件管理流程，对于网络设备而言，这意味着必须提供可被监控系统集成的高质量日志数据。
regulation_name: Bahrain CBB Insurance Rulebook Cyber Security Risk Management
title_en: Implement log correlation and anomaly detection
title_zh: 实施日志关联与异常检测
verification_method_en: Verify if the device supports exporting logs via Syslog, SNMP Trap, or other standard protocols to a SIEM or monitoring platform; verify if the monitoring platform can configure correlation rules and anomaly detection algorithms based on logs.
verification_method_zh: 检查设备是否支持Syslog、SNMP Trap或其他标准协议将日志导出至SIEM或监控平台；验证监控平台是否能配置基于日志的关联规则和异常检测算法。

description_en: The product must support configuration or documented definition of Recovery Point Objectives (RPO), specifying the point in time to which data must be restored to ensure acceptable data loss levels upon business resumption.
description_zh: 产品必须支持配置或文档化定义恢复点目标（RPO），即数据恢复到的时间点，以确保业务恢复时数据丢失量在可接受范围内。
notes_en: Devices involving data storage and state retention should focus on this requirement.
notes_zh: 涉及数据存储和状态保持的设备需重点关注此规格。

description_en: The product must support identity authentication based on passwords or passphrases, or authentication mechanisms based on standard symmetric/asymmetric cryptography. Do not rely on biometrics or unevaluated proprietary authentication systems as primary security controls.
description_zh: 产品必须支持基于密码或短语的身份认证，或基于标准对称/非对称密码学的认证机制。不得依赖生物识别或未评估的专有认证系统作为主要安全控制手段。
notes_en: CSPN explicitly excludes the evaluation of biometric mechanisms and enrollment systems.
notes_zh: CSPN明确排除生物识别机制和注册系统的评估。

verification_method_zh: 审查身份认证模块设计文档，确认仅使用标准密码学算法或口令机制；尝试配置生物识别（如有）并确认其不在安全评估范围内或被禁用。

description_en: Article 12 The operator of an ICT system of special importance shall adopt a security act for the ICT system (hereinafter referred to as the “Security Act”). The Security Act shall set out the protection measures, in particular the principles, methods and procedures for achieving and maintainingan adequate level of system security, as well as the powers and responsibilities related to the security and resources of ICT systems of special importance. The Security Act for the ICT system of special importance shall be based on the Risk Assessment Act referred to in Article 11 of this Law.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：Article 12 The operator of an ICT system of special importance shall adopt a security act for the ICT system (hereinafter referred to as the “Security Act”). The Security Act shall set out the protection measures, in particular the principles, methods and procedures for achieving and maintainingan adequate level of system security, as well as the powers and responsibilities related to the security and resources of ICT systems of special importance. The Security Act for the ICT system of special importance shall be based on the Risk Assessment Act referred to in Article 11 of this Law.

description_en: The product must allow end-users to install, configure, and manage it independently without developer assistance. Complete user guides and technical documentation must be provided with the product to support autonomous operation.
description_zh: 产品必须允许最终用户在没有开发者协助的情况下独立安装、配置和管理。必须随产品提供完整的用户指南和技术文档，以支持用户的自主操作。
notes_en: Aims to eliminate 'black box' service-like products with implicit dependencies on developers.
notes_zh: 旨在消除对开发者隐性依赖的‘黑盒’服务类产品。
regulation_clause: Page 19, Cas typiques: Produit « à la frontière du service »
regulation_name: ANSSI CSPN First Level Security Certification
title_en: Support Autonomous Installation and Management
title_zh: 支持用户自主安装与管理
verification_method_en: Verify that users can complete initial installation, basic configuration, and daily management tasks without vendor technical support; check the completeness and operability of the user manual.
verification_method_zh: 验证用户是否能在无厂商技术支持的情况下完成产品的初始安装、基本配置和日常管理任务；检查用户手册的完整性和可操作性。

description_en: (6) The external service provider shall, on a quarterly basis, notify to the owner of the critical information infrastructure, on the the agreement. (6) The external service provider shall, on a quarterly basis, notify to the owner of the critical information infrastructure, on the status of implementation of their obligations under the agreement and on any cybersecurity incident. (1) The Cybersecurity Operations Centres specified under regulation 9 (2) shall submit— (a) monthly briefs of cybersecurity compliance status to the Committee through the Director;

description_en: Article 1 (1) This Act regulates the procedures and measures for achieving a high common level of cybersecurity, the criteria for the classification of essential and important entities, cybersecurity requirements for essential and important entities, specific requirements for the management of domain name registration data and the control of their implementation, the voluntary cyber protection mechanisms, competent authorities in the area of cybersecurity and their tasks and powers, expert supervision over the implementation of cybersecurity requirements, infringement provisions, monitoring of the implementation of this Act and other matters relevant to the area of cybersecurity.

description_en: The product's conformity assessment must be designed and verified against the assurance levels (basic, substantial, or high) as specified in Article 52 (referencing Regulation 2019/881).
description_zh: 产品的一致性评估必须针对法规第52条（参照欧盟2019/881号条例）指定的信任保证等级（基本、重要或高）进行设计和验证。
notes_en: Different assurance levels correspond to different testing strictness; the target level must be determined at the early stage of product development.
notes_zh: 不同保证等级对应不同的测试严格程度，需在产品开发初期确定目标等级。
regulation_name: Poland Act on National Cybersecurity Certification System 2025
title_en: Meet assurance level requirements
title_zh: 满足信任保证等级要求
verification_method_en: Confirm the target certification level of the product and verify that test cases and assessment reports cover the security controls and testing depth required for that level.
verification_method_zh: 确认产品目标认证等级，并检查测试用例和评估报告是否覆盖该等级所需的安全控制和测试深度。

verification_method_en: Verify governance documents, product design evidence, test reports, and clause-level conformity statements.

description_en: When regulatory authorities commission accredited security assessment bodies to conduct risk assessments as per law, the device must support standardized data export formats or APIs to enable assessors to obtain technical parameters and security status information required for cybersecurity risk management assessments.
description_zh: 当监管机构依据法律委托认可的安全评估机构进行风险评估时，设备必须支持标准化的数据导出格式或API，以便评估机构获取进行网络安全风险管理评估所需的技术参数和安全状态信息。
notes_en: According to Section 18 k, regulatory authorities may require risk assessments by accredited security assessment bodies. Enterprise and critical infrastructure-related products must prioritize meeting this requirement.
notes_zh: 依据第18 k条，监管机构可要求由认可的安全评估机构进行风险评估。企业级和关键基础设施相关产品需重点满足此要求。
regulation_name: Finland Cybersecurity Act 124/2025
title_en: Support Third-Party Security Assessment
title_zh: 支持第三方安全评估
verification_method_en: Verify if the device supports security configuration export in standard formats (e.g., JSON/XML); check if API documentation supports external security tools reading device security status.
verification_method_zh: 验证设备是否支持标准格式（如JSON/XML）的安全配置导出；检查是否有API文档支持外部安全工具读取设备安全状态。

description_en: Costa Rica in International Measurements of Cybersecurity Capabilities Source: Own elaboration from (OAS & IDB, 2020) and (UIT, 2023) OAS and IDB CMM Measurements (2016 and 2020) ITU GCI Measurements (2020) Once the established period to implement the 2017-2021 National Cybersecurity Strategy was completed, a review of the same was carried out under the leadership of the MICITT and with the specialized technical support of the OAS/CICTE Cybersecurity Program and the European Union’s Cyber Resilience for Development (Cyber4Dev) project. The results of the review were captured in a report (MICITT , 2021) that presented a situational analysis for each of the set objectives, along with recommendations (see Annex 1) regarding the implementation of organizational, legal, and technical measures, as well as capacity building and cooperation to enhance the country’s capabilities.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：Costa Rica in International Measurements of Cybersecurity Capabilities Source: Own elaboration from (OAS & IDB, 2020) and (UIT, 2023) OAS and IDB CMM Measurements (2016 and 2020) ITU GCI Measurements (2020) Once the established period to implement the 2017-2021 National Cybersecurity Strategy was completed, a review of the same was carried out under the leadership of the MICITT and with the specialized technical support of the OAS/CICTE Cybersecurity Program and the European Union’s Cyber Resilience for Development (Cyber4Dev) project. The results of the review were captured in a report (MICITT , 2021) that presented a situational analysis for each of the set objectives, along with recommendations (see Annex 1) regarding the implementation of organizational, legal, and technical measures, as well as capacity building and cooperation to enhance the country’s capabilities.

description_en: Provider of Essential Services Within the meaning of this Law, a provider of essential services is: 1) a maintainer of the top-level domain name registry, for example, the holder of the top-level domain ".lv" registry; 2) a provider of domain name system services which provides publicly available recursive domain name resolution services for internet end-users or authoritative domain name resolution services for third-party usage, except for root name servers; d) an air navigation service provider, an aircraft operator, or an operator of an aerodrome or other civil aviation objects and facilities;

description_en: UNOFFICIAL ENGLISH TRANSLATION UNOFFICIAL ENGLISH TRANSLATION § 30 Exemptions from the risk mitigation measures associated with suppliers (1) The Agency may, if the nature of the threat to the security of the Czech Republic or to internal order permits so, grant an exemption from the conditions or prohibition set out in a measure of a general nature pursuant to § 29 if the compliance with the measure of a general nature by the provider of a strategically important service could endanger the performance of the strategically important service substantially. (2) The procedure for granting an exemption referred to in paragraph 1 shall be initiated at the request of the provider of a strategically important service. The provider of a strategically important service is required to provide evidence to prove the facts invoked in the application.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：UNOFFICIAL ENGLISH TRANSLATION UNOFFICIAL ENGLISH TRANSLATION § 30 Exemptions from the risk mitigation measures associated with suppliers (1) The Agency may, if the nature of the threat to the security of the Czech Republic or to internal order permits so, grant an exemption from the conditions or prohibition set out in a measure of a general nature pursuant to § 29 if the compliance with the measure of a general nature by the provider of a strategically important service could endanger the performance of the strategically important service substantially. (2) The procedure for granting an exemption referred to in paragraph 1 shall be initiated at the request of the provider of a strategically important service. The provider of a strategically important service is required to provide evidence to prove the facts invoked in the application.

description_en: The device must have built-in security monitoring mechanisms capable of logging and identifying anomalous behaviors or events (e.g., unauthorized access attempts, configuration changes, traffic anomalies) that may affect the security of network and information systems, to support incident prevention.

notes_en: Derived from Article 8 requirement to take measures to prevent incidents affecting network security.
notes_zh: 源自Article 8关于采取措施预防影响网络安全的事件的要求。

description_en: Article 51 ▼M1 Security objectives of European cybersecurity certification schemes for ICT products, ICT services and ICT processes A European cybersecurity certification scheme for ICT products, ICT services or ICT processes shall be designed to achieve, as applicable, at least the following security objectives: ▼B (a) to protect stored, transmitted or otherwise processed data against accidental or unauthorised storage, processing, access or disclosure during the entire life cycle of the ICT product, ICT service or ICT process;
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：Article 51 ▼M1 Security objectives of European cybersecurity certification schemes for ICT products, ICT services and ICT processes A European cybersecurity certification scheme for ICT products, ICT services or ICT processes shall be designed to achieve, as applicable, at least the following security objectives: ▼B (a) to protect stored, transmitted or otherwise processed data against accidental or unauthorised storage, processing, access or disclosure during the entire life cycle of the ICT product, ICT service or ICT process;

description_en: LSPro harus membatasi periode pembekuan sertifikat maksimal 6 (enam) bulan. Keluhan dan Banding LSPro harus mengembangkan aturan penanganan keluhan dan banding dengan mempertimbangkan kompetensi dan imparsialitas pelaksanaan penanganan keluhan dan banding. Informasi Publik LSPro harus mempublikasikan informasi kepada publik sesuai persyaratan SNI ISO/IEC 17065 termasuk informasi Pemohon yang disertifikasi, dibekukan dan dicabut.

Informasi Publik LSPro harus mempublikasikan informasi kepada publik sesuai persyaratan SNI ISO/IEC 17065 termasuk informasi Pemohon yang disertifikasi, dibekukan dan dicabut.

description_en: The device should support SHA3-256, SHA3-384, or SHA3-512 algorithms. Implementation must comply with FIPS PUB 202.
description_zh: 设备应支持SHA3-256、SHA3-384或SHA3-512算法。实现必须符合FIPS PUB 202标准。
notes_en: SHA-3 is a newer standard, suitable for high-security scenarios.
notes_zh: SHA-3为较新标准，适用于高安全性需求场景。
regulation_name: Approved Security Functions
title_en: Support SHA-3 Hash Algorithms
title_zh: 支持SHA-3哈希算法
verification_method_en: Check crypto library version or configuration options for SHA-3 enablement; run test vectors to verify compliance with FIPS PUB 202.
verification_method_zh: 检查密码库版本或配置选项，确认是否启用SHA-3支持；运行测试向量验证符合FIPS PUB 202。

description_en: The device must allow configuration changes and provide the ability to restore secure default settings; all configuration changes must only be performed by authorized individuals, services, or other IoT product components.
description_zh: 设备必须允许更改配置，并提供恢复到安全默认设置的功能；所有配置更改只能由授权个人、服务或其他IoT产品组件执行。
notes_en: Secure default settings should follow the principle of least privilege, disabling unnecessary services.
notes_zh: 安全默认设置应遵循最小权限原则，关闭不必要的服务。
regulation_name: Cyber Trust Mark Program Final Rule
title_en: Configuration Change and Default Restore
title_zh: 配置变更与恢复默认
verification_method_en: Attempt to modify critical configuration items and verify success; perform a 'factory reset' operation and verify that the device returns to the predefined secure baseline configuration; attempt to modify configurations using an unauthorized account and verify rejection.
verification_method_zh: 尝试修改关键配置项并验证是否成功；执行‘恢复出厂设置’操作，验证设备是否回归到预定义的安全基线配置；尝试使用未授权账户修改配置，验证是否被拒绝。

description_en: The device must be capable of recording security incident logs. Log entries must include key parameters sufficient to assess impact, specifically: number of affected users, duration of the incident, and geographic or network segment identifiers of the affected area.
description_zh: 设备必须能够记录安全事件日志，日志内容需包含足以评估事件影响的关键参数，包括受影响的用户数量、事件持续时间以及受影响的地理区域或网络段标识。
notes_en: Based on Article 17(4), these parameters are used to determine the relevance of the incident's impact. For home routers, 'number of affected users' may be simplified to the number of connected devices or sessions.
notes_zh: 依据第17条第4款，这些参数用于确定事件影响的相关性。对于家用路由器，'受影响用户数'可简化为连接的设备数量或会话数。
regulation_name: Portugal Law No. 46/2018 Cyberspace Security Legal Regime
title_en: Security Incident Logging Capability
title_zh: 安全事件日志记录能力
verification_method_en: Trigger a simulated security incident, check if system logs are generated, and verify that log fields contain the count of affected users, timestamps (to calculate duration), and network/geographic location identifiers.
verification_method_zh: 触发模拟安全事件，检查系统日志是否生成，并验证日志字段中是否包含受影响用户计数、时间戳（用于计算持续时间）和网络/地理位置标识信息。

description_en: National Cybersecurity Council (1) The National Cybersecurity Council is a collegial authority which coordinates the development of the policy related to cybersecurity and also the planning and implementation of relevant tasks and measures. (2) The composition of the National Cybersecurity Council shall be determined by the Prime Minister.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：National Cybersecurity Council (1) The National Cybersecurity Council is a collegial authority which coordinates the development of the policy related to cybersecurity and also the planning and implementation of relevant tasks and measures. (2) The composition of the National Cybersecurity Council shall be determined by the Prime Minister.

title_en: Article 6 - Security Governance and Product Requirements requirement
title_zh: Article 6 - 安全治理与产品要求要求
verification_method_en: Verify governance documents, product design evidence, test reports, and clause-level conformity statements.
verification_method_zh: 核验制度文件、产品设计证据、测试报告和与原文条款对应的符合性说明。

description_en: The device must support and enable by default the DSA algorithm compliant with FIPS PUB 186-4 (DSS, July 2013) when using digital signature functions. Use of unlisted or deprecated signature algorithms is prohibited.
description_zh: 设备在使用数字签名功能时，必须支持并默认启用符合 FIPS PUB 186-4 (DSS, July 2013) 标准的 DSA 算法。禁止使用未在此规范中列出的或已废弃的签名算法。
notes_en: This requirement is based on the list of approved security functions under the JCMVP system. Although only DSA is listed in the excerpt, engineering practice requires ensuring that any invoked signature module is certified accordingly.
notes_zh: 此要求基于JCMVP制度下的批准安全功能列表。虽然原文仅列出DSA，但工程上需确保任何调用的签名模块均通过相应认证。
regulation_name: Approved Security Functions
title_en: Compliant Digital Signature Algorithm
title_zh: 数字签名算法合规性
verification_method_en: Inspect the device configuration interface or API to confirm that the list of supported signature algorithms includes DSA and verify that its implementation references FIPS PUB 186-4; attempting to configure non-standard algorithms should be rejected or unavailable.
verification_method_zh: 检查设备配置界面或API，确认支持的签名算法列表中包含DSA，并验证其实现引用了FIPS PUB 186-4标准；尝试配置非标准算法应被拒绝或不可用。

description_en: The product administrator account must enable strong password rules by default, the password length is not less than 12 characters, including uppercase and lowercase letters, numbers, and special characters; default password must be forced to change on first login; enterprise products must support two-factor authentication (password + hardware token/biometrics/dynamic verification code).
description_zh: 产品管理员账号默认必须启用强密码规则，密码长度不低于12位，需包含大小写字母、数字、特殊字符；首次登录必须强制修改默认密码；企业级产品必须支持双因子认证（密码+硬件令牌/生物识别/动态验证码）。
notes_en: Two-factor authentication function for home routers is optional, other requirements are mandatory.
notes_zh: 家用路由器双因子认证功能为可选配置，其余要求强制满足。
regulation_name: Directive (EU) 2022/2555 of the European Parliament and of the Council on measures for a high common level of cybersecurity across the Union, amending Regulation (EU) No 910/2014 and repealing Directive (EU) 2016/1148 (NIS 2 Directive)
title_en: Strong Authentication Requirement
title_zh: 强身份认证要求
verification_method_en: Check whether the default password is forced to change when logging in to the product for the first time; try to set a password with insufficient length of 12 characters and lacking complexity requirements to verify whether it is intercepted; check whether enterprise products support two-factor authentication function.
verification_method_zh: 首次登录产品检查是否强制修改默认密码；尝试设置长度不足12位、缺少复杂度要求的密码验证是否被拦截；检查企业级产品是否支持双因子认证功能。

description_en: Third-party vendors supplying products or services to the public sector must execute applicable minimum information security requirements within the scope defined by contracts. Vendors must demonstrate capability to prove compliance of their products and services with relevant security clauses.
description_zh: 向公共部门提供产品或服务的第三方供应商，必须在合同规定的范围内执行适用的最低信息安全要求。供应商需具备证明其产品和服务符合相关安全条款的能力。
notes_en: This requirement primarily targets enterprises acting as public sector suppliers. For general commercial products, this is typically met by signing a compliance declaration or providing third-party audit results.
notes_zh: 此要求主要针对作为公共部门供应商的企业。对于通用商业产品，通常通过签署合规声明或提供第三方审计结果来满足。

title_en: Third-party Compliance Obligations
title_zh: 第三方供应商合规义务
verification_method_en: Review security appendices in vendor contracts for clauses referencing these minimum security requirements; verify compliance statements or audit reports provided by the vendor.
verification_method_zh: 审查供应商合同中的安全附录，检查是否包含引用本法规最低安全要求的条款；验证供应商提供的合规性声明或审计报告。

description_en: Critical Information Infrastructure organizations must conduct a cybersecurity risk assessment at least once per year. The product shall provide necessary logs, configuration exports, and status reporting features to support such audits performed by information security auditors, internal auditors, or external independent auditors.
description_zh: 关键信息基础设施组织必须每年至少进行一次网络安全风险评估。产品应提供必要的日志、配置导出和状态报告功能，以支持由信息安全审计员、内部审计员或外部独立审计员执行的此类审计。
notes_en: This requirement primarily targets enterprise-grade devices deployed as part of Critical Information Infrastructure. Home routers are typically excluded but retaining audit log features is recommended.
notes_zh: 此要求主要针对作为关键信息基础设施一部分部署的企业级设备。家用路由器通常不在此列，但建议保留审计日志功能以备查。
regulation_name: Thailand Cybersecurity Act B.E. 2562 (2019)
title_en: Annual Cybersecurity Risk Assessment Support
title_zh: 年度网络安全风险评估支持
verification_method_en: Check if product documentation states support for audit data export; verify existence of interfaces or commands for generating compliance reports or audit logs.
verification_method_zh: 检查产品文档是否说明支持审计数据导出；验证是否存在用于生成合规性报告或审计日志的接口或命令。

description_en: Technical standards are established, and several bodies are created to address related topics; 37052-MICITT establishes the Computer Security Incident Response Center (CSIRT-CR) with adequate powers to coordinate with state powers, autonomous institutions, state companies, and banks, on all matters related to computer security and cybersecurity.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：Technical standards are established, and several bodies are created to address related topics; 37052-MICITT establishes the Computer Security Incident Response Center (CSIRT-CR) with adequate powers to coordinate with state powers, autonomous institutions, state companies, and banks, on all matters related to computer security and cybersecurity.

title_en: ANNEX 1 - Incident Reporting and Response requirement
title_zh: ANNEX 1 - 事件报告与响应要求
verification_method_en: Review incident reporting procedures, deadlines, notification templates, and exercise or response records.
verification_method_zh: 检查事件报告流程、时限要求、通知模板和演练/真实处置记录。

description_en: The device must provide a mechanism to allow authorized national Computer Emergency Response Team (CERT) personnel to access necessary information assets or system logs for incident investigation upon approval during security incidents. The admin interface shall include functionality to log such access requests and their approval status.
description_zh: 设备必须提供机制，允许授权的国家计算机应急响应团队（CERT）在发生安全事件时，经批准后访问必要的信息资产或系统日志以进行事件调查。管理员界面应包含记录此类访问请求及批准状态的功能。
notes_en: This requirement primarily targets enterprise-grade devices related to critical information infrastructure. Home routers typically do not involve such direct national-level incident response access, but must ensure logs are exportable for subsequent analysis.
notes_zh: 此要求主要针对关键信息基础设施相关的企业级设备。家用路由器通常不涉及此类国家级事件响应直接访问，但需确保日志可导出以供后续分析。
regulation_name: Georgia Law on Information Security
title_en: Support CERT Incident Response Access
title_zh: CERT事件响应访问支持
verification_method_en: Verify if the management interface has a functional module to record access requests and approval statuses from external regulatory bodies (e.g., CERT). Simulate a CERT access scenario to verify if the system correctly records the granting or denial of access permissions according to the process.
verification_method_zh: 检查管理界面是否具备记录外部监管机构（如CERT）访问请求和审批状态的功能模块；模拟CERT访问场景，验证系统是否能按流程记录访问权限的授予或拒绝。

description_en: BRUNEI DARUSSALAM GOVERNMENT GAZETTE "cybersecurity service" means a service provided by a person for reward that is intended primarily for or aimed at ensuring or safeguarding the cybersecurity of a computer or computer system belonging to another person (A), and includes the following - (a} assessing, testing or evaluating the cybersecurity of A's computer or computer system by searching for vulnerabilities in, and compromising, the cybersecurity defences of the computer or computer system; (c) investigating and responding to a cybersecurity incident that has affected A's computer or computer system by conducting a thorough scan and examination of the computer or computer system to identify and remove elements relating to, and identify the root cause of, the cybersecurity incident, and which involves circumventing the controls implemented in the computer or computer system;

description_en: The Management Board, acting on a proposal from the Executive Director, shall establish in a transparent manner the ENISA Advisory Group composed of recognised experts representing the relevant stakeholders, such as the ICT industry, providers of electronic communications networks or services available to the public, SMEs, operators of essential services, consumer groups, academic experts in the field of cybersecurity, and representatives of competent authorities notified in accordance with Directive (EU) 2018/1972, of European standardisation organisations, as well as of law enforcement and data protection supervisory authorities. The Management Board shall aim to ensure an appropriate gender and geographical balance as well as a balance between the different stakeholder groups. Procedures for the ENISA Advisory Group, in particular regarding its composition, the proposal by the Executive Director referred to in paragraph 1, the number and appointment of its members and the operation

description_en: The device or associated management system must have the capability to automatically generate and send an early warning notification upon detecting a major security incident suspected to be caused by illegal or malicious acts. This notification must be sent within 24 hours of the entity becoming aware of the incident and must include fields indicating suspicion of illegal/malicious acts and potential cross-border impact.
description_zh: 设备或关联管理系统必须具备在检测到疑似非法或恶意行为导致的重大安全事件时，自动生成并发送早期预警通知的能力。该通知必须在实体知晓事件后24小时内发出，且必须包含是否涉嫌非法/恶意行为以及是否具有跨境影响的标识字段。
notes_en: This requirement primarily targets enterprise-grade devices and software with event detection and management capabilities. For home routers without centralized management, local logging with timestamps is required to meet audit traceability needs.
notes_zh: 此要求主要针对具备事件检测和管理功能的企业级设备及软件。家用路由器若无集中管理能力，需通过本地日志记录时间戳以满足审计追溯要求。
regulation_name: Denmark Act on Measures to Ensure a High Cybersecurity Level
title_en: 24-hour Early Warning for Major Incidents
title_zh: 重大安全事件24小时预警机制
verification_method_en: Simulate a major security incident (e.g., massive DDoS or core service outage) and verify that the system generates a warning log or notification containing the specified fields (suspicion of illegal acts, cross-border impact) within 24 hours.
verification_method_zh: 模拟触发重大安全事件（如大规模DDoS攻击或核心服务中断），验证系统是否在24小时内生成包含指定字段（非法行为嫌疑、跨境影响）的预警日志或通知。

description_en: The device must support and enable by default strong encryption protocols (e.g., TLS 1.2+ or IPsec) to ensure the confidentiality of messages, content, and information transmitted through its services, preventing unauthorized eavesdropping.
description_zh: 设备必须支持并默认启用强加密协议（如TLS 1.2+或IPsec），以确保通过其服务传输的消息、内容和信息的机密性，防止未经授权的窃听。
notes_en: Based on the Preamble requirement to guarantee communication confidentiality.
notes_zh: 依据前言部分关于保证通信机密性的要求。
regulation_name: Peru Digital Trust Framework Emergency Decree No. 007-2020
title_en: Ensure Communication Confidentiality
title_zh: 通信内容机密性保障
verification_method_en: Use packet capture tools (e.g., Wireshark) to capture traffic from the device management interface and business data transmission, verifying that payloads are encrypted and deprecated weak encryption algorithms (e.g., SSLv3, TLS 1.0) are not used.
verification_method_zh: 使用抓包工具（如Wireshark）捕获设备管理界面及业务数据传输流量，验证载荷是否加密，且不使用已弃用的弱加密算法（如SSLv3, TLS 1.0）。

description_en: Article 21 (1) State administration authorities, other state authorities, local and regional self-government units, legal persons with public authority and public entities that collect data within the scope of their activities or keep registries, records and collections of data on entities referred to in Annex I and Annex II to this Act shall, without compensation, provide the following to the competent authorities for implementing cybersecurity requirements: ‒ regularly submit lists of entities referred to in Annex I and Annex II to this Act or enable access to the appropriate data in registers, records and data collections by electronic means

description_en: Article 9 Knowledge and information ENISA shall: (a) perform analyses of emerging technologies and provide topic-specific assessments on the expected societal, legal, economic and regulatory impact of technological innovations on cybersecurity; (c) in cooperation with experts from Member States authorities and relevant stakeholders, provide advice, guidance and best practices for the security of network and information systems, in particular for the security of the infrastructures supporting the sectors listed in Annex II to Directive (EU) 2016/1148 and those used by the providers of the digital services listed in Annex III to that Directive; (d) through a dedicated portal, pool, organise and make available to the public information on cybersecurity provided by the Union institutions, bodies, offices and agencies and information on cybersecurity provided on a voluntary basis by Member States and private and public stakeholders;

description_en: (3) The owner of critical information infrastructure shall in consultation with the Committee periodically review the cybersecurity awareness programme to ensure that the programme is adequate and that it remains up-to-date and relevant. (1) An owner of a designated critical information infrastructure shall adhere to the following baseline security requirements to ensure the protection of the critical information infrastructure— (a) develop and implement an internal cybersecurity policy addressing the risks associated with the critical information infrastructure risks, consistent with the provisions of the Act and these Regulations and best practices relevant to the relevant sector and which shall— (i) be reviewed, at least annually, consistent with identified risks and threats affecting the specific critical information infrastructure sector;
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：(3) The owner of critical information infrastructure shall in consultation with the Committee periodically review the cybersecurity awareness programme to ensure that the programme is adequate and that it remains up-to-date and relevant. (1) An owner of a designated critical information infrastructure shall adhere to the following baseline security requirements to ensure the protection of the critical information infrastructure— (a) develop and implement an internal cybersecurity policy addressing the risks associated with the critical information infrastructure risks, consistent with the provisions of the Act and these Regulations and best practices relevant to the relevant sector and which shall— (i) be reviewed, at least annually, consistent with identified risks and threats affecting the specific critical information infrastructure sector;

regulation_name: UK Cyber Assessment Framework version 4.0
title_en: Source clause - Security Governance and Product Requirements requirement
title_zh: 原文条款 - 安全治理与产品要求要求
verification_method_en: Verify governance documents, product design evidence, test reports, and clause-level conformity statements.
verification_method_zh: 核验制度文件、产品设计证据、测试报告和与原文条款对应的符合性说明。

description_en: Device firmware and associated software must not collect personal information unrelated to service functions. Engineering implementation requires a data whitelist mechanism, allowing only the minimum dataset necessary for device operation and troubleshooting. Silent background collection of unrelated privacy data such as browsing history or app lists is prohibited.
description_zh: 设备固件及关联软件不得收集与服务功能无关的个人信息。工程实现上，需建立数据白名单机制，仅允许采集维持设备运行、故障排查所必需的最小数据集。禁止后台静默收集用户浏览历史、应用列表等无关隐私数据。
notes_en: Focus on products like home routers and wireless APs that may involve user behavior analysis.
notes_zh: 重点针对家用路由器、无线AP等可能涉及用户行为分析的产品。
regulation_name: 中华人民共和国网络安全法（2025年修正）
title_en: Minimization of Data Collection
title_zh: 最小化数据收集原则
verification_method_en: Analyze outbound traffic of the device in idle state via packet capture to confirm that no prohibited unrelated personal information fields are transmitted.
verification_method_zh: 通过网络抓包分析设备在空闲状态下的 outbound 流量，确认未发送法规禁止的无关个人信息字段。

description_en: The device must not use the Hierocrypt-L1 algorithm as a cryptographic primitive when implementing 64-bit block cipher functions.
description_zh: 设备在实现64位块加密功能时，严禁使用Hierocrypt-L1算法作为加密原语。
notes_en: This requirement targets the list of non-approved security functions under the JCMVP scheme.
notes_zh: 此要求针对JCMVP制度下的非承认安全功能列表。
regulation_clause: Section 2, Common Key, <64-bit Block Cipher> Item 2
regulation_name: Limited Security Functions
title_en: Prohibit Hierocrypt-L1 Algorithm
title_zh: 禁止使用Hierocrypt-L1算法
verification_method_en: Inspect cryptographic module source code or configuration to confirm Hierocrypt-L1 implementation is absent or disabled; attempting to invoke the algorithm should return an error or 'not supported'.
verification_method_zh: 检查密码模块源代码或配置，确认未包含或启用Hierocrypt-L1算法实现；尝试调用该算法应返回错误或不支持。

description_en: Article 26 The public administration authority responsible for information security shall be the ministry in charge of information security affairs. Within its competences, the Ministry shall: 1) Prepare and propose regulations and planning documents in the field of information security in accordance with this Law; 4) Carry out inspection of the implementation of this Law and the operations of operators of ICT systems of special importance, excluding independent operators of ICT systems and ICT systems for classified data handling;
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：Article 26 The public administration authority responsible for information security shall be the ministry in charge of information security affairs. Within its competences, the Ministry shall: 1) Prepare and propose regulations and planning documents in the field of information security in accordance with this Law; 4) Carry out inspection of the implementation of this Law and the operations of operators of ICT systems of special importance, excluding independent operators of ICT systems and ICT systems for classified data handling;

title_en: Article 26 - Security Governance and Product Requirements requirement
title_zh: Article 26 - 安全治理与产品要求要求
verification_method_en: Verify governance documents, product design evidence, test reports, and clause-level conformity statements.
verification_method_zh: 核验制度文件、产品设计证据、测试报告和与原文条款对应的符合性说明。

description_en: The device must support and enable by default the DSA algorithm compliant with FIPS PUB 186-4 (DSS, July 2013) when using digital signature functions. Use of algorithms not listed or deprecated in this specification is prohibited.
description_zh: 设备在使用数字签名功能时，必须支持并默认启用符合 FIPS PUB 186-4 (DSS, July 2013) 标准的 DSA 算法。禁止使用未在此规范中列出的或已废弃的签名算法。
notes_en: This requirement is based on the list of approved security functions under the JCMVP system. Although only DSA is listed in the excerpt, engineering implementation must ensure the library version correctly references the July 2013 version of FIPS 186-4.
notes_zh: 此要求基于JCMVP制度下的批准安全功能列表。虽然原文仅列出DSA，但工程实施时需确保库版本正确引用2013年7月版的FIPS 186-4。
regulation_name: Approved Security Functions
title_en: Compliant Digital Signature Algorithm
title_zh: 数字签名算法合规性
verification_method_en: Inspect the device configuration interface or API documentation to confirm that DSA is included in the list of supported signature algorithms and verify that its implementation references FIPS PUB 186-4. Attempting to configure non-standard algorithms should be rejected or unavailable.
verification_method_zh: 检查设备配置界面或API文档，确认支持的签名算法列表中包含DSA，并验证其实现引用了FIPS PUB 186-4标准。尝试配置非标准算法应被拒绝或不可用。

description_en: The device must have content filtering or ACL capabilities to identify and block information prohibited by laws and regulations. For enterprise and security gateway products, real-time detection and blocking based on signature databases or policies must be supported.
description_zh: 设备必须具备内容过滤或访问控制列表（ACL）功能，能够识别并阻断法律法规禁止发布或传输的信息（如恶意代码、违法内容）。对于企业级及安全网关产品，应支持基于特征库或策略的实时检测与阻断机制。
notes_en: Based on Article 71(1), transmitting prohibited information is banned. Home routers may meet basic compliance via firmware-level DNS filtering or parental controls.
notes_zh: 依据第七十一条第一款，禁止发布或传输违法信息。家用路由器可通过固件层面的DNS过滤或家长控制功能满足基本合规要求。
regulation_name: 中华人民共和国网络安全法（2025年修正）
title_en: Block Prohibited Information Transmission
title_zh: 非法信息过滤与阻断
verification_method_en: Attempt to transmit known prohibited sample data or access blacklisted URLs through the device to verify if it intercepts and logs the activity according to configured policies.
verification_method_zh: 尝试通过设备传输已知的违禁样本数据或访问黑名单URL，验证设备是否能根据配置策略进行拦截并记录日志。

description_en: 9) a provider of a publicly available electronic communications service and a provider of a public electronic communications network service who does not meet the conditions specified in clause 8 of subsection 2 of § 3 of this Act.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：9) a provider of a publicly available electronic communications service and a provider of a public electronic communications network service who does not meet the conditions specified in clause 8 of subsection 2 of § 3 of this Act.

description_en: Must establish and document a cyber third-party risk management process that is identified, assessed, managed, and agreed to by stakeholders.
description_zh: 必须建立并记录针对第三方供应商的网络安全风险管理流程，该流程需经利益相关方评估、管理和同意。
notes_en: Applicable to all product lines involving procurement of external components or services.
notes_zh: 适用于所有涉及外部组件或服务采购的产品线。
regulation_clause: Appendix A, Third Party Risk Management, Item 1
regulation_name: Bahrain CBB Insurance Rulebook Cyber Security Risk Management
title_en: Establish Third-Party Risk Management Process
title_zh: 建立第三方风险管理流程
verification_method_en: Review documented third-party risk management policies and procedures to confirm stakeholder approval records.
verification_method_zh: 审查文档化的第三方风险管理政策及流程文件，确认是否有利益相关方的审批记录。

description_en: The device must provide configurable identity verification mechanisms to verify the identity of persons accessing digital services. For high-risk operations or administrative access, Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) or strong authentication methods compliant with current data protection regulations must be supported.
description_zh: 设备必须提供可配置的身份验证机制，以验证访问数字服务的人员身份。对于高风险操作或管理访问，必须支持多因素认证（MFA）或符合当前数据保护法规要求的强身份验证方法。
notes_en: Identity verification strength must be implemented according to the service's risk level and comply with personal data protection norms.
notes_zh: 需根据服务的风险级别实施相应的身份验证强度，并遵守个人数据保护规范。
regulation_name: Peru Digital Trust Framework Emergency Decree No. 007-2020
title_en: Digital Service Identity Verification
title_zh: 数字服务身份验证机制
verification_method_en: Check if the device management interface supports enabling MFA or strong password policies; attempts to log in with default credentials should be rejected or force a change; verify that the authentication process meets risk-level requirements.
verification_method_zh: 检查设备管理界面是否支持启用MFA或强密码策略；尝试使用默认凭据登录应被拒绝或强制修改；验证身份验证流程是否符合风险等级要求。

description_en: 6.8.13 Independent system evaluation: Licensees shall ensure their systems and controls, including business continuity, disaster recovery, and cyber resilience, are independently tested upon implementation, after material changes, and at least every three (3) years.

regulation_name: Indonesia Cryptographic Algorithm and Crypto Module Security Conformity Assessment
title_en: Source clause - Cryptography and Key Security requirement
title_zh: 原文条款 - 加密与密钥安全要求
verification_method_en: Review cryptographic algorithms, key lifecycle controls, configuration baselines, and security test reports.
verification_method_zh: 检查密码算法、密钥生命周期、配置基线和相关安全测试报告。

description_en: Products must have verifiable security configuration baselines and logging capabilities to support public entities in assessing compliance for the 'Digital Trust Seal' based on current regulations, technical standards, and contingency response mechanisms.
description_zh: 产品应具备可验证的安全配置基线和日志记录能力，以支持公共实体依据现行法规、技术标准及应急响应机制进行‘数字信任印章’（Sellos de confianza digital）的合规性评估。
notes_en: This requirement primarily targets vendors supplying equipment to the public sector, ensuring products meet the certification standards for the government's Digital Trust Seal.
notes_zh: 此要求主要面向向公共部门供货的设备商，需确保产品能满足政府机构的信任印章认证标准。
regulation_name: Peru Digital Trust Framework Regulation Supreme Decree No. 126-2025-PCM
title_en: Support for Digital Trust Seal Assessment
title_zh: 支持数字信任印章评估
verification_method_en: Check if product documentation includes security best practice guidelines aligned with the Peru Digital Trust Framework, and verify if the device can export security status reports for auditing.
verification_method_zh: 检查产品文档是否包含符合秘鲁数字信任框架的安全最佳实践指南，并验证设备是否能导出用于审计的安全状态报告。

description_en: The device or management system must maintain an 'incident log' documenting all notifications, decisions, and actions taken regarding cyber incidents. Logs must be recorded as close to the time of occurrence as possible, including the issue status (open/resolved) and the person in charge.
description_zh: 设备或管理系统必须维护‘事件日志’，记录所有与网络事件相关的通知、决策和采取的行动。日志必须在事件发生后尽快记录，并包含问题状态（开放或已解决）及负责解决该事件的人员信息。
notes_en: Regulation requires logs to be stored and preserved in a secure and legally admissible manner. This requirement primarily targets enterprise-grade devices with management capabilities and software platforms.
notes_zh: 法规要求日志以安全且法律可接受的方式存储和保存。此要求主要针对具备管理功能的企业级设备及软件平台。
regulation_name: Bahrain CBB Insurance Rulebook Cyber Security Risk Management
title_en: Cyber Incident Logging Requirements
title_zh: 网络安全事件日志记录
verification_method_en: Verify the system logging function by simulating a security incident handling process and confirming that logs include timestamp, actions taken, current status, and responsible person fields.
verification_method_zh: 检查系统日志功能，确认在模拟安全事件处理后，日志中是否包含时间戳、采取的行动、当前状态及责任人字段。

description_en: LSPro harus menyusun format permohonan sertifikasi TOE bagi Sponsor dan/atau Developer untuk mendapatkan seluruh informasi.

description_en: Article 22 In the case of incidents classified as “high” severity level incidents, the Office for Information Security shall inform the Ministry thereof. The Office for Information Security shall, in cooperation with the operational response team, prepare recommendations and measures to address the incident. Upon receipt of the notification referred to in paragraph 1 of this Article, the Ministry shall convene a session of the Coordinating Body for Information Security Affairs.

description_en: In the initial certification and homologation application, the applicant must submit a formal declaration explicitly stating which specific cybersecurity requirements listed in the Annex of this Regulation the product and its supplier comply with.
description_zh: 在设备初始认证和 homologation（核准）申请中，申请人必须提交一份正式声明，明确指出该产品及其供应商符合本法规附件中列出的哪些具体网络安全要求。
notes_en: This requirement targets the certification process and is a necessary administrative and technical step before product market launch.
notes_zh: 此要求针对认证流程，是产品上市前的必要行政和技术步骤。
regulation_name: ANATEL Ato 77 Cybersecurity Requirements for Telecommunications Equipment
title_en: Initial Certification Compliance Declaration
title_zh: 初始认证合规声明
verification_method_en: Review the homologation application documents to confirm the inclusion of a signed compliance declaration by the applicant, referencing specific regulation clauses or requirement numbers.
verification_method_zh: 审查 homologation 申请文件，确认包含由申请人签署的合规性声明文件，且该声明引用了具体的法规条款或要求编号。

description_en: Devices, components, and software must not be supplied by entities controlled by states recognized as aggressors by the Verkhovna Rada of Ukraine, or by entities subject to special economic sanctions. Supply chain verification must confirm suppliers are not on sanction lists.
description_zh: 设备及其组件、软件不得由被乌克兰最高拉达认定为侵略国的国家控制的实体，或受国家/国际特别经济限制措施（制裁）的实体提供。必须在供应链审查中验证供应商不在制裁名单上。
notes_en: This requirement primarily targets critical infrastructure equipment and government procurement, but all products sold in Ukraine should avoid core components from sanctioned entities as a general compliance measure.
notes_zh: 此要求主要针对关键信息基础设施相关设备及政府采购项目，但作为通用合规要求，所有在乌销售产品均应避免来自制裁实体的核心组件。
regulation_name: Ukraine Law on the Basic Principles of Cybersecurity
title_en: Ban on Sanctioned Entity Products
title_zh: 制裁实体产品禁入
verification_method_en: Review supplier lists against official Ukrainian sanction lists; inspect compliance declaration clauses in procurement contracts.
verification_method_zh: 审查供应商清单与乌克兰官方制裁名单进行比对；检查采购合同中的合规声明条款。

verification_method_zh: 检查事件报告流程、时限要求、通知模板和演练/真实处置记录。

description_en: Network devices with physical interfaces must support the function of disabling unused physical Ethernet ports and USB interfaces; support 802.1X authentication for physical ports, and unauthenticated devices cannot access the network through physical interfaces.
description_zh: 带物理接口的网络设备必须支持禁用未使用的物理以太网端口、USB接口的功能；支持配置物理端口的802.1X认证，未认证的设备无法通过物理接口接入网络。
notes_en: 802.1X authentication function for home routers is optional, other requirements are mandatory.
notes_zh: 家用路由器802.1X认证功能为可选配置，其余要求强制满足。
regulation_name: Directive (EU) 2022/2555 of the European Parliament and of the Council on measures for a high common level of cybersecurity across the Union, amending Regulation (EU) No 910/2014 and repealing Directive (EU) 2016/1148 (NIS 2 Directive)
title_en: Physical Interface Access Control
title_zh: 物理接口访问控制
verification_method_en: Try to disable physical ports and USB interfaces in the management interface to verify whether they take effect; connect unauthenticated devices to physical ports to test whether they are intercepted and cannot access the network.
verification_method_zh: 尝试在管理界面禁用物理端口和USB接口，验证是否生效；将未认证设备接入物理端口，测试是否被拦截无法接入网络。

description_en: The manufacturer must provide a public contact method or portal for customers and third parties to submit cybersecurity-related questions, report vulnerabilities, or inquire about security information, with a mechanism to receive and process such inputs.
description_zh: 产品制造商必须提供公开的联系方式或门户，以便客户及第三方能够提交网络安全相关问题、报告安全漏洞或查询安全信息，并确保有机制接收和处理这些输入。
notes_en: This requirement ensures the vendor has the capability to receive external security feedback, serving as a prerequisite for the vulnerability management process.
notes_zh: 此要求旨在确保厂商具备接收外部安全反馈的能力，是漏洞管理流程的前置条件。
regulation_name: Cyber Trust Mark Program Final Rule
title_en: Establish Security Inquiry Channel
title_zh: 建立安全信息查询渠道
verification_method_en: Verify that valid security contact emails, web forms, or phone numbers are provided on product packaging, user manuals, or official websites, and send a test query to validate the reception mechanism.
verification_method_zh: 检查产品包装、用户手册或官方网站是否提供了有效的安全联系邮箱、网页表单或电话号码，并尝试发送测试查询以验证接收机制的有效性。

description_en: If ECDSA is used, the elliptic curve order must be ≥224 bits, and the hash function output length must be ≥224 bits. Compliant with ANS X9.62-2005, FIPS PUB 186-4, or SEC 1 v2.0.
description_zh: 若使用ECDSA数字签名算法，椭圆曲线的阶必须≥224位，且使用的哈希函数输出长度必须≥224位。符合ANS X9.62-2005、FIPS PUB 186-4或SEC 1 v2.0标准。
notes_en: Applies to all product modules supporting ECDSA.
notes_zh: 适用于所有支持ECDSA的产品模块。
regulation_name: Approved Security Functions
title_en: ECDSA Curve and Hash Strength
title_zh: ECDSA曲线与哈希强度
verification_method_en: Verify that the elliptic curve parameters and associated hash algorithm in the ECDSA implementation meet the minimum 224-bit strength requirement.
verification_method_zh: 验证ECDSA实现中选用的椭圆曲线参数及关联哈希算法是否满足最小224位强度要求。

description_en: Product must display the certification label on the device or packaging after obtaining security certification. If certification is invalidated or cancelled, the label display must cease immediately. Exaggerated, ambiguous, or false advertising regarding certification status is prohibited.
description_zh: 产品必须在获得信息安全认证后，在设备本体或包装上清晰展示认证标签。若认证失效或被取消，必须立即停止展示该标签。严禁使用夸大、模糊或虚假的宣传语描述认证状态。
notes_en: This requirement involves ongoing compliance post-market entry, not limited to the R&D phase.
notes_zh: 此要求涉及市场准入后的持续合规性，不仅限于研发阶段。
regulation_name: KISA IoT Security Certification
title_en: Certification Label Display Rules
title_zh: 认证标签显示规范
verification_method_en: Inspect physical product and packaging for label presence; simulate certification cancellation scenario to verify label removal/covering; review marketing materials to ensure no exaggerated or false certification claims.
verification_method_zh: 检查产品实物及包装上的标签是否存在；模拟认证取消场景，验证标签是否被移除或遮盖；审查市场宣传材料，确认无夸大或虚假认证描述。

title_en: Source clause - Incident Reporting and Response requirement
title_zh: 原文条款 - 事件报告与响应要求
verification_method_en: Review incident reporting procedures, deadlines, notification templates, and exercise or response records.
verification_method_zh: 检查事件报告流程、时限要求、通知模板和演练/真实处置记录。

description_en: The device must support storing or exporting security incident logs to an external server, ensuring a retention period of at least 5 years to facilitate incident investigations.
description_zh: 设备必须支持将安全事件日志存储或导出至外部日志服务器，并确保日志保留时间不少于5年，以支持事件调查。
notes_en: Although the regulation targets licensees, network devices as log sources must have the capability for long-term retention or reliable export to meet compliance.
notes_zh: 虽然法规针对持牌机构，但网络设备作为日志生成源，必须具备长期留存或可靠导出的能力以满足合规。
regulation_clause: Preamble (in order to facilitate incident investigations, for 5 years or longer)
regulation_name: Bahrain CBB Insurance Rulebook Cyber Security Risk Management
title_en: Security Incident Log Retention Period
title_zh: 安全事件日志留存期限
verification_method_en: Inspect log configuration interface or files to confirm retention policy is set to ≥5 years, or verify log export functionality and external storage retention policies.
verification_method_zh: 检查日志配置界面或配置文件，确认日志保留策略设置为≥5年，或验证日志导出功能及外部存储系统的保留策略。

description_en: The product must implement and enable secure communication mechanisms to ensure confidentiality and integrity of data in transit, allowing only evaluated secure protocols for communication.
description_zh: 产品必须实现并启用安全通信机制，确保数据在传输过程中的机密性和完整性，仅允许使用经评估的安全协议进行通信。
notes_en: This is one of the core functions allowed as a security target for CSPN certification.
notes_zh: 这是CSPN认证允许作为安全目标评估的核心功能之一。
regulation_name: ANSSI CSPN First Level Security Certification
title_en: Support Secure Communication Functions
title_zh: 支持安全通信功能
verification_method_en: Inspect product configuration and perform packet capture analysis to verify that all management and user plane communications use encrypted protocols like TLS/SSH/IPsec, prohibiting plaintext transmission.
verification_method_zh: 检查产品配置和抓包分析，验证所有管理面和用户面通信是否使用TLS/SSH/IPsec等加密协议，禁止明文传输。

description_en: The device must have a security incident detection mechanism capable of identifying and logging potential information and cybersecurity incidents, including timestamp, type, and affected asset information, to support subsequent analysis and response.
description_zh: 设备必须具备安全事件检测机制，能够识别并记录潜在的信息安全和网络安全事件，包括事件发生的时间、类型及受影响资产信息，以支持后续的分析与响应。
notes_en: Based on Article 21 requirement to effectively manage incidents (identify, detect, analyze). This specification focuses on the device-level 'detection' and 'logging' capabilities, which are prerequisites for the institution's 'identification' and 'analysis'.
notes_zh: 基于第21条要求有效管理事件（识别、检测、分析）。此规格侧重于设备层面的‘检测’与‘记录’能力，这是管理机构进行‘识别’和‘分析’的前提。
regulation_name: Honduras CNBS IT, Cybersecurity and Business Continuity Management Rules 2022
title_en: Security Incident Detection and Logging
title_zh: 安全事件检测与记录
verification_method_en: Trigger simulated security incidents (e.g., multiple failed logins, abnormal traffic) and verify that the device system logs generate records containing timestamp, event type, and details of affected assets.
verification_method_zh: 触发模拟安全事件（如多次登录失败、异常流量），检查设备系统日志是否生成了包含时间、事件类型和受影响资产详情的记录。

description_en: (31) The Estonian Information System Authority provides to the entity that has notified it of a cyber incident with a significant impact a response, where possible, within 24 hours, which contains preliminary feedback on the cyber incident with a significant impact and, upon request of the entity submitting the notification, also guidance on measures for responding to the cyber incident with a significant impact.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：(31) The Estonian Information System Authority provides to the entity that has notified it of a cyber incident with a significant impact a response, where possible, within 24 hours, which contains preliminary feedback on the cyber incident with a significant impact and, upon request of the entity submitting the notification, also guidance on measures for responding to the cyber incident with a significant impact.

description_en: Data-at-rest classified as critical or confidential stored on the device must be protected using strong encryption algorithms (e.g., AES-256).
description_zh: 设备存储的分类为“关键”或“机密”的静态数据必须使用强加密算法进行保护（如AES-256）。
notes_en: Define critical/confidential data, typically including password hashes, private keys, and user PII.
notes_zh: 需定义何为关键/机密数据，通常包括密码哈希、私钥、用户PII等。

title_en: Strong Encryption for Data-at-Rest
title_zh: 静态数据强加密保护
verification_method_en: Inspect configuration files or database storage mechanisms to verify encryption algorithms and key management meet strong encryption standards.
verification_method_zh: 检查配置文件或数据库存储机制，验证加密算法及密钥管理是否符合强加密标准。
