description_en: Manufacturers must publicly disclose the end date until which they promise to diligently identify critical vulnerabilities and issue corrective patches (i.e., minimum support period). If the device does not support security updates, it must explicitly state 'Device Unsupported' and inform purchasers not to rely on the manufacturer for security updates.
description_zh: 制造商必须公开承诺 diligently 识别关键漏洞并发布修复补丁的截止日期（即最小支持周期）。如果设备不支持安全更新，必须明确声明“设备不受支持”，并告知购买者不应依赖制造商发布安全更新。
notes_en: This is one of the core information disclosure requirements of the Cyber Trust Mark labeling program.
notes_zh: 这是Cyber Trust Mark标签计划的核心信息披露要求之一。

title_en: Disclose Minimum Support Period
title_zh: 披露最小支持周期
verification_method_en: Review product compliance declaration, official website support page, or product label to verify the inclusion of a specific support end date or an explicit 'Unsupported' statement.
verification_method_zh: 审查产品合规声明、官方网站支持页面或产品标签，验证是否包含具体的支持结束日期或明确的“不受支持”声明。

description_en: Article 29 (1) In accordance with this Act, the members of management bodies of essential and important entities or the heads of state administrative authorities, other state authorities, executive bodies of local and regional self -government units (hereinafter: persons responsible for the management of measures) are responsible for the implementation of cybersecurity risk- management measures. (2) Persons responsible for the management of measures shall approve cybersecurity risk-management measures that the entity shall apply in order to comply with obligations defined under this Act and the implementing regulation on cybersecurity requirements and control their implementation. (3) For the purpose of acquiring know-how and skills in matters of cybersecurity risk management and their impact on the services provided by the entity or the activities it performs, the persons responsible for the management of measures shall do the following: ‒ attend appropriate trainings ‒ enable employe

(2) Persons responsible for the management of measures shall approve cybersecurity risk-management measures that the entity shall apply in order to comply with obligations defined under this Act and the implementing regulation on cybersecurity requirements and control their implementation. (3) For the purpose of acquiring know-how and skills in matters of cybersecurity risk management and their impact on the services provided by the entity or the activities it performs, the persons responsible for the management of measures shall do the following: ‒ attend appropriate trainings ‒ enable employe

description_en: The manufacturer must author and submit a detailed Security Target document, explicitly listing all security requirements the product claims to meet, serving as the baseline for third-party evaluation and certification.
description_zh: 制造商必须编写并提交详细的安全目标（Security Target/Cible de sécurité）文档，明确列出产品声称满足的所有安全要求，作为第三方评估和认证的基准依据。
notes_en: The Security Target is the core input document for CSPN evaluation and must accurately reflect the product's actual security capabilities.

description_en: (2) In addition, in order to address a significant threat or breach of information security in cyberspace, the Agency is authorized to provide material resources in the property of the Czech Republic that are in the use of the Agency and are necessary to addre ss a cybersecurity incident or to secure assets against an impending cybersecurity incident to persons involved in the activities described above. (3) In a state of cyber emergency, the person who has been requested to do so on the basis of the measures issued by the Agency shall implement the measures referred to in paragraph 1 and to tolerate the restrictions resulting therefrom and to provide the nece ssary cooperation to the Agency. (4) Material resources provided, other than those that have been consumed, shall be returned to the Agency upon termination of the state of cyber emergency.

(3) In a state of cyber emergency, the person who has been requested to do so on the basis of the measures issued by the Agency shall implement the measures referred to in paragraph 1 and to tolerate the restrictions resulting therefrom and to provide the nece ssary cooperation to the Agency. (4) Material resources provided, other than those that have been consumed, shall be returned to the Agency upon termination of the state of cyber emergency.

State bodies shall be responsible for the confidentiality and storage of personal information that they collect.

description_en: En décimo lugar, el Ministerio de Defensa Nacional en conjunto con el Ministerio de Tecnologías de la Información y las Comunicaciones elaborará un reporte anual para el coordinador nacional de seguridad digital, sobre los logros y avances de ejecución (desde las perspectivas cualitativa y cuantitativa) de los planes de fortalecimiento de las capacidades para cada una de las instancias y entidades responsables de la ciberseguridad y ciberdefensa de la Nación. Dicho reporte debe tener como objetivo fomentar la prevención en seguridad digital, la promoción de toma de decisiones y la mejora continua de la gestión y respuesta a incidentes cibernéticos a nivel nacional.

Dicho reporte debe tener como objetivo fomentar la prevención en seguridad digital, la promoción de toma de decisiones y la mejora continua de la gestión y respuesta a incidentes cibernéticos a nivel nacional.

description_en: An offence under this Act shall be deemed to be a cognizable offence for the purposes of the Criminal Procedure Code. (1) In any legal proceedings, the rules of evidence shall not be applied so as to deny the admissibility of a data message in evidence— (a) on the mere grounds that it is constituted by a data message; (2) Information in the form of a data message shall be given due evidential weight.

description_en: Event reports or log export formats generated by the device must support structured data output, enabling regulatory bodies or upstream management systems to extract information for determining cross-border impact and service continuity disruptions.
description_zh: 设备生成的事件报告或日志导出格式必须支持结构化数据输出，以便监管机构或上级管理系统能够提取信息以判断事件的跨境影响和服务连续性中断情况。
notes_en: Primarily applicable to enterprise-grade products and devices part of critical infrastructure. Home products typically report via cloud; ensure the cloud interface complies with this requirement.
notes_zh: 主要适用于企业级产品和作为关键基础设施一部分的设备。家用产品通常通过云端上报，需确保云端接口符合此要求。

verification_method_en: Export event logs or generate a report, and verify that the format (e.g., JSON, XML, CSV) contains standardized fields that can be parsed by external systems to assess the scope of service disruption impact.
verification_method_zh: 导出事件日志或生成报告，验证其格式（如JSON, XML, CSV）是否包含标准化的字段，能够被外部系统解析以评估服务中断的影响范围。

description_en: (7) Cu ocazia desfășurării auditului de securitate cibernetică periodic se realizează o evaluare sistematică a tuturor politicilor, procedurilor și măsurilor de protecție implementate la nivelul unor rețele și sisteme informatice, în vederea identificării disfuncționalităților și vulnerabilităților și recomandării măsurilor de remediere a acestora. (8) În cel mult 15 zile lucrătoare de la data primirii raportului de audit, entitățile sunt obligate să întocmească și să transmită către DNSC și, după caz, autorității competente sectorial, în baza recomandărilor emise de către auditor, planul de măsuri pentru remedierea tuturor deficiențelor constatate și termenele asumate pentru implementarea acestora. (9) Entitățile sunt obligate să implementeze planul de măsuri prevăzut la alin.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：(7) Cu ocazia desfășurării auditului de securitate cibernetică periodic se realizează o evaluare sistematică a tuturor politicilor, procedurilor și măsurilor de protecție implementate la nivelul unor rețele și sisteme informatice, în vederea identificării disfuncționalităților și vulnerabilităților și recomandării măsurilor de remediere a acestora. (8) În cel mult 15 zile lucrătoare de la data primirii raportului de audit, entitățile sunt obligate să întocmească și să transmită către DNSC și, după caz, autorității competente sectorial, în baza recomandărilor emise de către auditor, planul de măsuri pentru remedierea tuturor deficiențelor constatate și termenele asumate pentru implementarea acestora. (9) Entitățile sunt obligate să implementeze planul de măsuri prevăzut la alin.

description_en: The device must have built-in or support integrated security monitoring capabilities to detect abnormal traffic, unauthorized access attempts, and known attack signatures. Upon detection of a security incident, it must trigger predefined response actions (e.g., blocking connections, isolating ports, sending alerts) and provide interfaces for post-incident recovery or clearing affected data.
description_zh: 设备必须内置或支持集成安全监控功能，能够检测异常流量、未授权访问尝试及已知攻击特征；在检测到安全事件时，必须触发预定义的响应动作（如阻断连接、隔离端口、发送告警），并提供事后恢复或清除受影响数据的功能接口。
notes_en: For home routers, at least basic abnormal traffic alerting capability is required; enterprise-grade devices require more complex linked response capabilities.
notes_zh: 对于家用路由器，至少需具备基本的异常流量告警能力；企业级设备需具备更复杂的联动响应能力。
regulation_name: Ukraine Law on the Basic Principles of Cybersecurity
title_en: Cyber Incident Detection and Response
title_zh: 网络事件检测与响应机制
verification_method_en: Use automated penetration testing tools to simulate common network attacks (e.g., DDoS, SQL injection, port scanning) to verify if the device generates alert logs and executes predefined blocking or isolation policies; check if management interfaces are provided to reset or clean infected states.
verification_method_zh: 使用自动化渗透测试工具模拟常见网络攻击（如DDoS、SQL注入、端口扫描），验证设备是否能生成告警日志并执行预设的阻断或隔离策略；检查是否提供重置或清理受感染状态的管理接口。

description_en: (3) Despite subsection (1), it shall not be an offence under this Act where— (a) the transmission of multiple electronic communications from or through such computer system is done within customer, business or any other relationships where a person would reasonably be expected to transmit multiple electronic mail messages; (1) A person shall not use a computer system for any activity which constitutes an offence under any written law which is not provided under this Act.

description_en: 45 COSTA RICAN NATIONAL CYBERSECURITY STRATEGY 2023 - 2027 With the support of: Through the methodical execution of specific actions, Costa Rica aspires to maintain its leadership in ICT research and development, in addition to being a benchmark in training professionals specialized in cybersecurity and computer science. At the national level, cybersecurity can only be implemented through a multifaceted and diverse approach, thus ensuring simultaneous development of key areas to strengthen the country’s cyber resilience. Moreover, it will establish alliances with all relevant stakeholders to advance its objectives and goals.

At the national level, cybersecurity can only be implemented through a multifaceted and diverse approach, thus ensuring simultaneous development of key areas to strengthen the country’s cyber resilience. Moreover, it will establish alliances with all relevant stakeholders to advance its objectives and goals.

description_en: Before submitting the label application, the manufacturer must internally verify whether their product or accompanying software has any publicly known vulnerabilities (e.g., listed in CVE databases) and truthfully reflect this in the declaration.
description_zh: 在提交标签申请前，制造商必须内部核查其产品或随附软件是否存在公开的已知漏洞（如CVE数据库中列出的漏洞），并在声明中如实反映。
notes_en: This requirement emphasizes the manufacturer's responsibility for active declaration; BSI only performs consistency checks and does not replace the manufacturer's vulnerability management process.
notes_zh: 此要求强调制造商的主动申报责任，BSI仅做一致性核对，不替代制造商的漏洞管理流程。

title_en: Self-Check for Known Vulnerabilities
title_zh: 已知漏洞自查义务
verification_method_en: BSI will internally check if the product or software provided by the manufacturer has known vulnerabilities. Manufacturers must retain internal vulnerability scan records for inspection.
verification_method_zh: BSI将在内部检查制造商提供的产品或软件是否存在已知漏洞。制造商需保留内部漏洞扫描记录以备查验。

description_en: The device must integrate or support the deployment of anti-virus engines and Intrusion Prevention Systems (IPS) capable of detecting and blocking known computer viruses, network attacks, and unauthorized intrusions. For Firewalls/UTMs and Security Gateways, this feature should be enabled by default or provide a one-click enablement wizard.
description_zh: 设备必须集成或支持部署防病毒引擎及入侵防御系统（IPS），能够检测并阻断已知的计算机病毒、网络攻击及非法侵入行为。对于防火墙/UTM及安全网关，该功能应默认启用或提供一键启用向导。
notes_en: Based on Article 23(2), technical measures to prevent computer viruses and network attacks must be taken.
notes_zh: 依据第二十三条第（二）款，需采取防范计算机病毒和网络攻击的技术措施。

title_en: Anti-virus and Intrusion Prevention
title_zh: 防病毒与入侵防御功能

The right of the provider of a strategically important service to terminate the contract pursuant to other legal regulation shall remain unaffected by the first sentence.

description_en: Article 3 Planning and application of ICT system protection measures shall be guided by the following principles: 1) Risk management principle – the selection and the level of application of measures shall be based on risk assessment, the need to prevent risk and eliminate consequences of the risk that has occurred, including all types of emergencies; 2) Comprehensive protection principle – measures shall apply to all organisational, physical and technical and technological levels, as well as during the entire life cycle of the ICT system; 3) Expertise and good practice principle – measures shall apply in accordance with expert and scientific knowledge and experience in the field of information security;
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：Article 3 Planning and application of ICT system protection measures shall be guided by the following principles: 1) Risk management principle – the selection and the level of application of measures shall be based on risk assessment, the need to prevent risk and eliminate consequences of the risk that has occurred, including all types of emergencies; 2) Comprehensive protection principle – measures shall apply to all organisational, physical and technical and technological levels, as well as during the entire life cycle of the ICT system; 3) Expertise and good practice principle – measures shall apply in accordance with expert and scientific knowledge and experience in the field of information security;

description_en: 6 \\ \\ CONTROLS CHAPTERS - IMPLEMENTATION AND CONTROL STAGES 6.1 INTRODUCTION The protection requirements from an organization are called professionally: controls. In order to protect the organization in the cyber field, the organization is required to implement controls in various fields. These controls include the processes, procedures, defense systems and technologies, which the organization has implemented to reduce the risk of the realization of a Cyberspace incident.

description_en: Must design, implement, document, monitor, and update an IT Management Framework. This framework must include policies, processes, and procedures related to the acquisition, maintenance, and implementation of IT systems, databases, and infrastructure, ensuring all internal IT tasks or processes are properly documented.
description_zh: 必须设计、实施、记录、监控和更新IT管理框架。该框架必须包含与IT系统、数据库和基础设施的获取、维护和实施相关的政策、流程和程序，并确保所有内部IT任务或过程均有适当文档记录。
notes_en: This is an organizational requirement but directly impacts the product's ability to support compliance. The product must provide sufficient documentation and support to help users meet this framework requirement.
notes_zh: 这是一项组织级要求，但直接影响产品的合规性支持能力。产品需提供足够的文档和支持以帮助用户满足此框架要求。

description_en: UNOFFICIAL ENGLISH TRANSLATION UNOFFICIAL ENGLISH TRANSLATION prevented by a statutory or state -recognised duty of confidentiality or the fulfilment of another statutory obligation. § 21 Alert (1) The Agency may, after consultation with the regulated service provider concerned, for reasons of protection of the security of the Czech Republic, internal order, life and health or property value, inform the public in the form of an alert about a cybersec urity incident or a breach of the obligations set out in this Act, or order the regulated service provider concerned to do so itself. (2) The Agency shall inform the public about a cybersecurity incident or a breach of the obligations laid down in this Act pursuant to paragraph 1 through its website and shall inform regulated service providers, where appropriate, through the NUKIB Portal.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：UNOFFICIAL ENGLISH TRANSLATION UNOFFICIAL ENGLISH TRANSLATION prevented by a statutory or state -recognised duty of confidentiality or the fulfilment of another statutory obligation. § 21 Alert (1) The Agency may, after consultation with the regulated service provider concerned, for reasons of protection of the security of the Czech Republic, internal order, life and health or property value, inform the public in the form of an alert about a cybersec urity incident or a breach of the obligations set out in this Act, or order the regulated service provider concerned to do so itself. (2) The Agency shall inform the public about a cybersecurity incident or a breach of the obligations laid down in this Act pursuant to paragraph 1 through its website and shall inform regulated service providers, where appropriate, through the NUKIB Portal.

description_en: Rights of the National Cybersecurity Centre The National Cybersecurity Centre shall have the following rights: 1) to request and receive information from the providers of essential services and important services on the information and communication technologies in their ownership and possession, on the cybersecurity and cyber risk management measures implemented and planned thereby and also on cyber incidents, near misses, cyber threats, and vulnerabilities; 2) to request and receive from the State and local government authorities information which is at their disposal on the providers of essential services and important services; 3) to provide instructions to ensure the fulfilment of the obligations specified in this Law for the providers of essential services and important services;

description_en: Where there is an imminent threat in the nature of a cyber-attack that may result to a computer and cybercrime to any Cybersecurity Operations Centre, the Director may upon request, inquire or provide the requisite technical or non-technical support to the Cybersecurity Operations Centre. (1) An owner of a critical information infrastructure shall, on an annual basis, conduct a cyber-risk assessment and business impact analysis for all relevant activities including products, services, business functions and processes. (2) Despite paragraph (1), every owner of critical information infrastructure shall undertake a risk assessment within twelve months from the date of commencement of these Regulations.

description_en: 2 National Cyber Security Centre The CAF - A tool for assessing cyber resilience The Cyber Assessment Framework (CAF) provides a systematic and comprehensive approach to assessing the extent to which cyber risks to essential function(s) are being managed by the organisation responsible. CAF-based assessments can be carried out either by the responsible organisation itself (self-assessment) or by an independent external entity, possibly a regulator / cyber oversight body or a suitably qualified organisation acting on behalf of a regulator, such as an NCSC assured commercial service provider. The NCSC CAF cyber security and resilience objective and principles provide the foundations of the CAF.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：2 National Cyber Security Centre The CAF - A tool for assessing cyber resilience The Cyber Assessment Framework (CAF) provides a systematic and comprehensive approach to assessing the extent to which cyber risks to essential function(s) are being managed by the organisation responsible. CAF-based assessments can be carried out either by the responsible organisation itself (self-assessment) or by an independent external entity, possibly a regulator / cyber oversight body or a suitably qualified organisation acting on behalf of a regulator, such as an NCSC assured commercial service provider. The NCSC CAF cyber security and resilience objective and principles provide the foundations of the CAF.

description_en: The device must support and enable by default the DSA algorithm compliant with FIPS PUB 186-4 (DSS, July 2013) when using digital signature functions. Use of unlisted or deprecated signature algorithms is prohibited.
description_zh: 设备在使用数字签名功能时，必须支持并默认启用符合 FIPS PUB 186-4 (DSS, July 2013) 标准的 DSA 算法。禁止使用未在此规范中列出的或已废弃的签名算法。
notes_en: This requirement is based on the approved public key signature functions under the JCMVP system. Only the DSA algorithm requirement explicitly listed in the text is extracted.
notes_zh: 此要求基于JCMVP制度下批准的公钥签名功能。仅提取了原文中明确列出的DSA算法要求。
regulation_name: Approved Security Functions
title_en: Compliant Digital Signature Algorithm
title_zh: 数字签名算法合规性
verification_method_en: Inspect the device configuration interface or API documentation to confirm that the list of supported signature algorithms includes DSA and verify that its implementation references the FIPS PUB 186-4 standard. Attempts to configure non-standard algorithms should be rejected or unavailable.
verification_method_zh: 检查设备配置界面或API文档，确认支持的签名算法列表中包含DSA，并验证其实现引用了FIPS PUB 186-4标准。尝试配置非标准算法应被拒绝或不可用。

description_en: For products with complex functions or large attack surfaces, implement defense-in-depth mechanisms. Define a threat model assuming unevaluated functions are compromised by default, and deploy self-protection security functions to ensure this compromise does not impact sensitive assets or the TOE host environment.
description_zh: 对于功能复杂或攻击面较大的产品，必须实施纵深防御机制。在安全目标中需定义一种威胁模型，假设未评估的功能默认已被攻陷，并部署自保护安全功能，确保该攻陷不会影响敏感资产或TOE宿主环境。
notes_en: Applicable to products containing unevaluated complex functions (e.g., analysis engines, detection engines).
notes_zh: 适用于包含未评估复杂功能（如分析引擎、检测引擎）的产品。

description_en: The device or software must support two different types of authentication factors (e.g., knowledge factor + possession factor) to meet the reasonable trust requirements of Level 2 in the Digital Trust Framework.

notes_en: Applicable to medium-risk scenarios. For enterprise-grade devices and security management platforms, it is recommended to enable this level by default or make it mandatory.
notes_zh: 适用于中等风险场景。对于企业级设备和安全管理平台，建议默认启用或强制要求此级别。

description_en: The device shall not use RSA key generation functionality conforming to FIPS 186-2. All RSA key generation must use updated, non-deprecated standards (e.g., FIPS 186-4 or later).
description_zh: 设备不得使用符合FIPS 186-2标准的RSA密钥生成功能。所有RSA密钥生成必须使用更新的、未被弃用的标准（如FIPS 186-4或更高版本）。
notes_en: This requirement applies to all security functions involving RSA key generation, including secure communication and trusted updates.
notes_zh: 此要求适用于所有涉及RSA密钥生成的安全功能，包括安全通信和可信更新。
regulation_name: Canada Common Criteria Program
title_en: Prohibit FIPS 186-2 RSA Key Generation
title_zh: 禁用FIPS 186-2 RSA密钥生成
verification_method_en: Inspect cryptographic module configuration and source code to confirm FIPS 186-2 compliant RSA key generation algorithms are not invoked; attempt key generation and verify metadata conforms to newer standards.
verification_method_zh: 检查密码模块配置和源代码，确认未调用FIPS 186-2兼容的RSA密钥生成算法；尝试生成密钥并验证其元数据是否符合新标准。

description_en: An explanation as regards how to configure the protection objectives of the organization and the level of protection required is presented in this document on page 20 for Category A organizations, and on pages 25-26 for Category B organizations. At this point, the organization must understand the controls required of the organization for its various assets. The final product in light of the work with this document is: The organization will understand what are the controls necessary to implement in order to reduce cyber risks to which the organization is exposed.

description_en: Recording of Domain Name Registration Service Providers and Requirements for a Domain Name Registration Database (1) A domain name registration service provider which conforms to the status of the domain name registration service provider and the decisions of which in relation to cybersecurity are taken in the Republic of Latvia or which has the highest number of employees in the Republic of Latvia shall notify the National Cybersecurity Centre thereof not later than within a month. The following shall be indicated in the notification: 1) the name of the person (a natural person - the given name, surname, and personal identity number), legal status, and form of economic activity, registration number, legal address, and other contact details (for example, official electronic address, electronic mail address, telephone number, website address); 4) the countries where the person provides services;

description_en: The factory default configuration of the product must meet the cybersecurity baseline requirements issued by EU ENISA, enable intrusion detection and malicious code protection functions by default, disable remote debugging interfaces and unauthorized firmware upload functions, and support users to export security configuration compliance reports with one click.

notes_en: Malicious code protection function for home routers is optional.

description_en: Section 10 (1) To ensure risk -proportionate protection for the electronic information systems of an entity and data processed in and services provided by them, the entity shall assign electronic information systems at the disposal of the entity that fall within the scope of this Act to ‘basic’, ‘substantial’ or ‘high’ security classes on the basis of the integrity and availability of the electronic information system concerned and the risk to the confidentiality, integrity and availability of data processed by the entity, with the protection requirements increasing in stringency according to classification. (2) The head of the entity shall decide on security classification and shall be respons ible for it being in compliance with the law and adequate to the risks as well as the completeness and timeliness of the data used. The entity shall record the outcome of security classification in the register of electronic information systems or another internal regulations.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：Section 10 (1) To ensure risk -proportionate protection for the electronic information systems of an entity and data processed in and services provided by them, the entity shall assign electronic information systems at the disposal of the entity that fall within the scope of this Act to ‘basic’, ‘substantial’ or ‘high’ security classes on the basis of the integrity and availability of the electronic information system concerned and the risk to the confidentiality, integrity and availability of data processed by the entity, with the protection requirements increasing in stringency according to classification. (2) The head of the entity shall decide on security classification and shall be respons ible for it being in compliance with the law and adequate to the risks as well as the completeness and timeliness of the data used. The entity shall record the outcome of security classification in the register of electronic information systems or another internal regulations.

description_en: If digital signature functions are used, the device must support and enable by default the DSA algorithm compliant with FIPS PUB 186-4 (DSS, July 2013). Other signature algorithms not listed in this specification are prohibited as primary security mechanisms.

notes_en: This requirement covers only the 'Public Key - Signature' part provided in the current window. Subsequent windows may contain requirements for other algorithms like RSA, ECDSA, etc., which need to be merged.
notes_zh: 此要求仅针对当前窗口提供的‘公开键-署名’部分。后续窗口可能包含RSA、ECDSA等其他算法要求，需合并处理。

description_en: The device must strictly prohibit the use of the CIPHERUNICORN-E algorithm for 64-bit block encryption. If supported, it must be disabled by default and non-enablable, or completely removed from the codebase.
description_zh: 设备在实现64位块加密功能时，严禁使用CIPHERUNICORN-E算法。若产品支持该算法，必须在配置中默认禁用且无法启用，或在代码层面彻底移除该实现。
notes_en: Under the JCMVP scheme, this algorithm is listed as a non-approved security function and must not be used in certified products.
notes_zh: 依据JCMVP制度，此算法被列为非承认安全功能，不得用于通过认证的产品中。
regulation_clause: Section 2, Common Key, <64-bit Block Cipher> Item 1
regulation_name: Limited Security Functions
title_en: Prohibit CIPHERUNICORN-E Algorithm
title_zh: 禁止使用CIPHERUNICORN-E算法
verification_method_en: Inspect cryptographic module source code or configuration manual to confirm CIPHERUNICORN-E is not implemented; attempting to enable it via API or CLI should return an error.
verification_method_zh: 检查密码模块源代码或配置手册，确认未包含CIPHERUNICORN-E算法实现；尝试通过API或CLI启用该算法应返回错误。

description_en: irements to an internal or an external service provider. Before making a strategic decision on outsourcing, the organisation should consider whether rements to an internal or an external service provider. To ensure ICT security when outsourcing, we recommend: 1) Obtain an overview and understanding of the entire service life cycle 2) Ensuring adequate procurement skills 3) Conducting adequate risk assessments in order to make the right decisions 4) Defining adequate and correct requirements for the ICT service and for the provider 5) Making the right decisions at the right level Anything that is not possible to resolve before outsourcing can be impossible to rectify once a contract is signed.

description_en: En tercer lugar, el Ministerio de Tecnologías de la Información y las Comunicaciones desarrollará e implementará una hoja de ruta correspondiente, para el desarrollo de iniciativas de promoción para la participación de las comunidades en condiciones especiales de vulnerabilidad, tales como los líderes sociales, en el fortalecimiento de capac idades en seguridad digital, bajo un enfoque diferencial e inclusivo. En esta hoja de ruta se deberá establecer la forma en la cual se institucionalizarán sus actividades para su desarrollo de manera permanente. En cuarto lugar, el Ministerio de Educación Nacional diseñará e implementará una estrategia para la creación de hábitos de uso seguro y responsable de las TIC que posibilite generar en la trayectoria educativa completa el desarrollo de competencias y la formación en seguridad y confianza digital.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：En tercer lugar, el Ministerio de Tecnologías de la Información y las Comunicaciones desarrollará e implementará una hoja de ruta correspondiente, para el desarrollo de iniciativas de promoción para la participación de las comunidades en condiciones especiales de vulnerabilidad, tales como los líderes sociales, en el fortalecimiento de capac idades en seguridad digital, bajo un enfoque diferencial e inclusivo. En esta hoja de ruta se deberá establecer la forma en la cual se institucionalizarán sus actividades para su desarrollo de manera permanente. En cuarto lugar, el Ministerio de Educación Nacional diseñará e implementará una estrategia para la creación de hábitos de uso seguro y responsable de las TIC que posibilite generar en la trayectoria educativa completa el desarrollo de competencias y la formación en seguridad y confianza digital.

description_en: The product sponsor (manufacturer) must explicitly commit to disclosing information about potential product vulnerabilities to the certification body during the application process. Refusal of this commitment results in application rejection.
description_zh: 产品赞助商（制造商）必须在申请过程中明确承诺，向认证中心披露产品的潜在漏洞信息。拒绝此承诺将导致申请被拒。
notes_en: This is a procedural mandatory requirement ensuring transparency during the evaluation period.
notes_zh: 此为流程性强制要求，确保评估期间的透明度。

description_en: Strict control over software and its integrity must be implemented in production environments to prevent unauthorized modifications. Software integrity verification mechanisms (such as hash checks or digital signatures) shall be provided.
description_zh: 在生产环境中，必须对软件及其完整性实施严格控制，防止未经授权的修改。应提供软件完整性校验机制（如哈希校验或数字签名）。
notes_en: Focus on firmware and core software components.
notes_zh: 重点针对固件和核心软件组件。
regulation_name: Argentina Minimum Information Security Requirements for Public Sector Bodies
title_en: Control software integrity in production
title_zh: 生产环境软件完整性控制
verification_method_en: Attempt to modify firmware or software files and verify that the system detects integrity violations and refuses to load or raises an alert.
verification_method_zh: 尝试修改固件或软件文件，验证系统是否能检测到完整性破坏并拒绝加载或发出警报。

description_en: Cybersecurity Act, 2020 42 Act 1038 (6) A service provider required to obtain an interception capability shall take the necessary steps to have the ability to decrypt a telecommunication message. (7) A service provider that is required to obtain an interception capability shall bear the cost of the installation or modification of the interception capability. (8) The requirement for the installation of an interception capability applies to a domestic service provider.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：Cybersecurity Act, 2020 42 Act 1038 (6) A service provider required to obtain an interception capability shall take the necessary steps to have the ability to decrypt a telecommunication message. (7) A service provider that is required to obtain an interception capability shall bear the cost of the installation or modification of the interception capability. (8) The requirement for the installation of an interception capability applies to a domestic service provider.

description_en: The product must support or provide documentation to assist the end-user (entity) in managing security-related aspects regarding relationships with direct suppliers or service providers. For software products, a Software Bill of Materials (SBOM) must be included to support supply chain transparency.
description_zh: 产品必须支持或提供文档说明，协助最终用户（实体）管理与直接供应商或服务提供商之间的安全相关方面。对于软件类产品，必须包含软件物料清单（SBOM）以支持供应链透明度。
notes_en: Based on § 6(4) regarding supply chain security, including security-related aspects of relationships with direct suppliers or service providers.
notes_zh: 基于§ 6(4)关于供应链安全的要求，包括与直接供应商或服务提供商关系的安全方面。

description_en: Article 50 (1) Any entity not classified as an essential and important entity pursuant to this Act may: – implement self -assessments regarding cybersecurity for any network and information system they use for their operations or for the provision of their services – notify the competent CSIRT on a voluntary basis regarding any significant incident, other incidents, cyber threats or avoided incidents, provided that they periodically implement self -assessments regarding cybersecurity referred to in subparagraph 1 of this paragraph. (2) The possibility of implementing self -assessments regarding cybersecurity and of voluntary notification referred to in paragraph 1 of this Article shall be regulated by the regulation referred to in Article 24 of this Act.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：Article 50 (1) Any entity not classified as an essential and important entity pursuant to this Act may: – implement self -assessments regarding cybersecurity for any network and information system they use for their operations or for the provision of their services – notify the competent CSIRT on a voluntary basis regarding any significant incident, other incidents, cyber threats or avoided incidents, provided that they periodically implement self -assessments regarding cybersecurity referred to in subparagraph 1 of this paragraph. (2) The possibility of implementing self -assessments regarding cybersecurity and of voluntary notification referred to in paragraph 1 of this Article shall be regulated by the regulation referred to in Article 24 of this Act.

description_en: Article 37 (1) Essential and important entities shall notify the competent CSIRT on any incident that has a significant impact on the availability, integrity, confidentiality and authenticity of data significant for the operation of the entity and/or the continuity of se rvices they provide or the activities they perform (hereinafter: significant incident). description_en: The Management Board, acting on a proposal from the Executive Director, shall set up a National Liaison Officers Network composed of representatives of all Member States (National Liaison Officers). Each Member State shall appoint one representative to the National Liaison Officers Network. The National Liaison Officers Network shall in particular facilitate the exchange of information between ENISA and the Member States, and shall support ENISA in disseminating its activities, findings and recommendations to the relevant stakeholders across the Union.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：The Management Board, acting on a proposal from the Executive Director, shall set up a National Liaison Officers Network composed of representatives of all Member States (National Liaison Officers). Each Member State shall appoint one representative to the National Liaison Officers Network. The National Liaison Officers Network shall in particular facilitate the exchange of information between ENISA and the Member States, and shall support ENISA in disseminating its activities, findings and recommendations to the relevant stakeholders across the Union.

description_en: The device must provide an asset inventory feature, exportable via API, including hardware serial numbers, firmware versions, network location identifiers, and owner information fields to support organizational asset tracking.
description_zh: 设备必须提供或通过API导出详细的资产清单功能，包括硬件序列号、固件版本、网络位置标识及所有者信息字段，以支持组织维护更新的资产库存。
notes_en: Home routers may simplify this requirement, providing only basic device identification information.
notes_zh: 家用路由器可简化此要求，仅需提供基本的设备标识信息。
regulation_name: Argentina Minimum Information Security Requirements for Public Sector Bodies
title_en: Asset Inventory and Maintenance
title_zh: 资产清单与维护
verification_method_en: Attempt to export asset information via SNMP, CLI, or Web Interface and verify that necessary fields such as serial number, version, and location are included.
verification_method_zh: 尝试通过SNMP、CLI或Web界面导出资产信息，验证是否包含序列号、版本和位置等必要字段。

description_en: The device must support remote diagnostic functions, allowing authorized personnel to inspect system errors, analyze security posture, and assess cyber threat impacts, including reading critical system configuration files and operational states.
description_zh: 设备必须支持远程诊断功能，允许授权人员检查系统错误、分析安全状况并评估网络威胁影响，包括读取关键系统配置文件和运行状态。
notes_en: Diagnostic functions should be limited to security-related parameters and must not expose irrelevant user privacy data.
notes_zh: 诊断功能应仅限于安全相关的参数，不得暴露无关的用户隐私数据。
regulation_name: Thailand Cybersecurity Act B.E. 2562 (2019)
title_en: Support Remote Security Diagnosis
title_zh: 支持远程安全诊断与评估
verification_method_en: Test whether authorized users can execute system health checks and threat impact assessment commands via secure channels and obtain detailed reports.
verification_method_zh: 测试授权用户能否通过安全通道执行系统健康检查和威胁影响评估命令，并获取详细报告。

description_en: Manufacturers must establish and maintain a supply chain security management system to ensure traceability of product components, prevent the insertion of malicious components, and provide a supply chain security assurance statement to end-users.
description_zh: 制造商必须建立并维护供应链安全管理体系，确保产品组件来源可追溯，防止恶意组件植入，并向最终用户提供供应链安全保证声明。
notes_en: Based on Article 7, the State will take measures to guarantee supply chain integrity to build user trust.
notes_zh: 依据第7条，国家将采取措施保证供应链完整性以建立用户信任。

title_en: Ensure Supply Chain Integrity
title_zh: 确保供应链完整性
verification_method_en: Review supplier audit reports, component traceability records, and published supply chain security declaration documents.
verification_method_zh: 审查供应商审计报告、组件溯源记录及发布的供应链安全声明文件。

description_en: When the product falls under cybersecurity review scope, the vendor must provide technical appendices of procurement documents, product architecture descriptions, and data security commitment letters within the specified timeframe to support the applicant's submission.
description_zh: 当产品被纳入网络安全审查范围时，供应商必须能够在规定时间内提供审查所需的采购文件技术附件、产品架构说明书及数据安全承诺书，以支持当事人完成申报。
notes_en: According to Article 8, applicants must submit various materials; vendor engineering cooperation capability is a key link in compliance.
notes_zh: 依据第八条，当事人申报需提交多项材料，供应商的工程配合能力是合规的关键环节。

title_en: Source clause - Security Governance and Product Requirements requirement
title_zh: 原文条款 - 安全治理与产品要求要求

description_en: After the product is officially launched, the manufacturer must provide at least 5 years of free security patch support; patches must pass compatibility testing before release, and shall not affect the core functions of the product; when patches are released, vulnerability number, impact scope, and repair measures shall be publicly disclosed simultaneously, and patches shall not contain undeclared functional code.
description_zh: 产品正式上市后，厂商必须提供至少5年的免费安全补丁支持；补丁发布前必须经过兼容性测试，不得影响产品核心功能；补丁发布时需同步公开披露漏洞编号、影响范围、修复措施，补丁不得包含未声明的功能代码。
notes_en: The patch support period for consumer-grade home products can be relaxed to 3 years.
notes_zh: 消费级家用产品补丁支持年限可放宽至3年。
regulation_name: Directive (EU) 2022/2555 of the European Parliament and of the Council on measures for a high common level of cybersecurity across the Union, amending Regulation (EU) No 910/2014 and repealing Directive (EU) 2016/1148 (NIS 2 Directive)
title_en: 5-year Security Patch Support
title_zh: 5年安全补丁支持
verification_method_en: Check the manufacturer's public product lifecycle support document to confirm the patch support period; spot check whether the compatibility test reports and release notes of security patches released in the past 12 months meet the requirements.
verification_method_zh: 检查厂商公开的产品生命周期支持文档，确认补丁支持年限；抽测近12个月发布的安全补丁的兼容性测试报告、发布说明是否符合要求。

description_en: The product must record all administrator operations, identity authentication events, access control policy changes, and security configuration modification logs. Logs shall be retained for at least 6 months, cannot be tampered with or manually deleted. Each log must contain 4 core fields: operator ID, operation time, operation content, and source IP address.
description_zh: 产品必须记录所有管理员操作、身份认证事件、访问控制策略变更、安全配置修改日志，日志至少留存6个月，不可被篡改、手动删除，每条日志必须包含操作主体ID、操作时间、操作内容、源IP地址4个核心字段。
notes_en: The log retention period for home routers can be relaxed to 3 months.
notes_zh: 家用路由器日志留存时长可放宽至3个月。
regulation_name: Directive (EU) 2022/2555 of the European Parliament and of the Council on measures for a high common level of cybersecurity across the Union, amending Regulation (EU) No 910/2014 and repealing Directive (EU) 2016/1148 (NIS 2 Directive)
title_en: Tamper-proof Operation Log
title_zh: 操作日志不可篡改
verification_method_en: Check whether logs are completely recorded after performing administrator operations; try to modify and delete logs to verify whether they are intercepted; check whether the log storage validity period configuration meets the 6-month requirement.
verification_method_zh: 执行管理员操作后检查日志是否完整记录；尝试修改、删除日志验证是否被拦截；检查日志存储有效期配置是否满足6个月要求。

description_en: For many, the conclusion is to outsource all or parts of their service portfolio to one or more providers. Outsourcing in this context means that the organisation decides to procure services from an external provider instead of providing them in - house. The difference is whether one is specifying security requirements to an internal or an external service provider.

The difference is whether one is specifying security requirements to an internal or an external service provider.

regulation_name: Serbia Law on Information Security 2025
title_en: Article 1 > Article 2 - Compliance Certification and Assessment requirement
title_zh: Article 1 > Article 2 - 合规认证与评估要求
verification_method_en: Verify certificates, assessment reports, scope, lab competence, and official registry or notice records.

description_en: Enterprise routers, home routers, switches, firewalls/UTMs, wireless APs, industrial gateways, SD-WAN devices, security gateways, cloud desktops, and software must undergo conformity assessment under the Polish National Cybersecurity Certification System or applicable European cybersecurity certification schemes and obtain corresponding certification before market release.
description_zh: 企业级路由器、家用路由器、网络交换机、防火墙/UTM、无线AP、工业网关、SD-WAN、网络安全网关、云桌面及软件等产品，必须依据波兰国家网络安全认证体系或适用的欧洲网络安全认证计划进行合格评定，并获得相应认证证书后方可上市销售。
notes_en: According to Art. 3(2)(4), suppliers must submit their ICT products for conformity assessment. This is a prerequisite for market access.
notes_zh: 根据Art. 3(2)(4)，供应商必须将其ICT产品提交给合格评定机构进行评估。这是市场准入的前置条件。
regulation_name: Poland Act on National Cybersecurity Certification System 2025
title_en: Product must undergo national cybersecurity certification
title_zh: 产品需通过国家网络安全认证
verification_method_en: Verify that the product holds a valid Polish National Cybersecurity Certification or EU Cybersecurity Certification, and confirm that the certificate covers the specific product model and version.
verification_method_zh: 检查产品是否持有有效的波兰国家网络安全认证证书或欧盟网络安全认证证书，并验证证书覆盖的产品型号和版本。

description_en: The manufacturer must establish a process to remediate vulnerabilities notified by ANATEL that affect user or telecommunications network security within a specified deadline. Remediation priority shall be determined based on severity assessed via the Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS).
description_zh: 制造商必须建立流程，在收到ANATEL关于影响用户或电信网络安全的漏洞通知后，在规定期限内进行修复。修复优先级应基于CVSS评分系统评估的严重程度确定。
notes_en: Failure to remediate within the deadline without justified reason may result in suspension or cancellation of product certification by ANATEL.
notes_zh: 若未在期限内修复且无正当理由，ANATEL可暂停或取消产品认证。
regulation_name: ANATEL Ato 77 Cybersecurity Requirements for Telecommunications Equipment
title_en: Vulnerability Remediation Response Mechanism
title_zh: 漏洞修复响应机制
verification_method_en: Review vulnerability management procedure documentation to confirm inclusion of CVSS-based severity assessment processes and response SLAs for regulatory notifications.
verification_method_zh: 审查漏洞管理程序文档，确认包含基于CVSS的严重性评估流程和针对监管机构通知的响应SLA。

description_en: JUNE, 2023 care and in good faith and for the purpose of complying with a notice issued under subsection ( 1). (5) If a material change is made by or on behalf of the owner of a critical information infrastructure to the design, configuration, security or operation of the critical information infrastructure after any information has been furnished to the Commissioner pursuant to a notice issued under subsection ( 1), the owner of the critical information infrastructure shall notify the Commissioner of the change not later than 30 days after the change is made. (7) Any owner of a critical information infrastructure who fails, without reasonable excuse, to comply with subsection (5) is guilty of an offence and liable on conviction to a fine not exceeding $25,000, imprisonment for a term not exceeding 12 months or both.

(7) Any owner of a critical information infrastructure who fails, without reasonable excuse, to comply with subsection (5) is guilty of an offence and liable on conviction to a fine not exceeding $25,000, imprisonment for a term not exceeding 12 months or both.

description_en: If ECDSA is used for digital signatures, it must comply with ANS X9.62-2005, FIPS PUB 186-4, or SEC 1 (v2.0). The elliptic curve order must be >= 224 bits, and the hash function output length must be >= 224 bits.
description_zh: 若使用ECDSA进行数字签名，必须遵循ANS X9.62-2005、FIPS PUB 186-4或SEC 1 (v2.0)标准。椭圆曲线的阶必须大于等于224位，且使用的哈希函数输出长度必须大于等于224位。
notes_en: Applicable only if the product supports ECDSA signatures.
notes_zh: 仅当产品支持ECDSA签名时适用。

verification_method_zh: 检查产品密码模块实现文档，确认ECDSA曲线阶数和哈希算法输出长度符合上述要求。

description_en: The device must provide standardized security status query interfaces or report generation functions to support operators in conducting annual network security detection and risk assessment, and export security configuration baseline check results compliant with regulatory requirements.
description_zh: 设备必须提供标准化的安全状态查询接口或报告生成功能，支持运营者每年至少进行一次网络安全检测和风险评估，并能导出符合监管要求的安全配置基线检查结果。
notes_en: This requirement aims to assist operators in fulfilling the annual inspection obligation stipulated in Article 39(8).
notes_zh: 此要求旨在协助运营者履行第三十九条第八款规定的年度检测义务。
regulation_name: 关键信息基础设施安全保护条例
title_en: Support Annual Security Assessment
title_zh: 支持年度安全检测接口
verification_method_en: Verify if the device has the function to generate security audit reports and check if the report content includes the status of key security configuration items.
verification_method_zh: 检查设备是否具备生成安全审计报告的功能，并验证报告内容是否包含关键安全配置项的状态。

description_en: Article 26 (1) Essential and important entities shall implement appropriate and proportionate measures of cybersecurity risk management. (2) Cybersecurity risk-management measures shall be based on an all -hazards approach that aims to protect network and information systems and the physical environment of those systems from incidents. (4) Essential and important entities shall implement cybersecurity risk - management measures regardless of whether they manage and/or maintain their network and information systems themselves or outsource the management and maintenance thereof.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：Article 26 (1) Essential and important entities shall implement appropriate and proportionate measures of cybersecurity risk management. (2) Cybersecurity risk-management measures shall be based on an all -hazards approach that aims to protect network and information systems and the physical environment of those systems from incidents. (4) Essential and important entities shall implement cybersecurity risk - management measures regardless of whether they manage and/or maintain their network and information systems themselves or outsource the management and maintenance thereof.

description_en: The provider must establish an automated or semi-automated vulnerability verification process. Upon discovering or being notified of a security vulnerability, the system shall support immediate triggering of verification tasks and generate an assessment report including severity (e.g., CVSS score) and scope (affected modules/versions).
description_zh: 产品提供者必须建立自动化或半自动化的漏洞验证流程。在发现或获知产品存在安全漏洞后，系统应支持立即触发验证任务，并生成包含危害程度（如CVSS评分）和影响范围（受影响模块/版本）的评估报告。
notes_en: Must include notification mechanisms for upstream component vulnerabilities; if an upstream component vulnerability is detected, there must be an interface or process to notify the upstream supplier.
notes_zh: 需涵盖上游组件漏洞的通知机制，若检测到上游组件漏洞，需有接口或流程通知上游供应商。
regulation_name: Regulations on the Security Vulnerability Management of Network Products
title_en: Establish Vulnerability Verification Process
title_zh: 建立漏洞验证与评估机制
verification_method_en: Review vulnerability management procedure documents; simulate injecting a test vulnerability to verify if the system initiates the verification process within the specified time and outputs an assessment report.
verification_method_zh: 审查漏洞管理程序文档；模拟注入一个测试漏洞，验证系统是否能在规定时间内启动验证流程并输出评估报告。

description_en: Section 11 (1) The head of the entity shall designate a person responsible for electronic information system security within the entity, or enter into an agreement with a person outside the entity, for the purpose of performing tasks relating to the protection of the electronic information system, operating the risk management framework, reporting cybersecurity incidents and communicating with the cybersecurity incident handling centre. (2) For entities referred to in section 1 (1) a) to c) and f), the mandatory content of an agreement under paragraph (1) shall be set out in a government decree. The natural person who performs the tasks of the person responsible for electronic i nformation system security shall be specified, even if an agreement is concluded.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：Section 11 (1) The head of the entity shall designate a person responsible for electronic information system security within the entity, or enter into an agreement with a person outside the entity, for the purpose of performing tasks relating to the protection of the electronic information system, operating the risk management framework, reporting cybersecurity incidents and communicating with the cybersecurity incident handling centre. (2) For entities referred to in section 1 (1) a) to c) and f), the mandatory content of an agreement under paragraph (1) shall be set out in a government decree. The natural person who performs the tasks of the person responsible for electronic i nformation system security shall be specified, even if an agreement is concluded.

regulation_name: Hungary Act LXIX of 2024 on Cybersecurity
title_en: Chapter II > Section 11 (1) The head of the entity shall designate a person responsible for electronic - Incident Reporting and Response requirement
title_zh: Chapter II > Section 11 (1) The head of the entity shall designate a person responsible for electronic - 事件报告与响应要求
verification_method_en: Review incident reporting procedures, deadlines, notification templates, and exercise or response records.
verification_method_zh: 检查事件报告流程、时限要求、通知模板和演练/真实处置记录。

description_en: When triggering a security incident report, the system must be able to generate and export an information package containing at least the following fields: incident description, classification, impact assessment, affected data types, immediate response measures taken, and Indicators of Compromise (IoCs) or operational details.
description_zh: 当触发安全事件上报时，系统必须能够生成并导出包含以下最小字段的信息包：事件描述、事件分类、影响评估、受影响数据类型、已采取的即时响应措施、以及妥协指标（IoCs）或操作细节。
notes_en: Primarily applicable to enterprise-grade devices and management software with log analysis and incident management capabilities. Home routers may indirectly comply via log export.
notes_zh: 主要适用于具备日志分析和事件管理功能的企业级设备和管理软件。家用路由器可通过日志导出间接满足。
regulation_name: Peru Digital Trust Framework Regulation Supreme Decree No. 126-2025-PCM
title_en: Minimum Data Set for Incident Notification
title_zh: 事件通知最小数据集
verification_method_en: Simulate a security incident trigger and inspect the generated report file or API output to confirm it contains all minimum data fields required by regulation.
verification_method_zh: 模拟安全事件触发，检查系统生成的报告文件或API输出，确认是否包含法规要求的所有最小数据字段。

description_en: The device must support the ability for each user to change their username and password independently.
description_zh: 设备必须支持每个用户独立修改其用户名和密码的功能，不得限制仅管理员可修改或禁止修改默认凭证。
notes_en: Aims to eliminate hardcoded credential risks and ensure user control over credentials.
notes_zh: 旨在消除硬编码凭证风险，确保用户拥有凭证控制权。
regulation_name: Egypt NTRA Internet of Things Regulatory Framework
title_en: Support Username and Password Change
title_zh: 支持用户修改用户名密码
verification_method_en: Attempt to log in as a regular user and modify the username and password to verify successful execution and effect.
verification_method_zh: 尝试以普通用户身份登录并修改用户名和密码，验证操作是否成功且生效。

description_en: If unique default passwords are derived from product unique identifiers (e.g., serial numbers), industry-accepted encryption methods or keyed hashing algorithms must be used. Direct use of plaintext serial numbers is prohibited.
description_zh: 若采用基于产品唯一标识符（如序列号）生成唯一默认密码的方案，必须使用行业公认的加密方法或密钥哈希算法进行派生。禁止直接使用明文序列号或简单变换作为密码。
notes_en: Aims to prevent reverse engineering of default passwords from public information.
notes_zh: 旨在防止通过公开信息逆向推导默认密码。
regulation_name: Cyber Security (Security Standards for Smart Devices) Rules 2025
title_en: Algorithm for Unique Password Generation
title_zh: 唯一密码生成算法要求
verification_method_en: Review password generation code or algorithm documentation to confirm the use of standard encryption/hashing algorithms (e.g., AES, HMAC-SHA256) instead of simple string concatenation.
verification_method_zh: 审查密码生成代码或算法文档，确认使用了AES、HMAC-SHA256等标准加密/哈希算法，而非简单字符串拼接。

description_en: principle 2.2 – Establish a secure ICT architecture, as well as unit testing, integration testing, system testing, acceptance testing, pilot testing, Perform penetration tests (principle 3.4) and stress testing. b) Check that only permitted actions are allowed and perform spot checks to ensure that other actions are denied. 2.1.8 Maintain the software code developed/used by the organisation.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：principle 2.2 – Establish a secure ICT architecture, as well as unit testing, integration testing, system testing, acceptance testing, pilot testing, Perform penetration tests (principle 3.4) and stress testing. b) Check that only permitted actions are allowed and perform spot checks to ensure that other actions are denied. 2.1.8 Maintain the software code developed/used by the organisation.

description_en: Article 41 herein shall obtain licenses for business in network information security products and service that are granted by competent state bodies. The term of a license for business in network information security products and services shall be valid for 10 years. Trading in network information security products and services shall comply with this Law and others relevant laws.

The term of a license for business in network information security products and services shall be valid for 10 years. Trading in network information security products and services shall comply with this Law and others relevant laws.

regulation_name: Vietnam Law on Network Information Security No. 86/2015/QH13
title_en: Article 41 - Security Governance and Product Requirements requirement
title_zh: Article 41 - 安全治理与产品要求要求
verification_method_en: Verify governance documents, product design evidence, test reports, and clause-level conformity statements.
verification_method_zh: 核验制度文件、产品设计证据、测试报告和与原文条款对应的符合性说明。

description_en: The device shall not use identical initial configuration access credentials and passwords across all produced units. Initial credentials must be unique per device or randomly generated.
description_zh: 设备不得在所有生产批次中使用相同的初始配置访问凭证和密码。每个设备的初始凭证必须是唯一的或随机生成的。
notes_en: Applies to all devices requiring configuration access.
notes_zh: 适用于所有需要配置访问的设备。
regulation_name: ANATEL Ato 77 Cybersecurity Requirements for Telecommunications Equipment
title_en: Prohibit Uniform Default Credentials
title_zh: 禁止使用统一默认凭证
verification_method_en: Test at least 3 units of the same model to verify that default login credentials are unique, or verify the existence of a mandatory password change mechanism with no universal default password.
verification_method_zh: 抽取至少3台同型号设备进行测试，验证其默认登录凭证是否各不相同，或验证是否存在强制修改默认密码的机制且无通用默认密码。

description_en: The device must provide necessary interfaces, documentation, and access rights to support compatibility assessment (audit) of internal information security rules against minimum security standards by the Data Exchange Agency or its authorized bodies.
description_zh: 设备必须提供必要的接口、文档和访问权限，以支持数据交换局或其授权机构依据最低安全标准对内部信息安全规则进行兼容性评估（审计）。
notes_en: This requirement mainly applies to enterprise-grade devices used by critical information system subjects. Requirements identified in the post-audit report must be fulfilled.
notes_zh: 此要求主要针对关键信息系统主体使用的企业级设备。审计后生成的报告中的要求必须被执行。
regulation_name: Georgia Law on Information Security
title_en: Support Information Security Audit
title_zh: 支持信息安全审计
verification_method_en: Verify if the product has an audit mode or read-only access interface, and validate if security policy configurations can be exported for analysis by third-party audit tools.
verification_method_zh: 检查产品是否具备审计模式或只读访问接口，并验证是否能导出安全策略配置以供第三方审计工具分析。

description_en: Manufacturers must identify and document vulnerabilities and components, including an SBOM in a commonly used machine-readable format covering at least top-level dependencies.
description_zh: 制造商必须识别并记录产品中的漏洞和组件，并以通用、机器可读格式形成至少覆盖顶层依赖的软件物料清单。
notes_en: Rule-level draft generated conservatively from source chunks; refine with official test procedures or harmonised standards.
notes_zh: 规则级规格草案，由原文切片保守生成；后续应结合官方测试程序或协调标准细化测试项。
regulation_name: Regulation (EU) 2024/2847 of the European Parliament and of the Council on horizontal cybersecurity requirements for products with digital elements (Cyber Resilience Act)
title_en: SBOM and vulnerability records
title_zh: SBOM与漏洞文档
verification_method_en: Review component inventories, SBOM format, dependency coverage, vulnerability registers, and version traceability records.
verification_method_zh: 检查组件清单、SBOM 格式、依赖覆盖范围、漏洞登记和版本追踪记录。

description_en: When implementing pairwise key establishment schemes per NIST SP 800-56B, key confirmation mechanisms based on KMAC are prohibited.
description_zh: 在实施NIST SP 800-56B规定的成对密钥建立方案时，禁止使用基于KMAC的密钥确认机制。
notes_en: Applies only to scenarios using integer factorization cryptography for pairwise key establishment.
notes_zh: 仅适用于使用整数分解密码术进行成对密钥建立的场景。
regulation_name: Approved Security Functions
title_en: Key Confirmation Mechanism Restriction
title_zh: 密钥确认机制限制
verification_method_en: Review the implementation code or configuration of the key agreement protocol to ensure that the KMAC algorithm is not invoked during the key confirmation step.
verification_method_zh: 审查密钥协商协议的实现代码或配置，确保在密钥确认步骤中未调用KMAC算法。

description_en: The device must provide configurable security policy mechanisms that allow administrators to adjust security controls (e.g., enabling/disabling specific services, adjusting timeout periods) based on risk profiles, supporting the implementation of a consistent risk-based cyber security approach.

notes_en: This is a high-level requirement, translated into product specifications as 'configurability' and 'policy flexibility', ensuring the product can integrate into the customer's overall risk management framework.
notes_zh: 这是一个高阶要求，转化为产品规格时体现为‘可配置性’和‘策略灵活性’，确保产品能融入客户的整体风险管理框架。

description_zh: 产品包装或本体必须附带一个QR码，该QR码必须指向一个消费者友好的注册表，提供关于获批使用Cyber Trust Mark产品的额外安全信息。
notes_en: The registry is maintained by the Commission and must provide additional information about the security of the products.
notes_zh: 注册表由委员会维护，需提供额外的产品安全信息。
regulation_name: Cyber Trust Mark Program Final Rule
title_en: QR code links to consumer registry
title_zh: QR码链接至消费者注册表
verification_method_en: Scan the QR code on the product to verify it correctly redirects to the designated consumer registry page and displays detailed security information for that product.
verification_method_zh: 扫描产品上的QR码，验证其是否能正确跳转至指定的消费者注册表页面，并显示该产品的安全详细信息。

description_en: The product's management traffic, user identity data, and sensitive business data transmission must use TLS 1.2 or above encryption protocols, disable weak encryption protocols such as SSL 3.0, TLS 1.0, TLS 1.1; encryption algorithms shall use EU-recognized AES-256, RSA-2048 and above strength algorithms.
description_zh: 产品的管理流量、用户身份数据、敏感业务数据传输必须使用TLS 1.2及以上版本加密协议，禁用SSL 3.0、TLS 1.0、TLS 1.1等弱加密协议；加密算法需使用欧盟认可的AES-256、RSA-2048及以上强度算法。
notes_en: Scenarios where industrial gateways involve legacy device communication can temporarily enable weak protocols, but need to report to the regulator separately.
notes_zh: 工业网关涉及 legacy 设备通信的场景可临时启用弱协议，但需单独向监管机构报备。
regulation_name: Directive (EU) 2022/2555 of the European Parliament and of the Council on measures for a high common level of cybersecurity across the Union, amending Regulation (EU) No 910/2014 and repealing Directive (EU) 2016/1148 (NIS 2 Directive)
title_en: Mandatory Transmission Encryption
title_zh: 传输数据强制加密
verification_method_en: Capture packets to detect the encryption protocol version and algorithm strength of product management and business traffic; try to connect to the product using TLS 1.1 and below protocols to verify whether it is rejected.
verification_method_zh: 抓包检测产品管理和业务流量的加密协议版本、算法强度；尝试使用TLS 1.1及以下版本协议连接产品验证是否被拒绝。

description_en: [RT I, 30.12.2025, 4 – entry into force 01.01.2026] (43) At the request of the Estonian Information System Authority, a service provider submits, before submitting the final report specified in subsection 7 of this section, an interim report on the status of responding to the cyber incident with a significant impact. The interim report is to contain the data prescribed in the incident notification and, where relevant, additional information requested by the Estonian Information System Authority. [RT I, 30.12.2025, 4 – entry into force 01.01.2026] (5) Where relevant, a service provider is required to inform, within a reasonable time, a person who may be affected by a cyber incident with a significant impact or by a significant cyber threat, or the public if the affected persons cannot be informed individually.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：[RT I, 30.12.2025, 4 – entry into force 01.01.2026] (43) At the request of the Estonian Information System Authority, a service provider submits, before submitting the final report specified in subsection 7 of this section, an interim report on the status of responding to the cyber incident with a significant impact. The interim report is to contain the data prescribed in the incident notification and, where relevant, additional information requested by the Estonian Information System Authority. [RT I, 30.12.2025, 4 – entry into force 01.01.2026] (5) Where relevant, a service provider is required to inform, within a reasonable time, a person who may be affected by a cyber incident with a significant impact or by a significant cyber threat, or the public if the affected persons cannot be informed individually.

description_en: The device must strictly prohibit the use of the CIPHERUNICORN-E algorithm for 64-bit block encryption. If supported, it must be disabled by default and non-enablable, or completely removed from the codebase.
description_zh: 设备在实现64位块加密功能时，严禁使用CIPHERUNICORN-E算法。若产品支持该算法，必须在配置中默认禁用且无法启用，或在代码层面彻底移除该算法实现。
notes_en: This algorithm is listed as a non-approved security function under the JCMVP framework.
notes_zh: 该算法被列为非承认安全功能，属于JCMVP制度下的限制对象。
regulation_clause: Section 2, Common Key, <64-bit Block Cipher> Item 1
regulation_name: Limited Security Functions
title_en: Prohibit CIPHERUNICON-E Algorithm
title_zh: 禁止使用CIPHERUNICORN-E算法
verification_method_en: Inspect source code or configuration manuals to confirm absence of CIPHERUNICORN-E implementation; or attempt to invoke the algorithm interface via black-box testing to verify rejection.
verification_method_zh: 检查产品密码模块源代码或配置手册，确认未包含CIPHERUNICORN-E算法实现；或通过黑盒测试尝试调用该算法接口，验证是否返回错误或被拒绝。

The Customer Data shall be made available to the Licensee without undue delay, continuously and in real-time.

description_en: The device must support firewall deployment for network segmentation. For web application traffic, it must support Web Application Firewall (WAF) to filter and monitor HTTP traffic, and support Access Control Lists (ACLs) to limit unauthorized system access between network segments.
description_zh: 设备必须支持部署防火墙功能以实现网络分段，对于Web应用相关流量，必须支持Web应用防火墙(WAF)以过滤和监控HTTP流量，并支持使用访问控制列表(ACL)限制网段间的未授权系统访问。
notes_en: This requirement primarily targets network devices with boundary protection or traffic scrubbing capabilities. Home routers typically lack WAF functions but should have basic firewall/ACL capabilities.
notes_zh: 此要求主要针对具备边界防护或流量清洗能力的网络设备。家用路由器通常不具备WAF功能，但应具备基本防火墙/ACL能力。
regulation_name: Bahrain CBB Insurance Rulebook Cyber Security Risk Management
title_en: Deploy Firewalls and WAF
title_zh: 部署防火墙与WAF
verification_method_en: Verify if the device configuration interface supports creating firewall rules and ACL policies. For web gateway products, verify the presence of WAF signature databases and HTTP traffic filtering capabilities.
verification_method_zh: 检查设备配置界面是否支持创建防火墙规则、ACL策略；若为Web网关类产品，验证是否具备WAF特征库及HTTP流量过滤功能。

description_en: The device or software must provide a standardized security event logging interface that supports exporting critical security events (e.g., unauthorized access, configuration changes, system failures) to a central log server, enabling the organization to report incidents within the protocols, channels, and timelines established by CNSD.
description_zh: 设备或软件必须提供标准化的安全事件日志接口，支持将关键安全事件（如未授权访问、配置变更、系统故障）导出至中央日志服务器，以便组织能够按照CNSD规定的协议、渠道和时限进行事件上报。
notes_en: This requirement focuses on the technical capability of the device to support compliant reporting; the actual reporting process is executed by the operating organization.
notes_zh: 此要求侧重于设备具备支持合规上报的技术能力，具体上报流程由运营组织执行。

verification_method_en: Verify if the device supports standard protocols such as Syslog, SNMP Trap, or API for exporting security event logs; validate that log entries contain necessary fields like timestamp, event type, and source IP to support compliant reporting.
verification_method_zh: 检查设备是否支持Syslog、SNMP Trap或API等标准协议输出安全事件日志；验证日志内容是否包含时间戳、事件类型、源IP等必要字段以支持合规上报。

description_en: When deployed in Public Administration or Critical Infrastructure Operator environments, the product must provide configurable technical and organizational measures to manage risks to network and information system security, ensuring the security level is appropriate to the risk and current technical progress.
description_zh: 当产品部署于公共行政部门或关键基础设施运营商环境时，必须提供可配置的技术和组织措施，以管理与网络和信息系统安全相关的风险，并确保安全级别与当前技术进展相适应。
notes_en: Although the regulation directly binds operators, as a vendor, the product must have the capability to support operators in fulfilling this obligation (i.e., providing corresponding security functions and configuration options).
notes_zh: 虽然法规直接约束的是运营者，但作为供应商，产品必须具备支持运营者履行该义务的能力（即提供相应的安全功能和配置选项）。
regulation_name: Portugal Law No. 46/2018 Cyberspace Security Legal Regime
title_en: Risk-Based Security Measures
title_zh: 基于风险的安全措施
verification_method_en: Verify if the product provides configuration guides or functional modules for high-risk environments (e.g., enhanced access control, redundancy mechanisms) and validate that these functions comply with the latest security technical standards.
verification_method_zh: 检查产品是否提供针对高风险环境的配置指南或功能模块（如增强型访问控制、冗余机制），并验证这些功能是否符合最新的安全技术标准。

description_en: The product must support security assessments and penetration tests executed by independent third parties. The vendor shall provide necessary technical interfaces or test environments to allow third-party testing of the technological platform based on scope and frequency defined by risk analysis.
description_zh: 产品必须支持由独立第三方执行的安全评估和渗透测试。供应商需提供必要的技术接口或测试环境，以便第三方根据风险分析确定的范围和频率对技术平台进行测试。
notes_en: Regulations require supervised institutions to define the frequency and scope of assessments based on risk profiles. For network devices, this typically implies regular external red-teaming or vulnerability scanning.
notes_zh: 法规要求受监管机构基于风险概况定义评估的频率和范围。对于网络设备，这通常意味着需要定期接受外部红队测试或漏洞扫描。
regulation_name: Honduras CNBS IT, Cybersecurity and Business Continuity Management Rules 2022
title_en: Third-party Security Assessment and Penetration Testing
title_zh: 第三方安全评估与渗透测试
verification_method_en: Review existence of third-party penetration test reports, or check product documentation for descriptions supporting external security audits and penetration testing interfaces.
verification_method_zh: 审查是否具备第三方渗透测试报告，或检查产品文档中关于支持外部安全审计和渗透测试接口的描述。

description_en: Product must claim conformance to a collaborative Protection Profile (cPP), CSA National Protection Profile, or CSA-endorsed Protection Profile for SCCS evaluation. ST-only evaluations require case-by-case approval.
description_zh: 产品在申请SCCS评估时，必须声明符合协作保护轮廓（cPP）、CSA发布的国家保护轮廓或CSA认可的保护轮廓。若仅基于安全目标（ST）进行评估，需个案审批。
notes_en: Although 'preferably' is used, conformance to PP is the standard path for mutual recognition and evaluation. Non-PP conformance requires contacting CSA for guidance.
notes_zh: 虽然法规使用'preferably'（优先），但在实际准入中，符合PP是获得互认和通过评估的标准路径。非PP符合性需联系CSA获取指导。

title_en: Conform to Protection Profile
title_zh: 符合保护轮廓要求

verification_method_zh: 检查产品提交给CSA的安全目标（ST）文档，确认其中明确声明了符合特定的保护轮廓（PP）。

description_en: The device must support and enable by default the DSA algorithm compliant with FIPS PUB 186-4 (DSS, July 2013) when using digital signature functions. Other signature algorithms not listed in this specification are prohibited as primary security mechanisms.
description_zh: 设备在使用数字签名功能时，必须支持并默认启用符合 FIPS PUB 186-4 (DSS, July 2013) 标准的 DSA 算法。禁止使用未在此规范中列出的其他签名算法作为主要安全机制。
notes_en: This requirement is based on the JCMVP approved security functions list. Although only DSA is listed in the excerpt, engineering implementation must ensure the library version supports this specific standard version.
notes_zh: 此要求基于JCMVP制度下的批准安全功能列表。虽然原文仅列出DSA，但工程实施时需确保库版本支持该特定标准版本。
regulation_name: Approved Security Functions
title_en: Compliant Digital Signature Algorithm
title_zh: 数字签名算法合规性
verification_method_en: Inspect device configuration interface or API documentation to confirm DSA is in the supported signature algorithm list and references FIPS PUB 186-4. Verify via packet capture or logs that the algorithm is used in actual interactions.
verification_method_zh: 检查设备配置界面或API文档，确认支持的签名算法列表中包含DSA，并验证其实现引用了FIPS PUB 186-4标准。通过抓包或日志分析确认实际交互中使用了该算法。

regulation_name: Czech Act on Cyber Security No. 264/2025 Coll.
title_en: Section 1 > Section 3 - Incident Reporting and Response requirement
title_zh: Section 1 > Section 3 - 事件报告与响应要求
verification_method_en: Review incident reporting procedures, deadlines, notification templates, and exercise or response records.
verification_method_zh: 检查事件报告流程、时限要求、通知模板和演练/真实处置记录。

description_en: Devices must remove all unnecessary default accounts and services after factory reset; enable only minimal ports and protocols required for business; default configurations must not contain known weak passwords or open high-risk services (e.g., Telnet, FTP).
description_zh: 设备出厂或重置后，必须移除所有不必要的默认账户和服务；仅启用业务必需的最小化端口和协议；默认配置不得包含任何已知的弱口令或开放的高风险服务（如Telnet, FTP）。
notes_en: Based on one of the five Cyber Essentials technical controls: Secure configuration. Aims to minimize the attack surface.
notes_zh: 基于Cyber Essentials五大控制技术控制点之一：安全配置（Secure configuration）。旨在最小化攻击面。
regulation_name: UK Cyber Essentials
title_en: Secure Device Initial Configuration
title_zh: 设备安全初始化配置
verification_method_en: Inspect the factory default configuration image to verify that non-essential services (e.g., Telnet) are disabled and confirm there are no default hardcoded credentials.
verification_method_zh: 检查设备出厂默认配置镜像，验证是否禁用了非必需服务（如Telnet），并确认无默认硬编码凭证。

description_en: For products relying on third-party cloud services (e.g., VoIP, SaaS components), the product must provide a user interface or configuration option allowing the end-user to completely disable connectivity and functionality related to these third-party services.
description_zh: 对于依赖第三方云服务（如VoIP、SaaS组件）的产品，必须提供用户界面或配置选项，允许最终用户完全禁用与这些第三方服务的连接和功能。
notes_en: Applies to any network device integrating external APIs or cloud services, ensuring user data sovereignty and control.
notes_zh: 适用于任何集成外部API或云服务的网络设备，确保用户拥有数据主权和控制权。

description_en: Devices must have mechanisms to maintain data privacy and authenticity, preventing tampering or forgery. Techniques such as digital signatures or Message Authentication Codes (MAC) must be implemented to verify data source and integrity.
description_zh: 设备必须具备机制以维护数据的隐私性和真实性，防止数据被篡改或伪造。必须实施数字签名或消息认证码（MAC）等技术来验证数据来源和完整性。
notes_en: Focus on preventing man-in-the-middle attacks and data injection attacks.
notes_zh: 重点在于防止中间人攻击和数据注入攻击。
regulation_name: UAE National IoT Security Policy
title_en: Ensure Data Privacy and Authenticity
title_zh: 数据隐私与真实性保障
verification_method_en: Test the device's response to receiving tampered data to confirm it can detect integrity breaches. Verify the correct implementation of digital signatures or MACs.
verification_method_zh: 测试设备在接收篡改数据时的反应，确认是否能检测到完整性破坏。验证数字签名或MAC的实现是否正确。

description_en: The assurance level shall be commensurate with the level of the risk associated with the intended use of the ICT product, ICT service, ICT process or managed security service, in terms of the probability and impact of an incident. European cybersecurity certificates and EU statements of conformity shall refer to any assurance level specified in the European cybersecurity certification scheme under which the European cybersecurity certificate or EU statement of conformity is issued. The security requirements corresponding to each assurance level shall be provided in the relevant European cybersecurity certification scheme, including the corresponding security functionalities and the corresponding rigour and depth of the evaluation that the ICT product, ICT service, ICT process or managed security service is to undergo.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：The assurance level shall be commensurate with the level of the risk associated with the intended use of the ICT product, ICT service, ICT process or managed security service, in terms of the probability and impact of an incident. European cybersecurity certificates and EU statements of conformity shall refer to any assurance level specified in the European cybersecurity certification scheme under which the European cybersecurity certificate or EU statement of conformity is issued. The security requirements corresponding to each assurance level shall be provided in the relevant European cybersecurity certification scheme, including the corresponding security functionalities and the corresponding rigour and depth of the evaluation that the ICT product, ICT service, ICT process or managed security service is to undergo.

description_en: Strengthen the Processing of Information Related to Cybersecurity Incidents • Create a National Cybersecurity Incident Registry, emphasizing reporting for cybersecurity incidents at national critical infrastructures. • Establish efficient mechanisms to ensure the proper processing, management, storage, sharing, and information exchange regarding cybersecurity incidents among multiple stakeholders, including the application of industry-recommended standards and participation in regional and international networks, such as the OAS/ CICTE’s CSIRT Americas Network. • Create and implement a notification mechanism for law enforcement authorities.

description_en: provide assurance that the ICT products, ICT services, ICT processes or managed security services for which that certificate is issued meet the corres provide assurance that the ICT products, ICT services, ICT processes or managed security services for which that certificate is issued meet the corresponding security requirements, including security functionalities, and that they have been evaluated at a level intended to minimise the risk of state-of-the-art cyberattacks carried out by actors with significant skills and resources. description_en: Article 5 Development and implementation of Union policy and law ENISA shall contribute to the development and implementation of Union policy and law, by: (1) assisting and advising on the development and review of Union policy and law in the field of cybersecurity and on sector-specific policy and law initiatives where matters related to cybersecurity are involved, in particular by providing its independent opinion and analysis as well as carrying out preparatory work; (2) assisting Member States to implement the Union policy and law regarding cybersecurity consistently, in particular in relation to Directive (EU) 2016/1148, including by means of issuing opinions, guidelines, providing advice and best practices on topics such as risk management, incident reporting and information sharing, as well as by facilitating the exchange of best practices between competent authorities in that regard;
