description_en: Consolidate the National Cybersecurity Coordination Body # 1 2 3 Roadmap to restructure the MICITT National cybersecurity coordination body Human resources for national cybersecurity coordination Establish and launch a roadmap to restructure the MICITT , by consolidating and centralizing cybersecurity efforts and activities at the national level. Strengthen the national coordination body to direct the implementation of the 2023-2027 National Cybersecurity Strategy and carry out continuous monitoring, thus equipping it with legal and technical tools that allow it to perform its functions most effectively. Ensure that the national coordination body has a specialized, qualified, and technical team dedicated to cybersecurity actions that promote gender equality and diversity.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：Consolidate the National Cybersecurity Coordination Body # 1 2 3 Roadmap to restructure the MICITT National cybersecurity coordination body Human resources for national cybersecurity coordination Establish and launch a roadmap to restructure the MICITT , by consolidating and centralizing cybersecurity efforts and activities at the national level. Strengthen the national coordination body to direct the implementation of the 2023-2027 National Cybersecurity Strategy and carry out continuous monitoring, thus equipping it with legal and technical tools that allow it to perform its functions most effectively. Ensure that the national coordination body has a specialized, qualified, and technical team dedicated to cybersecurity actions that promote gender equality and diversity.

description_en: Operators must be able to provide a list and evidence of existing security measures to the Federal Minister of the Interior to demonstrate that technical and organizational security measures for their network and information systems comply with § 17(1). This proof must be submitted at least every three years after receipt of the designation as an operator of essential services.
description_zh: 运营商必须能够向奥地利内政部长提供现有安全措施的清单和证据，以证明其网络和信息系统的技术及组织安全措施符合§ 17(1)的要求。该证明必须在收到指定为关键服务运营商的决定后至少每三年提交一次。
notes_en: This requirement primarily targets devices deployed by customers designated as 'Operators of Essential Services'. Devices must support data export functions for auditing purposes.
notes_zh: 此要求主要针对被认定为‘关键服务运营商’的客户所部署的设备。设备需提供支持审计的数据导出功能。

title_en: Proof of Security Measures Compliance
title_zh: 安全措施符合性证明
verification_method_en: Inspect product documentation and management interface to confirm the capability to generate or export reports of currently active security configurations, patch status, and access control policies to support compliance audits.
verification_method_zh: 检查产品文档和管理界面，确认是否具备生成或导出当前生效的安全配置、补丁状态及访问控制策略报告的功能，以支持合规性审计。

description_en: Article 34 (1) Essential entities shall carry out a cybersecurity audit at least once every two years. (2) Essential entities shall carry out a cybersecurity audit even before the expiry of the deadline referred to in paragraph 1 of this Article, w hen requested by the competent authority for implementing cybersecurity requirements under Article 79, paragraph 1, subparagraph 7 or Article 81, paragraph 1, subparagraph 2 of this Act. (3) A cybersecurity audit referred to in paragraph 1 of this Article shall be carried out as a separate procedure or within the business audit or another compliance check of the entity carried out on the basis of special regulations that regulate the area of provision of specific services or the performance of specific activities.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：Article 34 (1) Essential entities shall carry out a cybersecurity audit at least once every two years. (2) Essential entities shall carry out a cybersecurity audit even before the expiry of the deadline referred to in paragraph 1 of this Article, w hen requested by the competent authority for implementing cybersecurity requirements under Article 79, paragraph 1, subparagraph 7 or Article 81, paragraph 1, subparagraph 2 of this Act. (3) A cybersecurity audit referred to in paragraph 1 of this Article shall be carried out as a separate procedure or within the business audit or another compliance check of the entity carried out on the basis of special regulations that regulate the area of provision of specific services or the performance of specific activities.

description_en: The product must publish clear instructions on how to change the default password in the Registry API; if the default password cannot be changed, this must be explicitly stated.

notes_en: This requirement targets publicly disclosed information rather than internal device functionality, but directly impacts compliance.
notes_zh: 此要求针对的是公开披露的信息，而非设备内部功能，但直接影响合规性。

description_en: UNOFFICIAL ENGLISH TRANSLATION UNOFFICIAL ENGLISH TRANSLATION directly applicable European Union regulation 8 shall provide a notification under this point within 24 hours of becoming aware of the cybersecurity incident, b) upon request of the Agency or the National CERT, an interim report on significant changes in the status of cybersecurity incident handling; and c) no later than 30 days after submitting the report under letter a), a final report on the resolution of the cybersecurity incident; if the cybersecurity incident continues beyond the specified period, the provider of regulated services shall submit a progress report on the current status of handling the cybersecurity incident without undue delay after the period has expired, and then submit a final report on the resolution of the cybersecurity incident no later than 30 days after the incident is resolved.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：UNOFFICIAL ENGLISH TRANSLATION UNOFFICIAL ENGLISH TRANSLATION directly applicable European Union regulation 8 shall provide a notification under this point within 24 hours of becoming aware of the cybersecurity incident, b) upon request of the Agency or the National CERT, an interim report on significant changes in the status of cybersecurity incident handling; and c) no later than 30 days after submitting the report under letter a), a final report on the resolution of the cybersecurity incident; if the cybersecurity incident continues beyond the specified period, the provider of regulated services shall submit a progress report on the current status of handling the cybersecurity incident without undue delay after the period has expired, and then submit a final report on the resolution of the cybersecurity incident no later than 30 days after the incident is resolved.

description_en: The product and its management systems must provide necessary technical interfaces or documentation to support the National Cyber Security Centre (NCSC) in supervising and surveying whether communication and information systems comply with organizational and technical cyber security requirements.
description_zh: 产品及其管理系统必须提供必要的技术接口或文档，以支持国家网络安全中心（NCSC）对通信和信息系统是否符合组织和技术网络安全要求进行的监督和调查。
notes_en: This clause primarily defines the powers of the regulatory body, but implies the obligation of regulated entities (product owners/operators) to cooperate by providing information. For products, this means possessing auditability and information export capabilities.
notes_zh: 此条款主要规定监管机构的职权，但隐含了被监管实体（即产品所有者/运营商）必须配合提供信息的义务。对于产品而言，意味着需要具备可审计性和信息导出能力。
regulation_name: Lithuania Law on Cyber Security
title_en: Cooperate with Cyber Security Compliance Supervision
title_zh: 配合网络安全合规监督
verification_method_en: Verify if the product has the capability or documentation support to provide system security status, configuration information, and compliance data to regulatory authorities.
verification_method_zh: 检查产品是否具备向监管机构提供系统安全状态、配置信息及合规性数据的能力或文档支持。

description_en: When the Federal Minister of the Interior exercises inspection rights, the device and its management system must support on-site inspections of network and information systems. This includes providing necessary access privileges to review system configurations, logs, and related documentation, ensuring inspections are limited to the strictly necessary scope.
description_zh: 当奥地利内政部长依法行使检查权时，设备及其管理系统必须支持监管人员对网络和信息系统的现场检查。这包括提供必要的访问权限以审查系统配置、日志及相关文档，同时确保检查过程仅限于必要范围。
notes_en: An emergency response process must be established to rapidly provide required system access or data export functions upon receiving prior notice from regulatory authorities.
notes_zh: 需建立紧急响应流程，以便在收到监管机构预先通知后，能迅速提供所需的系统访问权限或数据导出功能。
regulation_name: Austria Network and Information System Security Act
title_en: Cooperate with regulatory on-site inspections
title_zh: 配合监管机构现场检查
verification_method_en: Verify that the system has controlled administrator access interfaces allowing authorized regulators to access system logs, configuration backups, and compliance documents after notification, with all such access logged.
verification_method_zh: 验证系统是否具备受控的管理员访问接口，允许授权监管人员在通知后访问系统日志、配置备份及合规文档，并记录所有此类访问行为。

Aunque no son urgentes ni representan riesgos inmediatos, su implementación contribuye a un marco más completo y maduro. No deben ser ignoradas, sino programadas para ser ejecutadas cuando los recursos y el tiempo lo permitan, ya que su cumplimiento mejora el nivel general de madurez y protección.

description_en: Cybersecurity Act, 2020 29 Act 1038 (2) The Authority shall, before exercising the power of suspension under this section, (a) give the licensee thirty days notice in writing of the intention to do so, and (b) specify in the notice the grounds on which the Authority intends to suspend the licence. (3) Where the Authority decides to suspend a licence, the Authority shall give the licensee the opportunity (a) to submit to the Authority, within the time specified by the Authority, a written statement of objections, if any, to the suspension of the licence; (4) The Authority shall, within twenty-eight days of the suspension of a licence, notify the cybersecurity service provider concerned of the suspension.

description_en: The necessary arrangements concerning the accommodation to be provided for ENISA in the host Member State and the facilities to be made available by that Member State together with the specific rules applicable in the host Member State to the Executive Director, members of the Management Board, ENISA’s staff and members of their families shall be laid down in a headquarters agreement between ENISA and the host Member State, concluded after obtaining the approval of the Management Board. ENISA’s host Member State shall provide the best possible conditions for ensuring the proper functioning of ENISA, taking into account the accessibility of the location, the existence of adequate education facilities for the children of staff members, appropriate access to the labour market, social security and medical care for both children and spouses of staff members.

ENISA’s host Member State shall provide the best possible conditions for ensuring the proper functioning of ENISA, taking into account the accessibility of the location, the existence of adequate education facilities for the children of staff members, appropriate access to the labour market, social security and medical care for both children and spouses of staff members.

description_en: JUNE, 2023 (11) If any book, document, data or computer output which is admitted in evidence or liable to inspection in any civil or criminal proceedings contains any entry in which any informer is named or described or which may lead to the discovery of the informer, the court shall cause those entries to be concealed from view or to be obliterated so far as may be necessary to protect the informer from discovery. There shall be established a reserve fund for the purposes of mitigating any cybersecurity risk which shall not be withdrawn except with the approval of the Minister.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：JUNE, 2023 (11) If any book, document, data or computer output which is admitted in evidence or liable to inspection in any civil or criminal proceedings contains any entry in which any informer is named or described or which may lead to the discovery of the informer, the court shall cause those entries to be concealed from view or to be obliterated so far as may be necessary to protect the informer from discovery. There shall be established a reserve fund for the purposes of mitigating any cybersecurity risk which shall not be withdrawn except with the approval of the Minister.

description_en: The device must provide necessary interfaces, documentation, and access permissions to allow regulatory authorities or their authorized third-party assessment bodies to perform compliance checks, tests, and measurements. This includes providing read-only access to system logs, configuration data, and software versions when authorized.
description_zh: 设备必须提供必要的接口、文档和访问权限，以允许监管机构或其授权的第三方评估机构执行合规性检查、测试和测量。这包括在授权情况下提供对系统日志、配置数据和软件版本的只读访问权限。
notes_en: Based on Section 18 j of the Finland Cybersecurity Act, regulatory authorities have the right to conduct necessary inspections and tests. Products must be designed with auditability in mind.
notes_zh: 依据芬兰网络安全法第18 j条，监管机构有权进行必要的检查和测试。产品需具备可审计性设计。
regulation_name: Finland Cybersecurity Act 124/2025
title_en: Support Regulatory Compliance Audits
title_zh: 支持监管合规性审计
verification_method_en: Review product technical documentation for audit interface descriptions; simulate a regulatory audit scenario to verify that necessary configuration and log information can be retrieved via designated interfaces without disrupting business operations.
verification_method_zh: 审查产品技术文档，确认是否包含审计接口说明；模拟监管审计场景，验证是否能通过指定接口获取必要的配置和日志信息而不影响业务运行。

description_en: Section 9 (1) To ensure the risk -proportionate protection of data processed by an entity, the entity referred to in section 1 (1) a) shall classify data processed by it in an electronic information system based on confidentiality, integrity and availability in accordance with the provisions of a government decree. (2) Entities referred to in section 1 (1) b) and c) and, as regards electronic information systems for national defence purposes, f) shall p erform data classification in the case of using a non - private cloud computing service or carrying out foreign processing with a view to the assessment of the risks of foreign processing or processing using a non -private cloud computing service. (3) Data cl assification shall take into account the collective security requirements of electronic data that are processed together logically as a unit, such as databases, data repositories, individual documents or other data sets.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：Section 9 (1) To ensure the risk -proportionate protection of data processed by an entity, the entity referred to in section 1 (1) a) shall classify data processed by it in an electronic information system based on confidentiality, integrity and availability in accordance with the provisions of a government decree. (2) Entities referred to in section 1 (1) b) and c) and, as regards electronic information systems for national defence purposes, f) shall p erform data classification in the case of using a non - private cloud computing service or carrying out foreign processing with a view to the assessment of the risks of foreign processing or processing using a non -private cloud computing service. (3) Data cl assification shall take into account the collective security requirements of electronic data that are processed together logically as a unit, such as databases, data repositories, individual documents or other data sets.

description_en: The device must support encryption for sensitive data and personal information stored in local file systems or databases, preventing data leakage from physical access or unauthorized reading.
description_zh: 设备必须支持对存储在本地文件系统或数据库中的敏感数据和个人信息进行加密存储，防止物理访问或非法读取导致的数据泄露。
notes_en: For resource-constrained devices, Hardware Security Modules (HSM) or Trusted Platform Modules (TPM) can be used for key management.
notes_zh: 对于资源受限的设备，可采用硬件安全模块(HSM)或可信平台模块(TPM)进行密钥管理。
regulation_name: ANATEL Ato 77 Cybersecurity Requirements for Telecommunications Equipment
title_en: Support encryption for sensitive data storage
title_zh: 敏感数据存储加密支持
verification_method_en: Inspect device configuration files or database files to verify that sensitive fields (such as passwords, keys, PII) are stored in ciphertext, not plaintext.
verification_method_zh: 检查设备配置文件或数据库文件，验证敏感字段（如密码、密钥、PII）是否以密文形式存储，而非明文。

description_en: The product must support or provide documentation on how it assists supervised institutions in managing IT service providers based on criticality and associated risks. Management scope must cover on-site/offshore execution, performance measurement, legal compliance, business continuity, human resources, and security incident management, ensuring information confidentiality, integrity, and availability.
description_zh: 产品必须支持或提供文档，说明如何协助受监管机构根据服务关键性和相关风险对IT服务提供商进行管理。管理范围需涵盖现场/离岸执行、性能测量、法律合规、业务连续性、人力资源及安全事故管理，确保信息的机密性、完整性和可用性。
notes_en: This requirement mainly targets enterprise-grade products, ensuring the product can integrate into the customer's vendor risk management processes.
notes_zh: 此要求主要针对企业级产品，需确保产品能融入客户的供应商风险管理流程。
regulation_name: Honduras CNBS IT, Cybersecurity and Business Continuity Management Rules 2022
title_en: Vendor Risk Assessment and Management
title_zh: 供应商风险评估与管理
verification_method_en: Check if product documentation includes vendor risk management guidelines, or verify if product features support configuring third-party service access policies based on risk levels.
verification_method_zh: 检查产品文档是否包含供应商风险管理指南，或验证产品功能是否支持按风险等级配置第三方服务接入策略。

description_en: Vendor must provide a standardized 'National Security Risk Analysis Report' template and guide to assist Critical Information Infrastructure Operators (CIIO) in assessing national security risks such as supply chain disruption or data leakage.
description_zh: 产品供应商必须提供标准化的《国家安全风险分析报告》模板及填写指南，协助关键信息基础设施运营者（CIIO）评估产品投入使用后可能带来的供应链中断、数据泄露等国家安全风险。
notes_en: This requirement primarily targets supplies to CIIOs. While home routers rarely involve CIIOs directly, relevant compliance interfaces or documentation must be retained for specific procurement needs.
notes_zh: 此要求主要针对向关键信息基础设施运营者供货的场景。家用路由器虽通常不直接涉及CIIO，但作为网络产品列入适用范围，需保留相关合规接口或文档以备特定采购需求。
regulation_name: Cybersecurity Review Measures
title_en: National Security Risk Assessment
title_zh: 国家安全风险预判机制
verification_method_en: Verify if a standard template or auxiliary documentation for 'National Security Risk Analysis Report' is provided with product deliverables, covering key risk points like supply chain continuity and data control.
verification_method_zh: 检查是否随产品交付物提供了《国家安全风险分析报告》的标准模板或辅助文档，并验证文档内容是否涵盖供应链连续性、数据控制权等关键风险点。

description_en: Article 23(11) of Directive (EU) 2022/2555 of the European Parliament and of the Council, a law enforcement agency may, in addition to the special measures specified in subsection 1 of this section, also apply the special state supervision measure provided in § 52 of the Law Enforcement Act on the grounds and in accordance with the rules provided in the Law Enforcement Act. Specifications of state supervision (1) For countering an immediate serious threat or eliminating a disturbance in case of a cyber incident the Estonian Information System Authority may restrict the use of or access to a system provided all the following conditions are met: 1) the cyber incident compromises or harms the security of another system;
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：Article 23(11) of Directive (EU) 2022/2555 of the European Parliament and of the Council, a law enforcement agency may, in addition to the special measures specified in subsection 1 of this section, also apply the special state supervision measure provided in § 52 of the Law Enforcement Act on the grounds and in accordance with the rules provided in the Law Enforcement Act. Specifications of state supervision (1) For countering an immediate serious threat or eliminating a disturbance in case of a cyber incident the Estonian Information System Authority may restrict the use of or access to a system provided all the following conditions are met: 1) the cyber incident compromises or harms the security of another system;

description_en: Benefits of APIs include,  Improved collaboration  Monetization of data  System security  Cost reduction  More scalability of the systems  Fostering innovation a) Open API Open APIs are defined in various ways, the most common accepted definition is, Open API is publicly available API that provides developers with access for programming to software applications or webservices (mostly proprietary). The Open banking APIs allows third party service providers (TPPs) to access the data from the financial institutions and use it to develop and provide innovation solutions to the end customers
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：Benefits of APIs include,  Improved collaboration  Monetization of data  System security  Cost reduction  More scalability of the systems  Fostering innovation a) Open API Open APIs are defined in various ways, the most common accepted definition is, Open API is publicly available API that provides developers with access for programming to software applications or webservices (mostly proprietary). The Open banking APIs allows third party service providers (TPPs) to access the data from the financial institutions and use it to develop and provide innovation solutions to the end customers

description_en: (1) A person who intends to engage in a cyber security service shall apply to theAuthority in a prescribed form and manner on payment of a prescribed fee. (2) The Authority shall within thirty days of receipt of an application, grant or reject the application on terms and conditions the Authority may determine. (3) Where the Authority fails to make a decision within the period referred to under subsection (2), except as otherwise provided, the application shall be deemed to have been granted.

(3) Where the Authority fails to make a decision within the period referred to under subsection (2), except as otherwise provided, the application shall be deemed to have been granted.

description_en: (2) The owner of a critical information infrastructure shall establish such mechanisms and processes for the purposes of detecting cybersecurity threats and incidents in respect of the critical information infrastructure as set out in any applicable code of practice. (3) Any owner of a critical information infrastructure who, without reasonable excuse, fails to comply with subsection (1) is guilty of an offence and liable on conviction to a fine not exceeding $100,000, imprisonment for a term not exceeding 2 years or both. ( 1) The owner of a critical information infrastructure shall - {a} at least once every 2 years (or at such higher frequency as may be directed by the Commissioner in any particular case), starting from the date of the notice issued under section 9, cause an audit of the compliance of the critical information infrastructure with this Order and the applicable codes 1170

description_en: Recording of Providers of Essential Services and Important Services (1) A person shall perform self-assessment, determining its conformity with the status of the provider of essential services or the provider of important services. In case of conformity, the person shall, not later than within a month, notify the National Cybersecurity Centre thereof. The following shall be indicated in the notification: 1) the name of the person (a natural person - the given name, surname, and personal identity number), legal status, and form of economic activity, registration number, legal address, and other contact details (for example, official electronic address, electronic mail address, telephone number, website address);

description_en: (2) The Authority shall carry out a periodic audit and inspection on a critical information infrastructure to ensure compliance with the provisions of this Act. description_en: The Commission shall publish a Union rolling work programme for European cybersecurity certification (the ‘Union rolling work programme’) that shall identify strategic priorities for future European cybersecurity certification schemes. The Union rolling work programme shall in particular include a list of ICT products, ICT services, ICT processes and managed security services, or categories thereof, that are capable of benefiting from being included in the scope of a European cybersecurity certification scheme. Inclusion in the Union rolling work programme of specific ICT products, ICT services, ICT processes, or managed security services, or categories thereof, shall be justified on the basis of one or more of the following grounds: (a) the availability and the development of national cybersecurity certification schemes covering a specific category of ICT products, ICT services, ICT processes or managed security services and, in particular, as regards the risk of fragmentation;
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：The Commission shall publish a Union rolling work programme for European cybersecurity certification (the ‘Union rolling work programme’) that shall identify strategic priorities for future European cybersecurity certification schemes. The Union rolling work programme shall in particular include a list of ICT products, ICT services, ICT processes and managed security services, or categories thereof, that are capable of benefiting from being included in the scope of a European cybersecurity certification scheme. Inclusion in the Union rolling work programme of specific ICT products, ICT services, ICT processes, or managed security services, or categories thereof, shall be justified on the basis of one or more of the following grounds: (a) the availability and the development of national cybersecurity certification schemes covering a specific category of ICT products, ICT services, ICT processes or managed security services and, in particular, as regards the risk of fragmentation;

description_en: For wireless devices, a software-level lock mechanism must be implemented to prevent users from transmitting on any radio frequency without prior approval from NTRA.

notes_en: Specific band shielding must be combined with local Egyptian spectrum regulations.
notes_zh: 需结合埃及当地频谱法规进行具体频段屏蔽。

description_en: The device must provide a secure and configurable mechanism that allows software updates for IoT product components only by authorized entities (users, services, or components). The update process must verify integrity and prevent tampering.
description_zh: 设备必须提供安全且可配置的机制，仅允许授权实体（用户、服务或组件）对IoT产品组件的软件进行更新。更新过程必须验证完整性并防止篡改。
notes_en: The update mechanism should support rollback or failure recovery to prevent bricking the device in case of update failure.
notes_zh: 更新机制需支持回滚或故障恢复，以防更新失败导致设备变砖。
regulation_name: Cyber Trust Mark Program Final Rule
title_en: Secure Software Update Mechanism
title_zh: 安全软件更新机制
verification_method_en: Perform firmware/software update tests to verify signature validation mechanisms; attempt to inject unsigned update packages to verify rejection by the device; check if the update channel is encrypted.
verification_method_zh: 执行固件/软件更新测试，验证更新包签名校验机制；尝试注入未经签名的更新包，验证设备是否拒绝安装；检查更新通道是否加密。

description_en: If the product involves outsourced services or multi-tenancy, it must ensure that processing and derived data are logically isolated from other operations of the IT service provider. Technical mechanisms (e.g., VLAN, VRF, container isolation) must be provided to demonstrate the effectiveness of logical isolation.
description_zh: 若产品涉及外包服务或多租户场景，必须确保处理过程和衍生数据在逻辑上与IT服务提供商的其他操作完全隔离。需提供技术机制（如VLAN、VRF、容器隔离等）以证明逻辑隔离的有效性。
notes_en: Focus on 'logical isolation', ensuring that even if physical resources are shared, data flows and control planes are independent.
notes_zh: 重点在于‘逻辑隔离’，需确保即使共享物理资源，数据流和控制平面也是独立的。

verification_method_zh: 测试在多租户或外包服务模式下，不同实例间的数据访问是否被严格阻断，验证逻辑隔离机制的配置和有效性。

description_en: Section 19 (1) The central service provider shall inform the user entity which security class the services it provides comply with or which security class the systems implementing central services comply with. The user entity shall use the service if the protective measures ensured by the central service provider are appropriate for the security class of the electronic information system affected by the service provided by the central service provider. Otherwise, the user entity shall not use the service or, in the case of mandatory use, the user entity shall provide for using risk -proportionate substitute measures the user entity has the power to implement.

title_en: Source clause - Security Governance and Product Requirements requirement

description_en: The manufacturer must establish and maintain a systematic, risk-based information security workflow covering the product lifecycle. This process must explicitly identify, assess, and handle information security risks related to network devices and be documented.
description_zh: 设备制造商必须建立并维护一个系统化的、基于风险的信息安全工作流程，涵盖产品全生命周期。该流程需明确识别、评估和处理与网络设备相关的信息安全风险，并形成书面文档。
notes_en: This clause primarily targets service providers, but equipment vendors must demonstrate their products support customers in fulfilling this obligation, or comply if acting as digital service providers.
notes_zh: 此条款主要针对服务提供商，但作为设备供应商，需证明其产品支持客户履行此义务，或自身作为数字服务提供者时符合此要求。
regulation_name: Sweden Information Security for Essential and Digital Services Act (2018:1174)
title_en: Establish Systematic ISMS
title_zh: 建立系统化信息安全管理体系
verification_method_en: Review the company's information security management documentation to confirm it includes standardized processes for risk identification, assessment, and handling applicable to the current product line.
verification_method_zh: 审查公司的信息安全管理制度文档，确认其包含风险识别、评估和处理的标准化流程，且该流程适用于当前产品线。

description_en: The product must support reporting digital security incidents to the CNSD via encrypted email or authenticated telephone channels. If using email, communication must be encrypted; if using telephone, pre-defined identification protocols must be followed.
description_zh: 产品必须支持通过加密电子邮件或经过身份验证的电话通信渠道向国家数字安全中心（CNSD）报告数字安全事件。若使用电子邮件，通信内容必须加密；若使用电话，必须遵循预先定义的身份验证协议。
notes_en: Regulations recommend prioritizing automated digital platforms (requiring OSCD registration), but products must ensure capability or interfaces for reporting via backup channels (encrypted email/phone).
notes_zh: 法规推荐优先使用自动化数字平台（需注册OSCD），但产品侧需确保具备通过备用渠道（加密邮件/电话）上报的能力或接口。
regulation_name: Peru Digital Trust Framework Regulation Supreme Decree No. 126-2025-PCM
title_en: Digital Security Incident Reporting Mechanism
title_zh: 数字安全事件上报机制
verification_method_en: Check product documentation for procedures on reporting security incidents to regulators, and verify support for sending alerts via encrypted email or integrated authenticated calling features.
verification_method_zh: 检查产品文档是否包含向监管机构报告安全事件的流程说明，并验证是否支持加密邮件发送警报或集成身份验证通话功能。

description_en: If ECDSA is used, the elliptic curve order must be ≥224 bits, and the hash function output length must be ≥224 bits. Supported standards: ANS X9.62-2005, FIPS PUB 186-4, SEC 1 v2.0.
description_zh: 若使用ECDSA数字签名算法，椭圆曲线的阶必须≥224位，且使用的哈希函数输出长度必须≥224位。支持标准包括ANS X9.62-2005, FIPS PUB 186-4, SEC 1 v2.0。
notes_en: Applies to all ECDSA implementations referencing the cited standards.
notes_zh: 适用于所有引用上述标准的ECDSA实现。
regulation_name: Approved Security Functions
title_en: ECDSA Curve and Hash Strength
title_zh: ECDSA曲线与哈希强度

description_en: To establish a comprehensive action framework that allows for preventing and mitigating risks and threats in the digital environment, promoting innovation and the development of cybersecurity solutions, strengthening the response capacity to cybersecurity incidents, and fostering a strong security culture, all with the goal of helping ensure the country’s stability and its economy, protecting the state’s and citizens’ personal and critical information, and maintaining trust in the use of digital systems. All stakeholders must understand cybersecurity risks and assess the potential impact of comprehensive cybersecurity risk management decisions on their socio-economic activities and the digital environment, in gen

description_en: Products must pass national designated security certification or testing and obtain a valid certificate. For listed critical network equipment (e.g., routers, switches), compliance with standard GB40050-2021 is required, tested by qualified bodies (e.g., CCRC, CAICT).
description_zh: 产品必须通过国家指定的安全认证或检测，并获得有效的认证证书。对于列出的网络关键设备（如路由器、交换机），必须符合GB40050-2021标准，并由具备资质的机构（如中国网络安全审查技术与认证中心、中国信息通信研究院等）进行检测。
notes_en: The source text is a registry of certification results, implying that relevant products must complete this certification process before market release. GB40050-2021 is the specific technical compliance standard.
notes_zh: 法规原文为认证结果检索列表，隐含要求是相关产品必须完成此认证流程方可上市。GB40050-2021是具体的合规技术标准。

description_en: Product must provide a supply chain continuity assessment report demonstrating alternative sources or inventory buffers for critical components to ensure business continuity of at least 99.9% in case of supply interruption due to political, diplomatic, or trade factors.

description_en: The device or software must provide standardized interfaces (e.g., Syslog, SNMP Trap, API webhook) to support real-time or near-real-time export of security event logs to external monitoring systems, meeting the 'without undue delay' reporting requirement.
description_zh: 设备或软件必须提供标准化的接口（如Syslog, SNMP Trap, API webhook），支持将安全事件日志实时或近实时地导出到外部监控系统，以满足‘无不当延误’的报告要求。
notes_en: For enterprise products, automated reporting is required to meet regulatory timeliness requirements. Home routers may simplify this to local log storage for manual user extraction.
notes_zh: 针对企业级产品，需支持自动化报告以满足法规对及时性的要求。家用路由器可简化为本地日志存储供用户手动提取。

description_en: Upon discovery of security defects or vulnerabilities, the manufacturer must initiate remediation measures (including patch development, temporary mitigation, or security advisories) within a specified timeframe (recommended max 72 hours) after confirmation.
description_zh: 当发现产品存在安全缺陷或漏洞时，制造商必须在确认漏洞后的规定时间内（建议不超过72小时）启动补救措施，包括开发补丁、提供临时缓解方案或发布安全公告。
notes_en: Regulations require 'immediate' remediation; engineering must define specific SLAs.
notes_zh: 法规要求“立即”采取补救措施，工程上需定义具体的SLA。

description_en: Product design and implementation must allow the adoption of internationally accepted technical norms and standards, without imposing or discriminating in favor of a specific type of technology.
description_zh: 产品设计与实现必须允许采用国际公认的技术规范和标准（如ISO/IEC系列），不得强制绑定特定私有技术，以确保互操作性和安全性评估的通用性。
notes_en: This clause emphasizes technological neutrality, requiring products to be compatible with widely accepted international norms when meeting security objectives.
notes_zh: 此条款强调技术中立性，要求产品在满足安全目标时，应兼容广泛接受的国际规范。

title_en: Support International Security Standards
title_zh: 支持国际安全标准
verification_method_en: Review product technical documentation to confirm that the list of supported standards includes internationally recognized standards (e.g., IEEE, IETF, ISO) and there are no mandatory exclusive private protocols.
verification_method_zh: 审查产品技术文档，确认其支持的标准列表中包含国际公认标准（如IEEE, IETF, ISO等），且无排他性私有协议强制要求。

description_en: Cryptographic modules (hardware, software, or firmware) within the product must undergo third-party testing and certification under the Japan Cryptographic Module Validation Program (JCMVP) to ensure compliance with security requirements specified in Appendix A.
description_zh: 产品中的密码模块（包含硬件、软件或固件）必须通过日本密码模块验证计划（JCMVP）的第三方测试与认证，确保其符合附属书A中规定的密码模块安全要求。
notes_en: Applicable to all products sold in the Japanese market containing cryptographic functions. Certification must be issued by designated certification bodies.
notes_zh: 适用于所有在日本市场销售且包含加密功能的产品。认证需由指定的认证机构颁发。

verification_method_en: Verify the existence of a valid JCMVP certificate and ensure the module name and version on the certificate match the cryptographic module actually used in the product.

description_en: Amendment to a business license granted for a company for trading in network information security products and services shall be made in cases of any change in the name, legal representative of the company or any change or addition of network information security products and services rendered by itself. The application shall be established in two copies, including: the request for business amendment, a report detailing the contents to be amended and other relevant documents.

The application shall be established in two copies, including: the request for business amendment, a report detailing the contents to be amended and other relevant documents.

description_en: The system must be configured to retain audit log records for at least 3 years. During the retention period, logs must not be automatically overwritten or deleted unless archived to long-term storage media.
description_zh: 系统必须配置为至少保留审计日志记录3年。在保留期内，日志不得被自动覆盖或删除，除非归档至长期存储介质。
notes_en: Considering the 3-year storage requirement, products should support external log server (Syslog/SIEM) integration to offload logs to compliant long-term storage systems.
notes_zh: 考虑到3年的存储需求，产品应支持外部日志服务器（Syslog/SIEM）集成，以便将日志卸载到合规的长期存储系统中。
regulation_name: Austria Network and Information System Security Act
title_en: Audit Log Retention Period
title_zh: 审计日志保留期限
verification_method_en: Check the system's log configuration policy to confirm the retention period is set to at least 3 years (or 1095 days). Verify system behavior when log storage is full, ensuring unarchived logs are not illegally discarded.
verification_method_zh: 检查系统的日志配置策略，确认保留期限设置为至少3年（或1095天）。验证系统在日志存储空间满时的行为，确保未归档日志不会被非法丢弃。

description_en: The product must provide necessary technical documentation, access rights, and logging capabilities to support independent third-party experts in auditing whether security measures comply with Articles 7, 8, and the detailed rules referred to in Article 9.

notes_en: Applicable to devices used by organizations identified as essential service providers. Audit results must be submitted to the competent authority within the specified timeframe.
notes_zh: 适用于被认定为关键服务提供者的组织所使用的设备。审计结果需在规定时间内提交给主管当局。

verification_method_zh: 核验制度文件、产品设计证据、测试报告和与原文条款对应的符合性说明。

description_en: The device must support and enable by default the DSA algorithm compliant with FIPS PUB 186-4 (DSS, July 2013) when using digital signature functions. Use of algorithms not listed in this specification or deprecated algorithms is prohibited.
description_zh: 设备在使用数字签名功能时，必须支持并默认启用符合 FIPS PUB 186-4 (DSS, July 2013) 标准的 DSA 算法。禁止使用未在此规范中列出的或已废弃的签名算法。
notes_en: This requirement is based on the list of approved security functions under the JCMVP system. Although only the DSA part is shown in the text, as a compliance engineer, ensure that all public key signature functions used fall within the approved list.
notes_zh: 此要求基于JCMVP制度下的批准安全功能列表。虽然原文仅展示了DSA部分，但作为合规工程师，需确保所有使用的公钥签名功能均落在批准列表中。
regulation_name: Approved Security Functions
title_en: Compliant Digital Signature Algorithm
title_zh: 数字签名算法合规性
verification_method_en: Inspect the device configuration interface or API documentation to confirm that the list of supported signature algorithms includes DSA and verify that its implementation references the FIPS PUB 186-4 standard. Attempting to configure non-standard algorithms should be rejected or unavailable.
verification_method_zh: 检查设备配置界面或API文档，确认支持的签名算法列表中包含DSA，并验证其实现引用了FIPS PUB 186-4标准。尝试配置非标准算法应被拒绝或不可用。

description_en: The device or software must support at least one authentication factor (e.g., password, PIN) to meet the basic trust requirements of Level 1 in the Digital Trust Framework.
description_zh: 设备或软件必须支持至少一种身份验证因子（如密码、PIN码），以满足数字信任框架中Level 1的基本信任要求。
notes_en: Applicable to low-risk scenarios or basic access control needs. Article 17.2 states that NCA levels should be implemented based on the risk level of the digital service.
notes_zh: 适用于低风险场景或基础访问控制需求。法规第17.2条指出应根据服务风险等级实施相应的认证级别。
regulation_name: Peru Digital Trust Framework Regulation Supreme Decree No. 126-2025-PCM
title_en: Support Single-Factor Authentication
title_zh: 支持单因素认证机制
verification_method_en: Inspect the device configuration interface to confirm if login or authentication is allowed using only a single credential (e.g., password only).
verification_method_zh: 检查设备配置界面，确认是否允许仅使用单一凭证（如仅密码）进行登录或身份验证。

description_en: The device must provide a user interface or API allowing users to manually check for the availability of software/firmware updates and provide a straightforward process to implement them.
description_zh: 设备必须提供用户界面或API，允许用户手动检查软件/固件更新的可用性，并提供简便的流程来实施更新。
notes_en: N/A

title_en: Support Manual Update Check and Install
title_zh: 支持手动检查与安装更新
verification_method_en: Locate the 'Check for Updates' function in the Web management interface or CLI, execute the operation, and confirm it correctly connects to the server to retrieve version information.
verification_method_zh: 在Web管理界面或CLI中查找'检查更新'功能，执行操作并确认能正确连接服务器获取版本信息。

description_en: Tinjauan permohonan sertifikasi 1) LSPro harus memastikan bahwa informasi yang diperoleh dari permohonan Sertifikasi yang diajukan oleh Pemohon telah lengkap dan memenuhi persyaratan, serta dapat memastikan kemampuan LSPro untuk menindaklanjuti permohonan sertifikasi. 2) Tinjauan permohonan sertifikasi harus dilakukan oleh personel yang memiliki kompetensi sesuai kriteria kompetensi personel atau tim dalam kegiatan sertifikasi. Penandatanganan perjanjian sertifikasi Setelah permohonan sertifikasi dinyatakan lengkap dan memenuhi persyaratan serta Pemohon menyetujui persyaratan dan prosedur sertifikasi yang ditetapkan oleh lembaga sertifikasi, dilakukan p emutakhiran register Modul Kriptografi Indonesia dan penandatanganan p erjanjian sertifikasi oleh Pemohon dan LSPro.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：Tinjauan permohonan sertifikasi 1) LSPro harus memastikan bahwa informasi yang diperoleh dari permohonan Sertifikasi yang diajukan oleh Pemohon telah lengkap dan memenuhi persyaratan, serta dapat memastikan kemampuan LSPro untuk menindaklanjuti permohonan sertifikasi. 2) Tinjauan permohonan sertifikasi harus dilakukan oleh personel yang memiliki kompetensi sesuai kriteria kompetensi personel atau tim dalam kegiatan sertifikasi. Penandatanganan perjanjian sertifikasi Setelah permohonan sertifikasi dinyatakan lengkap dan memenuhi persyaratan serta Pemohon menyetujui persyaratan dan prosedur sertifikasi yang ditetapkan oleh lembaga sertifikasi, dilakukan p emutakhiran register Modul Kriptografi Indonesia dan penandatanganan p erjanjian sertifikasi oleh Pemohon dan LSPro.

description_en: The product must not use SMS (Short Message Service) as the second factor for Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA/2FA), as SMS is recognized as an unreliable security channel.
description_zh: 产品不得将SMS（短信）作为多因素认证（MFA/2FA）的第二因素实现方式，因为SMS被认定为不可靠的安全通道。
notes_en: The regulation explicitly identifies using SMS as a second factor as a security assumption flaw based on unreliable third-party services.
notes_zh: 法规明确指出使用SMS作为第二因素属于基于不可靠第三方服务的安全假设缺陷。
regulation_name: ANSSI CSPN First Level Security Certification
title_en: Disable Insecure 2FA Methods
title_zh: 禁用不安全二步验证
verification_method_en: Inspect the product's MFA configuration options to confirm the absence of SMS-based verification options; or perform code review to confirm no SMS gateway integration for authentication purposes.

description_en: Computer Security Incident Response Teams (1) Computer security incident response teams are authorities which provide support to the State and local government authorities in the field of cybersecurity, maintain and update information on cyber threats, and provide support to natural and legal persons in the prevention of cyber incidents. (2) The tasks of computer security incident response teams shall be performed by: 1) the Defence Intelligence and Security Service with regard to the Ministry of Defence, the institutions subordinate thereto, and the National Armed Forces; (3) The Institute of Mathematics and Computer Science of the University of Latvia shall perform the tasks assigned thereto and exercise the rights in accordance with this Law under functional subordination of the Minister for Defence which is implemented in the form of control.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：Computer Security Incident Response Teams (1) Computer security incident response teams are authorities which provide support to the State and local government authorities in the field of cybersecurity, maintain and update information on cyber threats, and provide support to natural and legal persons in the prevention of cyber incidents. (2) The tasks of computer security incident response teams shall be performed by: 1) the Defence Intelligence and Security Service with regard to the Ministry of Defence, the institutions subordinate thereto, and the National Armed Forces; (3) The Institute of Mathematics and Computer Science of the University of Latvia shall perform the tasks assigned thereto and exercise the rights in accordance with this Law under functional subordination of the Minister for Defence which is implemented in the form of control.

description_en: OPEN BANKING REGULATORY FRAMEWORK 50 6.8.14 Procedures for PISPs: PISPs shall establish procedures to ensure: (a) Customer information sharing: PISPs shall not disclose any Customer Data to third parties, except to the payee and only with explicit consent from the payer; (b) Identification in Payment Transactions: Each time a PISP initiates a payment order on behalf of a Customer, it shall securely identify itself to the Bank, PSP Licensee, or Financial Institution where the Customer holds a Payment Account; However, they may retain details of Payment Transactions initiated by the Customer, including payment amounts, Payment Account details, reference numbers, execution dates, times, and the payee's IBAN, as applicable for meeting the Central Bank’s compliance requirements;

description_en: The device must have the capability to detect and log security incidents that may impact service continuity. Logs must include timestamp, event type, affected components, and severity level to facilitate impact assessment.
description_zh: 设备必须具备检测并记录可能影响服务连续性的安全事件的能力。日志必须包含时间戳、事件类型、受影响组件及严重等级，以便评估事件对服务的影响。
notes_en: Derived from Sections 18 and 19 regarding the reporting of incidents with significant impact on service continuity, predicated on the ability to detect and log such events.
notes_zh: 基于第18和19条关于报告对服务连续性有重大影响的事件的要求，前提是必须先检测到并记录这些事件。

description_en: NSM ICT SECURITY PRINCIPLES VERSION 2. 1 NORWEGIAN NATIONAL SECURITY AUTHORITY | 16 2. Protect and maintain 2.1. Include security during procurement and development processes Aim of the principle: Security is an integral part of the processes for procurement and development, and the organisation minimises the risk of new ICT products and services introducing vulnerabilities to configurations and architecture. Why is this important? ICT security is important when procuring new ICT products and services, not just when procuring security products such as firewalls. Systems may become more vulnerable and less secure if an organisation purchases ICT products and services with poor security features or with security features which do not integrate well with the organisation’s other security architecture and existing ICT products. description_en: UNOFFICIAL ENGLISH TRANSLATION UNOFFICIAL ENGLISH TRANSLATION Government proposal ACT of 2024, on Cybersecurity Parliament has adopted the following Act of the Czech Republic: PART ONE CYBERSECURITY TITLE I Basic provisions § 1 Subject matter (1) This Act regulates the rights and obligations of persons, organisational units of the state and other public authorities in the field of ensuring cybersecurity and the competence and powers of the National Cyber and Information Security Agency (hereinafter referred to as "the Agency") and other public authorities. (2) This Act applies to persons who are established in the territory of the Czech Republic. This Act shall also apply to persons providing electronic communications networks or services in the territory of the Czech Republic pursuant to another legal regulatio n1, regardless of their place of establishment.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：UNOFFICIAL ENGLISH TRANSLATION UNOFFICIAL ENGLISH TRANSLATION Government proposal ACT of 2024, on Cybersecurity Parliament has adopted the following Act of the Czech Republic: PART ONE CYBERSECURITY TITLE I Basic provisions § 1 Subject matter (1) This Act regulates the rights and obligations of persons, organisational units of the state and other public authorities in the field of ensuring cybersecurity and the competence and powers of the National Cyber and Information Security Agency (hereinafter referred to as "the Agency") and other public authorities. (2) This Act applies to persons who are established in the territory of the Czech Republic. This Act shall also apply to persons providing electronic communications networks or services in the territory of the Czech Republic pursuant to another legal regulatio n1, regardless of their place of establishment.

description_en: ENISA shall carry out the tasks assigned to it under this Regulation for the purpose of achieving a high common level of cybersecurity across the Union, including by actively supporting Member States, Union institutions, bodies, offices and agencies in improving cybersecurity. ENISA shall act as a reference point for advice and expertise on cybersecurity for Union institutions, bodies, offices and agencies as well as for other relevant Union stakeholders. ENISA shall contribute to reducing the fragmentation of the internal market by carrying out the tasks assigned to it under this Regulation.

ENISA shall act as a reference point for advice and expertise on cybersecurity for Union institutions, bodies, offices and agencies as well as for other relevant Union stakeholders. ENISA shall contribute to reducing the fragmentation of the internal market by carrying out the tasks assigned to it under this Regulation.

description_en: In the event of any change in the data referred to in paragraph 1 of this Article, the operator of ICT system of special importance shall notify the In the event of any change in the data referred to in paragraph 1 of this Article, the operator of ICT system of special importance shall notify the Ministry of such change within 15 days of the date when such change occurred. The data referred to in paragraph 1 items 2) and 3) shall be processed to comply with the provisions of this Law in terms of submission of notifications and warnings significant for the security of the ICT system of special importance, and to establish communication and cooperation aimed at eliminating the harmful effects of incidents and undertaking preventive actions. description_en: The device or system must generate tamper-proof audit logs for all queries, transmissions, and modifications involving personal data. Logs must include operation type, timestamp, user identity, and affected data objects.
description_zh: 设备或系统必须对所有涉及个人数据的查询、传输和修改操作生成防篡改的审计日志。日志记录必须包含操作类型、时间戳、操作用户身份及受影响的数据对象。
notes_en: This requirement primarily targets management interfaces or backend systems processing personal data. For pure forwarding network devices, if they do not store or process user PII, it may only apply to control plane operation logs.
notes_zh: 此要求主要针对处理个人数据的管理界面或后端系统。对于纯转发网络设备，若其不存储或处理用户个人身份信息，可能仅适用于管理平面的操作日志。
regulation_name: Austria Network and Information System Security Act
title_en: Audit Logs for Personal Data Operations
title_zh: 个人数据操作审计日志
verification_method_en: Perform query, modification, and export operations on personal data; verify that system logs record these actions. Attempt to modify log files to verify tamper-proof mechanisms (e.g., hash chains or read-only storage).
verification_method_zh: 执行个人数据的查询、修改和导出操作，检查系统日志是否记录了上述行为，并尝试修改日志文件以验证其防篡改机制（如哈希链或只读存储）。

description_en: Using IGPs Assessment of contributing outcomes is primarily a matter of expert judgement and the IGPs do not remove the requirement for the informed use of cyber security expertise and sector knowledge. IGPs will usually provide good starting points for assessments but should be used flexibly and in conjunction with the NCSC guidance associated with the top-level cyber security and resilience principles. The exception would be when an IGP may not be applicable if there are compensating measures that would meet the requirements of the relevant objective.

IGPs will usually provide good starting points for assessments but should be used flexibly and in conjunction with the NCSC guidance associated with the top-level cyber security and resilience principles. The exception would be when an IGP may not be applicable if there are compensating measures that would meet the requirements of the relevant objective.

description_en: The device must not use an incremental counter method for password generation (where multiple passwords are identical except for a small number of changing characters, e.g., 'password1' and 'password2'). All pre-installed or hardware-related passwords must be unique and non-sequential.
description_zh: 设备不得使用增量计数器方法生成密码（即多个密码仅通过少量字符变化来区分，如“password1”和“password2”）。所有预装或硬件相关的密码必须是唯一且非序列化的。
notes_en: This requirement applies to hardware passwords, pre-installed software passwords, and mandatory installable software passwords when the product is not in the factory default state.
notes_zh: 此要求适用于产品不在工厂默认状态时使用的硬件密码、预装软件密码以及为实现预期用途必须安装的软件密码。
regulation_name: Cyber Security (Security Standards for Smart Devices) Rules 2025
title_en: Prohibit incremental counter passwords
title_zh: 禁止使用增量计数器生成密码
verification_method_en: Inspect the factory default or pre-set password list to verify that no password sequences exist that differ only by incremental digits or characters. Analyze the password generation algorithm to confirm that incremental counter logic is not used.
verification_method_zh: 检查设备出厂默认密码或预置密码列表，验证是否存在仅通过末尾数字或字符递增形成的密码序列。尝试分析密码生成算法，确认未使用增量计数器逻辑。

description_en: The device must enforce via technical means or policy that users do not share account credentials, ensuring unique identity identifiers for each user, and prompt users to keep authentication data secure.
description_zh: 设备必须通过技术手段或管理策略强制要求用户不得共享账户凭据，确保每个用户使用独立的身份标识进行访问，并提示用户妥善保管认证数据。
notes_en: Regulation explicitly prohibits sharing devices and authentication data, requiring translation into product-level user awareness prompts or technical restrictions.
notes_zh: 法规明确禁止共享设备和认证数据，需转化为产品层面的用户意识提示或技术限制。
regulation_name: Argentina Minimum Information Security Requirements for Public Sector Bodies
title_en: Prohibit sharing of authentication credentials
title_zh: 禁止共享认证凭证
verification_method_en: Check if the user manual or UI contains security warnings against sharing credentials; verify if the system supports individual user accounts rather than only shared default accounts.
verification_method_zh: 检查用户手册或系统界面是否包含禁止共享凭据的安全警告；验证系统是否支持独立用户账户而非仅共享默认账户。

description_en: 27 COSTA RICAN NATIONAL CYBERSECURITY STRATEGY 2023 - 2027 With the support of: The 2023-2027 National Cybersecurity Strategy will include public interventions with the goal of achieving objectives established in the 2023-2026 National Development and Public Investment Plan (PNDIP) (MIDEPLAN, 2023a) and that are related to cybersecurity. For instance, this includes a goal of 25,938 individuals participating in spaces to promote awareness on cybersecurity 19 between 2023 and 2026, as well as the goal of 40 security and disarmament diplomacy activities 20 to be implemented during the same period. notes_zh: 这是一个持续性义务，要求产品在生命周期内保持合规。

title_en: Source clause - Incident Reporting and Response requirement
title_zh: 原文条款 - 事件报告与响应要求
verification_method_en: Review incident reporting procedures, deadlines, notification templates, and exercise or response records.
verification_method_zh: 检查事件报告流程、时限要求、通知模板和演练/真实处置记录。

description_en: The product must fully retain security event logs. When major security incidents such as service interruption affecting more than 2 hours, unauthorized access, user data leakage occur, the manufacturer shall report incident details to the NIS2 designated regulator of the EU member state where the product is sold within 24 hours, including impact scope, temporary disposal measures, root cause analysis, and subsequent repair plan.
description_zh: 产品必须完整留存安全事件相关日志，发生影响超过2小时的服务中断、未授权访问、用户数据泄露等重大安全事件时，厂商需在24小时内向产品销售地欧盟成员国NIS2指定监管机构上报事件详情，包含影响范围、临时处置措施、根因分析、后续修复计划。
notes_en: No exemption conditions, all applicable products sold in the EU market must meet this requirement.
notes_zh: 无豁免条件，所有面向欧盟市场销售的适用产品均需满足。
regulation_name: Directive (EU) 2022/2555 of the European Parliament and of the Council on measures for a high common level of cybersecurity across the Union, amending Regulation (EU) No 910/2014 and repealing Directive (EU) 2016/1148 (NIS 2 Directive)
title_en: Major Incident Reporting
title_zh: 重大安全事件上报
verification_method_en: Check the manufacturer's incident response process document, simulate triggering major security incidents, verify reporting timeliness and content completeness; check whether the product log retention capability meets incident traceability requirements.
verification_method_zh: 检查厂商事件响应流程文档，模拟触发重大安全事件，验证上报时效和内容完整性；检查产品日志留存能力是否满足事件追溯要求。

description_en: (6) The list referred to in Paragraph four of this Section shall be reviewed at least once in t of this Section to the National Cybersecurity Centre. (6) The list referred to in Paragraph four of this Section shall be reviewed at least once in two years. The National Cybersecurity Centre shall ensure the submission of compiled information on the number, fields of activity, and provided services of the providers of essential and important services to the European Commission, the NIS Cooperation Group and also, upon request, other competent authorities of the European Union.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：(6) The list referred to in Paragraph four of this Section shall be reviewed at least once in t of this Section to the National Cybersecurity Centre. (6) The list referred to in Paragraph four of this Section shall be reviewed at least once in two years. The National Cybersecurity Centre shall ensure the submission of compiled information on the number, fields of activity, and provided services of the providers of essential and important services to the European Commission, the NIS Cooperation Group and also, upon request, other competent authorities of the European Union.

description_en: Article 25 (1) Cybersecurity requirements include procedures and measures that essential and important entities shall apply in order to achieve a high level of cybersecurity in providing their services or performing their activities, and they consist of the following: ‒ cybersecurity risk-management measures, and ‒ the obligation to notify significant incidents and significant cyber threats. (2) Cybersecurity requirements refer to all network and information systems that essential or important entities use in their operations or in providing their services and all services that essential and important entities provide or activities they perform, regardless of whether the entity also provides other services or also performs other activities that are not included in Annex I and Annex II to this Act.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：Article 25 (1) Cybersecurity requirements include procedures and measures that essential and important entities shall apply in order to achieve a high level of cybersecurity in providing their services or performing their activities, and they consist of the following: ‒ cybersecurity risk-management measures, and ‒ the obligation to notify significant incidents and significant cyber threats. (2) Cybersecurity requirements refer to all network and information systems that essential or important entities use in their operations or in providing their services and all services that essential and important entities provide or activities they perform, regardless of whether the entity also provides other services or also performs other activities that are not included in Annex I and Annex II to this Act.

description_en: 1.The following terms used in this law shall have the following definitions, respectively: 4.1.1."cyber security" shall mean the fulfillment of safety, confidentiality, and accessibility of information within cyber environments; 4.1.2."cyberspace" shall mean tangible and non-tangible platforms that consist of internet and other information and communication networks, and inter-dependent systems that ensure their operation; 4.1.3."cyber environment" shall mean the information systems, and information network environments that allow accessing, login, collection, processing, storing, and use of information;

description_en: Vendor must establish a maintenance process ensuring that within 24 months of initial certification, updated versions can be validated for compliance via the Continuity of Assurance process. Major updates beyond 24 months require full re-certification.
description_zh: 产品供应商必须建立维护流程，确保在初始认证后的24个月内，可通过连续性保证流程（Continuity of Assurance）对更新版本进行低成本合规性确认。超过24个月的重大更新需重新进行完整认证评估。
notes_en: Regulation explicitly states maintenance requests can only be made within 24 months following certification.
notes_zh: 法规明确指出维护请求只能在认证后24个月内提出。

verification_method_zh: 审查维护协议和时间戳，确认在产品认证日期后24个月内的更新是否使用了规定的连续性保证流程，以及超过该期限的处理方式。

notes_en: Products that fail the surveillance will have their conformance labels revoked, and need to be rectified before re-applying for certification.
notes_zh: 监督不通过的产品将被撤销合规标签，需整改后重新申请认证。

description_en: Without prejudice to Article 28, ENISA shall not divulge to third parties information that it processes or receives in relation to which a reasoned request for confidential treatment has been made. Members of the Management Board, the Executive Director, the members of the ENISA Advisory Group, external experts participating in ad hoc working groups, and members of the staff of ENISA, including officials seconded by Member States on a temporary basis, shall comply with the confidentiality requirements of Article 339 TFEU, even after their duties have ceased. ENISA shall lay down, in its internal rules of operation, the practical arrangements for implementing the confidentiality rules referred to in paragraphs 1 and 2.

ENISA shall lay down, in its internal rules of operation, the practical arrangements for implementing the confidentiality rules referred to in paragraphs 1 and 2.

description_en: Devices providing web-based management or public services must enforce HTTPS (TLS 1.2 or higher) to encrypt data transmission between users and the server; plain HTTP is prohibited.
description_zh: 设备若提供基于Web的管理界面或公共服务，必须强制启用HTTPS（TLS 1.2及以上版本）以加密用户与服务器之间的数据传输，禁止使用明文HTTP协议。
notes_en: Although the regulation targets public entities, this encryption standard is applied as a general compliance requirement for all network devices providing web services to ensure digital trust.
notes_zh: 法规原文针对公共实体，但作为通用网络设备合规要求，所有提供Web服务的设备均需满足此加密标准以确保数字信任。
regulation_name: Peru Digital Trust Framework Regulation Supreme Decree No. 126-2025-PCM
title_en: Mandatory TLS for Web Traffic
title_zh: Web服务强制启用TLS加密
verification_method_en: Attempt to access the management interface via HTTP (port 80); it should redirect to HTTPS or deny connection. Use SSL scanning tools to verify TLS version is >= 1.2.
verification_method_zh: 尝试通过HTTP端口（80）访问管理界面，应被重定向至HTTPS或拒绝连接；使用SSL扫描工具验证TLS版本是否>=1.2。

description_en: Article 23 In the case of incidents classified as “very high” severity level incidents that constitute an information security crisis, the management and coordination of the measures and tasks implementation shall be undertaken by the Government. description_en: The product must undergo independent security evaluation by an ANSSI-accredited evaluation center to verify compliance with CSPN Level 1 requirements. The evaluation must include analysis of conformity to security specifications and measurement of security function effectiveness.
description_zh: 产品必须通过由ANSSI授权的评估中心进行的独立安全评估，以验证其符合CSPN一级安全认证要求。评估过程需涵盖对安全规格一致性的分析及安全功能有效性的测量。
notes_en: This is a prerequisite for obtaining CSPN certification, representing a mandatory compliance engineering process rather than an internal technical feature.
notes_zh: 这是获得CSPN认证的前提条件，而非产品内部的技术功能规格，但属于必须满足的合规工程流程。

verification_method_zh: 检查是否持有有效的ANSSI CSPN证书，并核实评估报告由授权实验室出具。

description_en: The device must secure internal communication links connecting different parts of the product to prevent unauthorized access or eavesdropping.
description_zh: 设备必须对连接产品不同部件的内部通信链路进行安全保护，防止未经授权的访问或窃听。
notes_en: Applies to devices containing multiple internal components or sub-modules connected via buses/interfaces.
notes_zh: 适用于包含多个内部组件或通过总线/接口连接子模块的设备。

title_en: Secure Internal Communication Links
title_zh: 内部通信链路安全
verification_method_en: Analyze traffic between internal components via packet capture to verify the use of encryption protocols or isolation mechanisms.
verification_method_zh: 通过抓包分析内部组件间通信流量，验证是否采用加密协议或隔离机制。

description_en: Device firmware or configuration must include logical restrictions ensuring users cannot transmit any data outside Egypt, and must not contain network components for providing M2M services outside Egypt.
description_zh: 设备固件或配置必须包含逻辑限制，确保用户无法将任何数据传出埃及境外，且不得包含用于在埃及境外提供M2M服务的网络组件。
notes_en: This requirement primarily targets IoT devices and gateways with WAN connectivity capabilities.
notes_zh: 此要求主要针对具备广域网连接能力的IoT设备及网关。
regulation_name: Egypt NTRA Internet of Things Regulatory Framework
title_en: Prohibit Cross-border M2M Data
title_zh: 禁止跨境M2M数据与服务
verification_method_en: Attempt to configure the device to route data to servers outside Egypt and verify connection blocking; inspect code for foreign M2M service components.
verification_method_zh: 尝试配置设备将数据路由至埃及境外的服务器，验证连接是否被阻断；检查代码中是否存在境外M2M服务组件。

description_en: Firewall/UTM products must possess the capability to deeply parse passing data streams and implement granular access control and security protection functions based on parsing results, capable of blocking unauthorized access.
description_zh: 防火墙/UTM产品必须具备对经过的数据流进行深度解析的能力，并基于解析结果实现细粒度的访问控制及安全防护功能，能够阻断非法访问。
notes_en: This is a fundamental definition requirement for firewall-class products, requiring support for stateful inspection or deeper packet parsing.
notes_zh: 这是防火墙类产品的基本定义要求，必须支持状态检测或更深层次的包解析。
regulation_name: Catalogue of Critical Network Equipment and Specialized Cybersecurity Products
title_en: Firewall Stream Parsing and Control
title_zh: 防火墙数据流解析与控制
verification_method_en: Construct traffic containing specific application-layer protocols or anomalous features to verify if the device can correctly parse and allow or block the traffic according to policies.
verification_method_zh: 构造包含特定应用层协议或异常特征的流量，验证设备是否能正确解析并依据策略允许或阻断该流量。

description_en: The product shall have the capability to generate and export a summary report of operation results within 30 days after the operation is finished, enabling the organization to submit it to the Office. The report shall include security event statistics, system status, and key configuration changes.
description_zh: 产品应具备在操作完成后30天内生成并导出运营结果摘要报告的能力，以便组织向办公室提交。报告应包含安全事件统计、系统状态和关键配置变更。
notes_en: The regulation requires the organization to submit reports, so the product must provide the technical means to generate such reports.
notes_zh: 法规要求组织提交报告，因此产品必须提供生成此类报告的技术手段。

description_en: The device must have the capability to identify and log computer security incidents, including detailed descriptions, timestamps, and response actions, ensuring all critical security events are traceable and analyzable.
description_zh: 设备必须具备识别和记录计算机安全事件的能力，包括事件的详细描述、发生时间及响应动作，确保所有关键安全事件可被追溯和分析。
notes_en: Applicable to network devices used by critical information system subjects. Ensure log format complies with subsequent CERT reporting requirements.
notes_zh: 适用于关键信息系统主体使用的网络设备。需确保日志格式符合后续CERT上报要求。

title_zh: 计算机事件识别与记录
verification_method_en: Inspect the device logging system to confirm it generates security event logs containing event description, time, and response status; simulate attacks or anomalies to verify correct logging.
verification_method_zh: 检查设备日志系统，确认是否能生成包含事件描述、时间和响应状态的安全事件日志；模拟攻击或异常行为，验证日志是否被正确记录。

description_en: Article 28 The Office for Information Security (hereinafter referred to as the “Office”) shall be established to perform tasks of prevention of and protection against risks and incidents in ICT systems in the Republic of Serbia, as a special organisation within the m eaning of the law governing the status of public administration. The work of the Office shall be managed by the Director, who shall be a person with appropriate professional qualifications and at least five years of work experience in the field of information security, appointed by the Government in accordance with the law governing the status of civil servants. The Office shall have a Deputy Director, who must be a person of appropriate expertise with at least five years of work experience in the field of information security, appointed in accordance with the regulations governing the status of civil servants and who shall have the powers in accordance with the regulations governing public administration.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：Article 28 The Office for Information Security (hereinafter referred to as the “Office”) shall be established to perform tasks of prevention of and protection against risks and incidents in ICT systems in the Republic of Serbia, as a special organisation within the m eaning of the law governing the status of public administration. The work of the Office shall be managed by the Director, who shall be a person with appropriate professional qualifications and at least five years of work experience in the field of information security, appointed by the Government in accordance with the law governing the status of civil servants. The Office shall have a Deputy Director, who must be a person of appropriate expertise with at least five years of work experience in the field of information security, appointed in accordance with the regulations governing the status of civil servants and who shall have the powers in accordance with the regulations governing public administration.

description_en: The product shall include features supporting business continuity, such as high availability configurations, automatic failover, data backup interfaces, or redundancy mechanisms, to ensure rapid service recovery in the event of disruption.
description_zh: 产品应具备支持业务连续性的功能，如高可用性配置、故障自动切换、数据备份接口或冗余机制，以确保在发生中断时能迅速恢复服务。
notes_en: The regulation explicitly requires consideration of business continuity management. For critical network equipment, this is a core requirement.
notes_zh: 法规明确要求考虑业务连续性管理（Betriebskontinuitätsmanagement）。对于关键网络设备，这是核心要求。
regulation_name: Austria Network and Information System Security Act
title_en: Support Business Continuity Management
title_zh: 支持业务连续性管理
verification_method_en: Test the product's redundancy switchover functions, backup recovery processes, or high-availability cluster configurations to verify service recovery capabilities under simulated failure scenarios.
verification_method_zh: 测试产品的冗余切换功能、备份恢复流程或高可用性集群配置，验证其在模拟故障场景下的服务恢复能力。

description_en: Article 19 Upon receiving an incident notification in the ICT system of special importance, the Office for Information Security shall act in accordance with its competences established by law,and shall collect, analyse and exchange information on the risks to the security of the ICT system, on risks to the security of the ICT system and on the incident itself, and in this regard shall inform, provide support, warn and advise the operator s of ICT systems of special importance and shall perform other tasks within its scope of competences. After conducting an analysis, the Office for Information Security shall determine the severity level of the incident.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：Article 19 Upon receiving an incident notification in the ICT system of special importance, the Office for Information Security shall act in accordance with its competences established by law,and shall collect, analyse and exchange information on the risks to the security of the ICT system, on risks to the security of the ICT system and on the incident itself, and in this regard shall inform, provide support, warn and advise the operator s of ICT systems of special importance and shall perform other tasks within its scope of competences. After conducting an analysis, the Office for Information Security shall determine the severity level of the incident.

description_en: The availability, integrity and confidentiality of information systems and data must all be addressed by the organisation. This would normally include a) management policies, b) management structure with well-defined responsibilities, c) processes for risk management (see 1.1.3), d) established risk tolerances (see 1.1.4), e) ensure sufficient resources and specialist skills to support the management. f) Establish structures and processes for security management if such do not exist.

notes_en: This requirement focuses on the ongoing compliance obligation after certification, rather than specific technical patching timeframes.
notes_zh: 此要求侧重于获得认证后的持续合规义务，而非具体的技术修补时间窗口。

description_en: Product documentation must explicitly list the origin, supplier name, and ownership structure of core hardware and software components to ensure source diversity and transparency, without concealing risks of foreign government control or influence.
description_zh: 产品文档必须明确列出核心软硬件组件的来源地、供应商名称及所有权结构，确保来源的多样性和透明度，不得隐瞒外国政府控制或影响的风险。
notes_en: Special attention must be paid to the risk of malicious exploitation by foreign governments.
notes_zh: 需特别关注是否存在外国政府恶意利用的风险。

title_en: Product Source Transparency Disclosure

verification_method_zh: 检查产品技术白皮书或合规声明中的组件来源清单及供应商背景调查结果。

Section

verification_method_en: Verify governance documents, product design evidence, test reports, and clause-level conformity statements.
verification_method_zh: 核验制度文件、产品设计证据、测试报告和与原文条款对应的符合性说明。

description_en: The device must provide an emergency response mechanism (e.g., one-click isolation, port shutdown, or dynamic ACL deployment) allowing administrators to rapidly isolate affected systems or network segments upon detection of a security incident.
description_zh: 设备必须提供紧急响应机制（如一键隔离、端口关闭或ACL动态下发），允许管理员在检测到安全事件时迅速隔离受影响系统或网络部分。
notes_en: The regulation requires licensees to activate containment measures; the device must provide the technical capabilities to support this operation.
notes_zh: 法规要求持牌机构激活遏制措施，设备需提供相应的技术能力支持此操作。
regulation_name: Bahrain CBB Insurance Rulebook Cyber Security Risk Management
title_en: Emergency Isolation and Containment Feature
title_zh: 紧急隔离与遏制功能
verification_method_en: Simulate a security incident and test if the administrator can quickly execute isolation operations (e.g., shutting down specific VLANs, ports, or blocking IPs) via the management interface or API, and verify that network connectivity is interrupted as expected.
verification_method_zh: 模拟安全事件，测试管理员能否通过管理界面或API快速执行隔离操作（如关闭特定VLAN、端口或阻断IP），并验证网络连通性是否按预期中断。

description_en: Information system owners shall protect information systems pursuant to regulations in Articles 22, 23 and 24 of this law. Information systems owners using state budget shall perform according the responsibilities set forth in item 1 hereof and shall: a) Have plans for network information protection that are appraised by competent state bodies when the information system is established, expanded or upgraded.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：Information system owners shall protect information systems pursuant to regulations in Articles 22, 23 and 24 of this law. Information systems owners using state budget shall perform according the responsibilities set forth in item 1 hereof and shall: a) Have plans for network information protection that are appraised by competent state bodies when the information system is established, expanded or upgraded.

description_en: Security measures of service provider’s system [RT I, 30.12.2025, 4 – entry into force 01.01.2026] (1) A service provider implements, on a permanent basis, appropriate and proportionate technical, operational and organisational security measures in order to: 1) manage risks posed to the security of the system used in the activities of the service provider or in providing the service, including by preparing a corresponding risk assessment; 2) prevent or minimise the impact of a cyber incident on the recipient of the service provided by the service provider and on another service; [RT I, 30.12.2025, 4 – entry into force 01.01.2026] (2) In implementing security measures, the following are taken into account: 1) the needs and security requirements of the service provider;

description_en: The product manufacturer must establish a complete supply chain traceability system, record the source, version, and license information of all hardware components, open source software, and third-party code, and can respond to EU regulators' supply chain security queries within 72 hours, providing complete bill of materials (BOM) and software composition analysis (SCA) reports.
description_zh: 产品厂商必须建立完整的供应链追溯体系，记录所有硬件组件、开源软件、第三方代码的来源、版本、许可证信息，能够在72小时内响应欧盟监管机构的供应链安全查询，提供完整的物料清单（BOM）和软件成分分析（SCA）报告。
notes_en: No exemption conditions.
notes_zh: 无豁免条件。
regulation_name: Directive (EU) 2022/2555 of the European Parliament and of the Council on measures for a high common level of cybersecurity across the Union, amending Regulation (EU) No 910/2014 and repealing Directive (EU) 2016/1148 (NIS 2 Directive)
title_en: Supply Chain Traceability Requirement
title_zh: 供应链可追溯要求
verification_method_en: Check the manufacturer's supply chain management documents, simulate supply chain security queries, and verify whether BOM and SCA reports that meet the requirements can be provided within 72 hours.
verification_method_zh: 检查厂商的供应链管理文档，模拟供应链安全查询，验证是否能在72小时内提供符合要求的BOM和SCA报告。

description_en: (1) A person shall not use a computer online service, an internet service, or a local internet bulletin board service or any other electronic device to compile, transmit, publish, reproduce, buy, sell, receive, exchange, or disseminate the name, telephone number, electronic mail address, residence address, picture, physical description, characteristics, or any other identifying information on a child in furtherance of an effort to arrange a meeting with the child for the purpose of engaging in sexual intercourse, sexually explicit conduct, or unlawful sexual activity .
