description_en: Section 4 Strategically important service § 25 (1) A strategically important service is a regulated service whose disruption could have a serious impact on the security of the Czech Republic or internal order The Government shall issue a regulation specifying the services that meet the conditions for strategically important services pursuant to the first sentence. § 26 (1) The provider of regulated service shall notify the Agency of changes to the regulated service if they in result meet the conditions of a strategically important service pursuant to § 25(1) within 60 days of the date of the change to the regulated service. (2) If the regulated service ceases to meet the conditions of a strategically important service pursuant to § 25(1) the procedure shall be similar to the procedure for cancellation of the registration of a regulated service pursuant to § 10.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：Section 4 Strategically important service § 25 (1) A strategically important service is a regulated service whose disruption could have a serious impact on the security of the Czech Republic or internal order The Government shall issue a regulation specifying the services that meet the conditions for strategically important services pursuant to the first sentence. § 26 (1) The provider of regulated service shall notify the Agency of changes to the regulated service if they in result meet the conditions of a strategically important service pursuant to § 25(1) within 60 days of the date of the change to the regulated service. (2) If the regulated service ceases to meet the conditions of a strategically important service pursuant to § 25(1) the procedure shall be similar to the procedure for cancellation of the registration of a regulated service pursuant to § 10.

description_en: OPEN BANKING REGULATORY FRAMEWORK 66 8.10 Internal Complaint Resolution Process 8.10.1 A Licensee must, at a minimum: (a) Have a role or function that handles customer complaints and operates a complaint handling system that facilitates the recording, tracking, categorization, and status of complaints; (b) Make an easy-to-use template form for filing complaints available to customers and provide accessible means, along with clear instructions, on where such complaints can be submitted. description_en: Devices must contain security features sufficient to protect against modification of software and firmware by any unauthorized parties. For Wireless APs, ensure unauthorized parties cannot alter the list of available frequencies and power levels sent to the access point.
description_zh: 设备必须包含安全功能，足以保护软件和固件免受任何未授权方的修改。对于无线接入点，必须确保未授权方无法更改发送给接入点的可用频率和功率电平列表。
notes_en: This requirement is based on FCC section 302 authority, aiming to secure unlicensed national information infrastructure devices.
notes_zh: 此要求基于FCC section 302 authority，旨在保护未经许可的国家信息基础设施设备。
regulation_name: Cyber Trust Mark Program Final Rule
title_en: Prevent Unauthorized Firmware Modification
title_zh: 防止未授权修改固件
verification_method_en: Attempt to modify firmware binaries or configuration parameters (e.g., frequency/power) via unauthorized interfaces or tools; verify that the system rejects the operation and logs the security event.
verification_method_zh: 尝试通过非授权接口或工具修改固件二进制文件或配置参数（如频率/功率），验证系统是否拒绝该操作并记录安全事件。

description_en: state or to the European Union Agency for Cybersecurity or to another organisation information related to the prevention of and response to a cyber in state or to the European Union Agency for Cybersecurity or to another organisation information related to the prevention of and response to a cyber incident for the performance of the tasks provided in § 5 of this Act or of an obligation arising from European Union law, or in the cases and in accordance with the rules provided in an international agreement, provided the forwarded information does not prejudice national security or criminal proceedings. The forwarding of such information is mandatory in particular where a cyber incident with a significant impact concerns two or more Member States of the European Union, in which case the relevant information concerning the cyber incident with a significant impact must be forwarded to the affected foreign state and to the European Union Agency for Cybersecurity.

description_en: A clear security policy document must be provided, detailing the security rules that the cryptographic module must adhere to during operation, derived from Appendix A requirements and vendor-specific additional rules.
description_zh: 必须提供明确的安全策略文档，详细规定密码模块运行期间必须遵守的安全规则，这些规则应源自附录A的安全要求及供应商附加规则。
notes_en: The security policy is a core document for certification application and must remain consistent with the implementation code.
notes_zh: 安全策略是认证申请的核心文件之一，必须与实现代码保持一致。

description_en: de seguridad, en aplicación del principio de diferenciación de responsabilidades a que se refiere el artículo 11 y según se detalla en la sección 3.1 del anexo II, deberá ser conocida por todas las personas que formen parte de la organización e identificar de forma inequívoca a los responsables de velar por su cumplimiento, los cuales tendrán las siguientes funciones: a) El responsable de la información determinará los requisitos de la información tratada b) El responsable del servicio determinará los requisitos de los servicios prestados. c) El responsable de la seguridad determinará las decisiones para satisfacer los requisitos de seguridad de la información y de los servicios, supervisará la implantación de las medidas necesarias para garantizar que se satisfacen los requisitos y reportará sobre estas cuestiones. d) El responsable del sistema, por sí o a través de recursos propios o contratados, se encargará de desarrollar la forma concreta de implementar la seguridad en el sistema

description_en: Periodically assess the maturity, coverage, and effectiveness of all cyber security controls. The assessment must include an analysis of the controls' effectiveness in reducing the likelihood and probability of a successful attack.
description_zh: 必须定期评估所有网络安全控制的成熟度、覆盖范围和有效性。评估内容必须包括分析这些控制在降低成功攻击可能性和概率方面的实际效果。
notes_en: This requirement focuses on continuous monitoring and assessment of the effectiveness of existing security measures, rather than just technical configuration.
notes_zh: 此要求侧重于对现有安全措施有效性的持续监控和评估，而非单纯的技术配置。

verification_method_en: Verify governance documents, product design evidence, test reports, and clause-level conformity statements.

description_en: A European cybersecurity certificate that refers to assurance level ‘substantial’ shall provide assurance that the ICT products, ICT servic rtaken. A European cybersecurity certificate that refers to assurance level ‘substantial’ shall provide assurance that the ICT products, ICT services, ICT processes or managed security services for which that certificate is issued meet the corresponding security requirements, including security functionalities, and that they have been evaluated at a level intended to minimise the known cybersecurity risks, and the risk of incidents and cyberattacks carried out by actors with limited skills and resources. The evaluation activities to be undertaken shall include at least the following: a review to demonstrate the absence of publicly known vulnerabilities and testing to demonstrate that the ICT products, ICT services, ICT processes or managed security services correctly implement the necessary security functionalities.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：A European cybersecurity certificate that refers to assurance level ‘substantial’ shall provide assurance that the ICT products, ICT servic rtaken. A European cybersecurity certificate that refers to assurance level ‘substantial’ shall provide assurance that the ICT products, ICT services, ICT processes or managed security services for which that certificate is issued meet the corresponding security requirements, including security functionalities, and that they have been evaluated at a level intended to minimise the known cybersecurity risks, and the risk of incidents and cyberattacks carried out by actors with limited skills and resources. The evaluation activities to be undertaken shall include at least the following: a review to demonstrate the absence of publicly known vulnerabilities and testing to demonstrate that the ICT products, ICT services, ICT processes or managed security services correctly implement the necessary security functionalities.

regulation_name: EU Cybersecurity Act Regulation (EU) 2019/881
title_en: Article 52 - Security Updates and Vulnerability Management requirement
title_zh: Article 52 - 安全更新与漏洞管理要求
verification_method_en: Verify vulnerability handling, security update mechanisms, remediation records, and update integrity evidence.
verification_method_zh: 核验漏洞处理流程、安全更新机制、修复记录和发布证据，并抽样验证更新完整性。

description_en: Article 25 Operators of ICT systems of special importance shall, in addition to the incident notifications referred to in Article 13 of this Law, submit to the authority or the organisation responsible for National CERT statistical data on all incidents in the ICT system, including near misses, in the previous year until 28 February of the current year at the latest. The authority or the organisation referred to in paragraph 1 of this Article shall submit reports on statistical data to the Ministry and shall publish them on its official website.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：Article 25 Operators of ICT systems of special importance shall, in addition to the incident notifications referred to in Article 13 of this Law, submit to the authority or the organisation responsible for National CERT statistical data on all incidents in the ICT system, including near misses, in the previous year until 28 February of the current year at the latest. The authority or the organisation referred to in paragraph 1 of this Article shall submit reports on statistical data to the Ministry and shall publish them on its official website.

title_en: Article 25 - Incident Reporting and Response requirement
title_zh: Article 25 - 事件报告与响应要求
verification_method_en: Review incident reporting procedures, deadlines, notification templates, and exercise or response records.
verification_method_zh: 检查事件报告流程、时限要求、通知模板和演练/真实处置记录。

description_en: Certified products must not undergo arbitrary hardware, firmware, or software configuration changes without re-application or notification. Any change affecting security attributes may result in certification cancellation.
description_zh: 获得认证的产品不得在未重新申请认证或报备的情况下进行任意硬件、固件或软件配置的变更。任何可能影响安全属性的变更都可能导致认证取消。
notes_en: A strict configuration management and version control system is required to support this requirement.
notes_zh: 需建立严格的配置管理和版本控制体系以支持此要求。
regulation_name: KISA IoT Security Certification
title_en: Prohibition of Unauthorized Product Changes
title_zh: 禁止擅自变更认证产品
verification_method_en: Review product change management process to ensure mechanisms prevent unauthorized changes; compare current product version hash or configuration baseline with the certified submission version.
verification_method_zh: 审查产品变更管理流程，确认是否有机制防止未经授权的变更；对比当前产品版本与认证提交版本的哈希值或配置基线。

description_en: The device must strictly prohibit the use of the CIPHERUNICORN-E algorithm for 64-bit block encryption. If supported, it must be disabled by default and not enableable via standard UI, or completely removed from the codebase.
description_zh: 设备在实现64位块加密功能时，严禁使用CIPHERUNICORN-E算法。若产品支持该算法，必须在配置中默认禁用且无法通过常规用户界面启用，或在代码层面彻底移除该算法实现。
notes_en: This algorithm is listed as a 'Non-approved Security Function' and is not recognized under the JCMVP system for certified scenarios.
notes_zh: 该算法被列为‘非承认セキュリティ機能’（非认可安全功能），在JCMVP制度下不被认可用于需要认证的场景。
regulation_clause: Section 2, Common Key, <64-bit Block Cipher> Item 1
regulation_name: Limited Security Functions
title_en: Prohibit CIPHERUNICORN-E Algorithm
title_zh: 禁止使用CIPHERUNICORN-E算法
verification_method_en: Inspect source code or configuration manuals to confirm absence of CIPHERUNICORN-E implementation; or attempt to invoke the algorithm via black-box testing to verify it is rejected or unavailable.
verification_method_zh: 检查产品密码模块源代码或配置手册，确认未包含CIPHERUNICORN-E算法实现；或通过黑盒测试尝试调用该算法，验证其是否被拒绝或不可用。

description_en: In accordance with the national security framework, the Government shall implement the following authority regarding ensuring cyber security : 10.1. incorporate cyber security within development policy and planning documents, facilitate the implementation of legislation accordingly ; adopt the rules, organizational structure, staff positions of the national center against cyber-attacks and violations and the public center, the operational procedure of the centers, and their operational requirements ;

description_en: When stream cipher is required, the device must support at least one of the following algorithms: Enocoro-128v2, MUGI, or MULTI-S01. Implementation must comply with the respective CRYPTREC technical specifications.
description_zh: 设备在需要使用流加密算法时，必须支持以下至少一种算法：Enocoro-128v2, MUGI, 或 MULTI-S01。实现必须符合各自对应的CRYPTREC技术规格书版本。
notes_en: Stream ciphers are less common in modern network protocols, mainly used in specific embedded or legacy scenarios.
notes_zh: 流密码在现代网络协议中较少使用，主要用于特定嵌入式或遗留场景。
regulation_name: Limited Security Functions
title_en: Support Specified Stream Ciphers
title_zh: 支持指定流加密算法
verification_method_en: Inspect device encryption configuration interface or API to confirm support for at least one of the listed algorithms; verify stream cipher functionality via testing tools.
verification_method_zh: 检查设备加密配置界面或API，确认是否支持上述算法之一；通过测试工具验证流加密功能。

description_en: Definitions In this Law, the following terms shall be construed as follows: 1. Network information security means the protection of network information and information systems against any illegal access, use, disclosure, interruption, amendment or sabotage in order to ensure the integrity, confidentiality and availability of information. Information system means any assembly of hardware, software and database which is purposely set up for establishment, supply, communication, collection, handling, storage and exchange of network information.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：Definitions In this Law, the following terms shall be construed as follows: 1. Network information security means the protection of network information and information systems against any illegal access, use, disclosure, interruption, amendment or sabotage in order to ensure the integrity, confidentiality and availability of information. Information system means any assembly of hardware, software and database which is purposely set up for establishment, supply, communication, collection, handling, storage and exchange of network information.

description_en: Lorsqu'un instrument juridique sectoriel de l'Union europenne impose aux entits qui entrent dans le champ d'application de la prsente loi d'adopter des mesures de gestion des risques en matire de cyberscurit ou de notifier des incidents significatifs et lorsque ces exigences ont un effet au moins quivalent celui des obligations prvues par la prsente loi, les dispositions pertinentes de la prsente loi ne sont pas applicables ces entits.

description_en: ENISA shall provide the secretariat of the Stakeholder Cybersecurity Certification Group pursuant to Article 22(4). description_en: Article 24 Operators of ICT systems of special importance shall: 1) Submit reports on an incident, for the duration of the incident, with the description of measures undertaken to address the incident, to the single incident notification system, as follows: (1) Every three days in the event of medium-level incidents; 2) Submit notifications and additional reports on important events related to the incident and the activities they undertake, acting on request from the Office for Information Security; 3) Submit a final report on the incident within 15 days of the date when the incident ceases, which shall contain the following information: (1) The type and description of the incident, (2) The type of threat and the cause of the incident;
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：Article 24 Operators of ICT systems of special importance shall: 1) Submit reports on an incident, for the duration of the incident, with the description of measures undertaken to address the incident, to the single incident notification system, as follows: (1) Every three days in the event of medium-level incidents; 2) Submit notifications and additional reports on important events related to the incident and the activities they undertake, acting on request from the Office for Information Security; 3) Submit a final report on the incident within 15 days of the date when the incident ceases, which shall contain the following information: (1) The type and description of the incident, (2) The type of threat and the cause of the incident;

description_en: ENISA shall maintain a dedicated website providing information on, and publicising, European cybersecurity certification schemes, European cybersecurity certificates and EU statements of conformity, including information with regard to European cybersecurity certification schemes which are no longer valid, to withdrawn and expired European cybersecurity certificates and EU statements of conformity, and to the repository of links to cybersecurity information provided in accordance with Article 55. Where applicable, the website referred to in paragraph 1 shall also indicate the national cybersecurity certification schemes that have been replaced by a European cybersecurity certification scheme.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：ENISA shall maintain a dedicated website providing information on, and publicising, European cybersecurity certification schemes, European cybersecurity certificates and EU statements of conformity, including information with regard to European cybersecurity certification schemes which are no longer valid, to withdrawn and expired European cybersecurity certificates and EU statements of conformity, and to the repository of links to cybersecurity information provided in accordance with Article 55. Where applicable, the website referred to in paragraph 1 shall also indicate the national cybersecurity certification schemes that have been replaced by a European cybersecurity certification scheme.

description_en: Obligation to arrange to carry out computer-system security audits (1) A CI operator must— (a) arrange to carry out, in accordance with subsection (3), an audit in respect of the computer-system security of the critical computer systems of the critical infrastructure operated by the operator (computer-system security audit)— (i) for the first computer-system security audit arranged to be carried out—within 24 months after the operator’s designation date ( first period); and (b) submit to the regulating authority that regulates the operator a report for the audit— (i) subject to subparagraph (ii), within 3 months after the expiry of the period within which the audit is required under paragraph (a) to be carried out;

description_en: (2) The providers of essential services and important services shall, without delay but not later than within two weeks, notify the National Cybersecurity Centre of any changes in the information indicated in the notification referred to in Paragraph one of this Section. (3) The National Cybersecurity Centre shall, without delay, forward the notifications referred to in Paragraphs one and two of this Section to the European Union Agency for Cybersecurity, except for the information referred to in Paragraph one, Clause 4 of this Section and other information the disclosure of which is in contradiction with the interests of national security. description_en: Article 8 (1) If, for essential and important entities from individual sectors from Annex I and Annex II to this Act, special laws prescribe requirements, which in their content and purpose correspond to the cybersecurity requirements referred to in this Act, or pose mo re rigorous requirements, the corresponding provisions of that special law shall apply to these entities in matters that are regulated in relation to these requirements and their implementation, including provisions on supervision over the implementation of the requirements. (2) The requirements referred to in paragraph 1 of this Article shall correspond to the cybersecurity requirements from this Act in their content and purpose if: ‒ they are at least equivalent in effect to cybersecurity risk -management measures laid down in this Act

(2) The requirements referred to in paragraph 1 of this Article shall correspond to the cybersecurity requirements from this Act in their content and purpose if: ‒ they are at least equivalent in effect to cybersecurity risk -management measures laid down in this Act

description_en: Tinjauan hasil evaluasi dilakukan terhadap pemenuhan seluruh persyaratan sertifikasi dan kesesuaian proses sertifikasi, mulai dari pengajuan permohonan sertifikasi, pelaksanaan seleksi dan determinasi serta tindakan perbaikan dari Sponsor dan/atau Developer jika ada. Tinjauan has il evaluasi dinyatakan dalam bentuk rekomendasi tertulis tentang pemenuhan persyaratan acuan CC:2022 revisi 1 - bagian 2, CC:2022 revisi 1-bagian 3, CC:2022 revisi 1-bagian 5 dan SNI ISO/IEC 15408 -2:2022, SNI ISO/IEC 15408 -3:2022, serta SNI ISO/IEC 15408 -5:2022 yang diajukan oleh Sponsor dan/atau Developer untuk Produk yang diajukan untuk disertifikasi. Tinjauan hasil evaluasi harus dilakukan oleh orang atau sekelompok orang yang tidak terlibat dalam proses penilaian.

description_en: ENISA shall support operational cooperation among Member States, Union institutions, bodies, offices and agencies, and between stakeholders. ENISA shall cooperate at the operational level and establish synergies with Union institutions, bodies, offices and agencies, including the CERT-EU, with the services dealing with cybercrime and with supervisory authorities dealing with the protection of privacy and personal data, with a view to addressing issues of common concern, including by means of: (a) the exchange of know-how and best practices; (c) the establishment of practical arrangements for the execution of specific tasks, after consulting the Commission.

description_en: All stakeholders must manage cybersecurity risks in a manner both transparent and consistent with human rights and the fundamental values of the Costa Rican Republic. All stakeholders must take responsibility for comprehensive cybersecurity risk management, observing the role they hold under the country’s cybersecurity governance framework. All stakeholders must cooperate, even beyond the country’s borders, to promote a secure cyber environment.

verification_method_en: Verify governance documents, product design evidence, test reports, and clause-level conformity statements.

description_en: The device must strictly prohibit the use of the CIPHERUNICORN-E algorithm for 64-bit block encryption. If supported, it must be disabled by default and non-enablable via standard UI, or completely removed from the codebase.
description_zh: 设备在实现64位块加密功能时，严禁使用CIPHERUNICORN-E算法。若产品支持该算法，必须在配置中默认禁用且无法通过常规用户界面启用，或在代码层面彻底移除该算法实现。
notes_en: According to JCMVP, this is a non-approved security function and must not be used in scenarios requiring compliance certification.
notes_zh: 依据JCMVP制度，此为非承认（非批准）的安全功能，不得用于需要合规认证的场景。
regulation_clause: Section 2, Common Key, <64-bit Block Cipher> Item 1
regulation_name: Limited Security Functions
title_en: Prohibit CIPHERUNICORN-E Algorithm
title_zh: 禁止使用CIPHERUNICORN-E算法
verification_method_en: Inspect source code or configuration manuals to confirm absence of CIPHERUNICORN-E implementation; or attempt to invoke the algorithm interface via black-box testing to verify rejection.
verification_method_zh: 检查密码模块源代码或配置手册，确认未包含CIPHERUNICORN-E算法实现；或通过黑盒测试尝试调用该算法接口，验证是否返回错误或被拒绝。

description_en: 30 COSTA RICAN NATIONAL CYBERSECURITY STRATEGY 2023 - 2027 To ensure and guarantee the conditions required for a national cybersecurity ecosystem that is safe, resilient, and inclusive, effectively protecting national critical infrastructures, the public and private sectors, and citizens from cyber threats. The 2023-2027 National Cybersecurity Strategy establishes actions dedicated to all sectors of the economy and society, from central government administrative institutions to leaders across all industries and citizens, in order to achieve both 4.7.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：30 COSTA RICAN NATIONAL CYBERSECURITY STRATEGY 2023 - 2027 To ensure and guarantee the conditions required for a national cybersecurity ecosystem that is safe, resilient, and inclusive, effectively protecting national critical infrastructures, the public and private sectors, and citizens from cyber threats. The 2023-2027 National Cybersecurity Strategy establishes actions dedicated to all sectors of the economy and society, from central government administrative institutions to leaders across all industries and citizens, in order to achieve both 4.7.

description_en: Product software/firmware must not contain any undocumented mechanisms (backdoors) that allow unauthorized access to the equipment. Backdoors, whether intentionally or accidentally introduced, are prohibited.
description_zh: 产品软件/固件中不得包含任何未文档化的、允许未经授权访问设备的机制（后门）。无论是故意还是意外引入的后门均被禁止。
notes_en: This requirement applies to the final product version delivered to users.
notes_zh: 此要求适用于最终交付给用户的完整产品版本。
regulation_name: ANATEL Ato 77 Cybersecurity Requirements for Telecommunications Equipment
title_en: Prohibit backdoor mechanisms
title_zh: 禁止存在后门机制
verification_method_en: Conduct code audits and penetration testing, specifically searching for hardcoded credentials, hidden management interfaces, or undisclosed service ports.
verification_method_zh: 进行代码审计和渗透测试，专门搜索硬编码凭证、隐藏的管理接口或未公开的服务端口。

description_en: The device must provide a mechanism allowing administrators to tag stored or transmitted data packets, logs, or files with classification labels (e.g., Core Data, Important Data, General Data) to enable differentiated protection policies.
description_zh: 设备必须提供机制，允许管理员对存储或传输的数据包、日志或文件添加分类标签（如：核心数据、重要数据、一般数据），以便实施差异化保护策略。
notes_en: Based on Article 21 of the Data Security Law, China establishes a data classification and grading protection system. Network devices, as key infrastructure for data processing, must have the capability to identify and tag data levels to support upper-layer policies.
notes_zh: 依据《数据安全法》第二十一条，国家建立数据分类分级保护制度。网络设备作为数据处理的关键基础设施，需具备识别和标记数据等级的能力以配合上层策略。
regulation_name: 中华人民共和国数据安全法
title_en: Support Data Classification Tagging
title_zh: 支持数据分类分级标记
verification_method_en: Inspect the management interface for data classification label configuration options and verify if labels can be applied to specific data flows.
verification_method_zh: 检查管理界面是否提供数据分类标签配置选项，并验证能否对特定数据流应用标签。

description_en: Les exigences vises au paragraphe 1er, alina 1er, sont considres comme ayant un effet quivalent aux obligations de la prsente loi lorsque: 1 les mesures de gestion des risques en matire de cyberscurit ont un effet au moins quivalent celui des mesures vises l'article 30; ou 2 l'instrument juridique sectoriel de l'Union europenne prvoit un accs immdiat, s'il y a lieu automatique et direct, aux notifications d'incidents pour le CSIRT national et lorsque les exigences relatives la notification des incidents significatifs sont au moins quivalentes aux obligations vises aux articles 34 37.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：Les exigences vises au paragraphe 1er, alina 1er, sont considres comme ayant un effet quivalent aux obligations de la prsente loi lorsque: 1 les mesures de gestion des risques en matire de cyberscurit ont un effet au moins quivalent celui des mesures vises l'article 30; ou 2 l'instrument juridique sectoriel de l'Union europenne prvoit un accs immdiat, s'il y a lieu automatique et direct, aux notifications d'incidents pour le CSIRT national et lorsque les exigences relatives la notification des incidents significatifs sont au moins quivalentes aux obligations vises aux articles 34 37.

description_en: The device must support the CIPHERUNICORN-A block cipher algorithm, implemented in accordance with the 'Cryptographic Technology Specification CIPHERUNICORN-A'.
description_zh: 设备必须支持CIPHERUNICORN-A块加密算法，实现需符合《暗号技術仕様書 CIPHERUNICORN-A》技术规范。
notes_en: Applicable to products with specific compliance requirements for Japanese domestic cryptographic standards.
notes_zh: 适用于对日本本土加密标准有特定合规要求的产品。

description_en: GOVERNANCE AND COMPLIANCE REQUIREMENTS 6.1 Management Structure 6.1.1 Appointment of Senior Management: Licensees shall appoint Senior Management, responsible for managing and operating the Licensee's current activities. The Senior Management team shall, at a minimum, include: (a) Chief executive officer/General manager; 6.1.2 Combination of functions: Considering the nature, scale, and complexity of operations, and subject to the Central Bank’s discretion, the same person may occupy the role of the compliance officer and money laundering reporting officer.

description_en: The device must strictly prohibit the use of the CIPHERUNICORN-E algorithm for 64-bit block cipher operations. If supported, it must be disabled by default and non-enablable, or completely removed from the codebase.
description_zh: 设备在实现64位块加密功能时，严禁使用CIPHERUNICORN-E算法。若产品支持该算法，必须在配置中默认禁用且无法启用，或在代码层面完全移除该算法实现。
notes_en: Under JCMVP, this is a non-approved security function and must not be used as a valid security mechanism in compliant products.
notes_zh: 依据JCMVP制度，此为非承认（不推荐/未批准）的安全功能，在合规产品中不得作为有效安全机制使用。
regulation_clause: Section 2, Common Key, <64-bit Block Cipher> Item 1
regulation_name: Limited Security Functions
title_en: Prohibit CIPHERUNICORN-E Algorithm
title_zh: 禁止使用CIPHERUNICORN-E算法
verification_method_en: Inspect source code or configuration menus to ensure CIPHERUNICORN-E is absent; or attempt to invoke the algorithm interface via black-box testing to verify it returns an error or 'not supported'.
verification_method_zh: 检查密码模块源代码或配置菜单，确认不存在CIPHERUNICORN-E算法选项；或通过黑盒测试尝试调用该算法接口，验证是否返回错误或不支持。

description_en: The administration of importation of network information security products shall comply with regulations of this Law, regulations of relevant laws. The importation by an agency, organization, or individual who enjoys diplomatic preferences and exemptions shall be governed by laws on customs, preference and exemption applicable to representatives for diplomatic bodies, consulates and international organizations in Vietnam. In cases that Vietnam has not technical norms of network information security equivalent to the imported network information security product, the international agreements and treaties to which the Socialist Republic of Vietnam is a member state shall apply.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：The administration of importation of network information security products shall comply with regulations of this Law, regulations of relevant laws. The importation by an agency, organization, or individual who enjoys diplomatic preferences and exemptions shall be governed by laws on customs, preference and exemption applicable to representatives for diplomatic bodies, consulates and international organizations in Vietnam. In cases that Vietnam has not technical norms of network information security equivalent to the imported network information security product, the international agreements and treaties to which the Socialist Republic of Vietnam is a member state shall apply.

description_en: The Licensee shall dentification of Customer only for that period of time that is necessary for the purposes for which the Customer Data is processed. description_en: Rights of the Constitution Protection Bureau The Constitution Protection Bureau shall have the following rights: 1) to request and receive from the owners and legal possessors of the critical infrastructure of information and communication technologies information on the information and communication technologies in their ownership and possession, the cybersecurity and cyber risk management measures implemented and planned thereby, and also cyber incidents, near misses, cyber threats, and vulnerabilities; 2) to provide instructions to ensure the fulfilment of the obligations specified in this Law for the owners and legal possessors of the critical infrastructure of information and communication technologies or to prevent threat to national security; 3) to take the decisions (also to issue an administrative act) necessary to ensure the fulfilment of the obligations specified in this Law or to prevent threat to national security or cyber threat;
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：Rights of the Constitution Protection Bureau The Constitution Protection Bureau shall have the following rights: 1) to request and receive from the owners and legal possessors of the critical infrastructure of information and communication technologies information on the information and communication technologies in their ownership and possession, the cybersecurity and cyber risk management measures implemented and planned thereby, and also cyber incidents, near misses, cyber threats, and vulnerabilities; 2) to provide instructions to ensure the fulfilment of the obligations specified in this Law for the owners and legal possessors of the critical infrastructure of information and communication technologies or to prevent threat to national security; 3) to take the decisions (also to issue an administrative act) necessary to ensure the fulfilment of the obligations specified in this Law or to prevent threat to national security or cyber threat;

description_en: The product must provide configurable technical security features to support users in establishing a security level commensurate with the risk, considering the state of the art. This includes but is not limited to system integrity protection, access control mechanisms, and intrusion detection capabilities.
description_zh: 产品必须提供可配置的技术安全功能，以支持用户根据现有技术水平和风险评估结果，建立与风险相称的安全防护级别。这包括但不限于系统完整性保护、访问控制机制和入侵检测能力。
notes_en: Based on § 21(1), digital service providers must take appropriate and proportionate technical and organizational measures. This translates to the product having the necessary technical capabilities for user deployment.
notes_zh: 依据§ 21(1)，数字服务提供商必须采取适当且相称的技术和组织措施。此要求转化为产品必须具备相应的技术能力供用户部署。

title_en: Implement Appropriate Technical Security Measures
title_zh: 实施适当的技术安全措施
verification_method_en: Review product technical documentation and security feature lists to verify the provision of industry-standard security configuration options and assess their effectiveness in mitigating known reasonably foreseeable risks.
verification_method_zh: 审查产品技术文档和安全功能列表，验证是否提供了符合行业标准的安全配置选项，并评估其是否能有效缓解已知的合理可预见风险。

description_en: (2) A person who fails to take any measure or comply with any requirement directed by the Minister under subsection (1) commits an offence and is liable on conviction to a fine not exceeding one hundred thousand penalty units or to imprisonment for a term not exceeding three months or to both. description_en: Article 14 Operators of ICT systems of special importance shall submit incident notifications to the single incident notification system via the official website of the Ministry or the Office for Information Security. description_en: The product must close all unused service ports in the factory default state, only open necessary management and business ports; support user-defined port access control policies, can restrict access sources based on IP address, protocol, port number, and prohibit direct public network access to management ports by default.
description_zh: 产品出厂默认状态下必须关闭所有未使用的服务端口，仅开放必要的管理和业务端口；支持用户自定义端口访问控制策略，可基于IP地址、协议、端口号限制访问来源，默认禁止公网直接访问管理端口。
notes_en: No exemption conditions.
notes_zh: 无豁免条件。
regulation_name: Directive (EU) 2022/2555 of the European Parliament and of the Council on measures for a high common level of cybersecurity across the Union, amending Regulation (EU) No 910/2014 and repealing Directive (EU) 2016/1148 (NIS 2 Directive)
title_en: Idle Ports Closed by Default
title_zh: 默认关闭闲置端口
verification_method_en: Perform full port scan on the product in factory state to confirm whether idle ports are closed; check whether custom access control policies are supported, and test whether public IP can directly access the management port.
verification_method_zh: 对出厂状态的产品进行全端口扫描，确认闲置端口是否关闭；检查是否支持自定义访问控制策略，测试公网IP是否能直接访问管理端口。

description_en: The device must retain at least 6 months of historical security logs and configuration change records to support readiness assessments for coping with cyber threats held by the Office. Logs must include timestamps, event types, source/destination IPs, and operation results.
description_zh: 设备必须保留至少6个月的历史安全日志和配置变更记录，以支持办公室（Office）举行的应对网络威胁的准备情况评估。日志必须包含时间戳、事件类型、源/目的IP及操作结果。
notes_en: Storage capacity must be planned based on log generation rates to ensure minimum retention period requirements are met.
notes_zh: 存储容量需根据日志生成速率进行规划，确保满足最低保留期限要求。
regulation_name: Thailand Cybersecurity Act B.E. 2562 (2019)
title_en: Support Security Readiness Assessment
title_zh: 支持安全就绪评估
verification_method_en: Attempt to query log records generated 6 months ago on the device to confirm data integrity and completeness of fields (time, IP, event type).
verification_method_zh: 尝试查询设备中6个月前生成的日志记录，确认数据未丢失且字段完整（时间、IP、事件类型）。

description_en: Cooperation of the Competent Authorities with the Competent Authorities of Other European Union Member States (1) If a provider of essential services or a provider of important services provides services in more than one European Union Member State or provides services in one or more European Union Member States and its network and information systems are located in one or several other European Union Member States, the National Cybersecurity Centre, the Constitution Protection Bureau, and computer security incident response teams shall, if necessary, cooperate with the competent authorities of other European Union Member States: 1) inform the competent authorities of other relevant European Union Member States through the National Cybersecurity Centre and exchange information on the supervision and enforcement measures taken; 3) upon receipt of a justified request for mutual assistance from the competent authority of another European Union Member State, provide assistance to the respe

description_en: Section 6 Ensuring the availability of a strategically important service § 33 (1) The provider of a strategically important service shall ensure the availability of a strategically important service within the necessary scope, at the specified time and quality from the territory of the Czech Republic. (2) The provider of a strategically important service shall test the ability to ensure the provision of a strategically important service within the necessary scope from the territory of the Czech Republic at least once every two years and draw up a report about the test. (3) The provider of a strategically important service shall begin to comply with the obligations referred to in paragraphs 1 and 2 in relation to each strategically important service within 1 year of the day the respective regulated service became a strategically important service.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：Section 6 Ensuring the availability of a strategically important service § 33 (1) The provider of a strategically important service shall ensure the availability of a strategically important service within the necessary scope, at the specified time and quality from the territory of the Czech Republic. (2) The provider of a strategically important service shall test the ability to ensure the provision of a strategically important service within the necessary scope from the territory of the Czech Republic at least once every two years and draw up a report about the test. (3) The provider of a strategically important service shall begin to comply with the obligations referred to in paragraphs 1 and 2 in relation to each strategically important service within 1 year of the day the respective regulated service became a strategically important service.

description_en: Products must undergo independent security functionality evaluation based on Common Criteria (ISO/IEC 15408) and Common Evaluation Methodology (CEM, ISO/IEC 18045) to obtain MyCC certification.
description_zh: 产品必须依据通用准则（Common Criteria, ISO/IEC 15408）和通用评估方法（CEM, ISO/IEC 18045）进行独立的安全功能评估，以获取MyCC认证。
notes_en: The MyCC scheme aims to ensure ICT product security functions perform as claimed and gain global recognition (CCRA) through independent evaluation.
notes_zh: MyCC方案旨在确保ICT产品的安全功能符合声明，并通过独立评估获得全球认可（CCRA）。

title_en: Adhere to Common Criteria Evaluation
title_zh: 遵循通用准则评估
verification_method_en: Verify if the product holds a valid MyCC certificate or ongoing evaluation report, confirming that the evaluation standards cite ISO/IEC 15408 and ISO/IEC 18045.
verification_method_zh: 检查产品是否持有有效的MyCC证书或正在进行的评估报告，确认评估标准引用了ISO/IEC 15408和ISO/IEC 18045。

description_en: The device must strictly prohibit the use of the Hierocrypt-L1 algorithm for 64-bit block encryption. Ensure this algorithm is not activated or invoked in any cryptographic service list.
description_zh: 设备在实现64位块加密功能时，严禁使用Hierocrypt-L1算法。必须确保该算法不在任何加密服务列表中被激活或调用。
notes_en: This algorithm is listed as a non-approved security function and does not meet JCMVP certification requirements.
notes_zh: 此算法被列为非承认安全功能，不符合JCMVP认证要求。

verification_method_en: Scan firmware binaries or libraries for Hierocrypt-L1 signatures; verify that API documentation does not contain identifiers for this algorithm.

description_en: The product must pass the cybersecurity label evaluation organized by TAICS, and test results must conform to the IoT cybersecurity test specifications and evaluation specifications to obtain the corresponding security level (Level 1/2/3) certification mark.
description_zh: 产品必须通过TAICS组织的网络安全标签评估，测试结果需符合IoT网络安全测试规范及评估规范的要求，以获取相应安全等级（Level 1/2/3）的认证标记。
notes_en: Obtaining the mark only indicates that the tested samples conform to the specifications; it does not guarantee that the device will be absolutely immune to attacks in actual use. Manufacturers must ensure continuous compliance.
notes_zh: 获得标记仅表示送测样品符合规范，不保证设备在实际使用中绝对不被攻击。制造商需确保持续合规。

verification_method_en: Verify that the product holds a valid TAICS cybersecurity label certification certificate and check that the security level on the certificate matches the product claim.

description_en: Article 51a Security objectives of European cybersecurity certification schemes for managed security services A European cybersecurity certification scheme for managed security services shall be designed to achieve, as applicable, at least the following security objectives: (a) that the managed security services are provided with the requisite competence, expertise and experience, including that the staff tasked with providing those services have a sufficient and appropriate level of technical knowledge and competence in the specific field, sufficient and appropriate experience, and the highest degree of professional integrity; (b) that the provider has appropriate internal procedures in place to ensure that the managed security services are provided at a sufficient and appropriate level of quality at all times;
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：Article 51a Security objectives of European cybersecurity certification schemes for managed security services A European cybersecurity certification scheme for managed security services shall be designed to achieve, as applicable, at least the following security objectives: (a) that the managed security services are provided with the requisite competence, expertise and experience, including that the staff tasked with providing those services have a sufficient and appropriate level of technical knowledge and competence in the specific field, sufficient and appropriate experience, and the highest degree of professional integrity; (b) that the provider has appropriate internal procedures in place to ensure that the managed security services are provided at a sufficient and appropriate level of quality at all times;

description_en: The product must provide configurable security feature modules (such as Access Control Lists, firewall rules, encryption toggles) that allow users to enable or disable specific security measures based on risk assessment results, aligning with widely recognized security practices and international standards.
description_zh: 产品必须提供可配置的安全功能模块（如访问控制列表、防火墙规则、加密开关），允许用户根据风险评估结果启用或禁用特定安全措施，以符合广泛认可的安全实践和国际标准。
notes_en: Requires the product to have flexibility to adapt to different organizations' risk assessment results.
notes_zh: 要求产品具备灵活性，以适应不同组织的风险评估结果。

verification_method_en: Review the product management interface to confirm the existence of at least three configurable security control options; check if the user manual provides configuration guides based on risk scenarios.
verification_method_zh: 审查产品管理界面，确认存在至少三种可配置的安全控制选项；检查用户手册是否提供基于风险场景的配置指南。

verification_method_en: Verify governance documents, product design evidence, test reports, and clause-level conformity statements.
verification_method_zh: 核验制度文件、产品设计证据、测试报告和与原文条款对应的符合性说明。

description_en: Devices must implement encryption measures for data collected, stored, processed, or transmitted to ensure confidentiality and integrity. Industry-standard encryption algorithms (e.g., AES-256 or higher) must be used to protect data at rest and in transit.
description_zh: 设备必须对收集、存储、处理或传输的数据实施加密措施，确保数据的机密性和完整性。必须使用符合行业标准的加密算法（如AES-256或更高）来保护静态数据和传输中的数据。
notes_en: Applies to all products involving data processing. Clearly distinguish between encryption requirements for data at rest and data in transit.
notes_zh: 适用于所有涉及数据处理的产品。需明确区分静态数据和传输数据的加密要求。
regulation_name: UAE National IoT Security Policy
title_en: Protect Data Confidentiality and Integrity
title_zh: 数据机密性完整性保护
verification_method_en: Inspect device configuration and code to confirm data encryption is enabled and verify the encryption algorithms meet standards. Use packet capture to verify that transmitted data is encrypted.
verification_method_zh: 检查设备配置和代码，确认是否启用了数据加密功能，并验证使用的加密算法是否符合标准。通过抓包分析验证传输数据是否加密。

description_en: The device must strictly prohibit the use of the CIPHERUNICORN-E algorithm for 64-bit block encryption. If supported, it must be disabled by default and non-enablable via standard UI, or completely removed from the codebase.
description_zh: 设备在实现64位块加密功能时，严禁使用CIPHERUNICORN-E算法。若产品支持该算法，必须在配置中默认禁用且无法通过常规用户界面启用，或在代码层面彻底移除该算法实现。
notes_en: According to JCMVP, this is a non-approved security function and must not be used in scenarios requiring compliance certification.
notes_zh: 依据JCMVP制度，此为非承认（非批准）的安全功能，不得用于需要合规认证的场景。
regulation_clause: Section 2, Common Key, <64-bit Block Cipher> Item 1
regulation_name: Limited Security Functions
title_en: Prohibit CIPHERUNICORN-E Algorithm
title_zh: 禁止使用CIPHERUNICORN-E算法
verification_method_en: Inspect source code or configuration manuals to confirm absence of CIPHERUNICORN-E implementation; or attempt to invoke the algorithm interface via black-box testing to verify rejection.
verification_method_zh: 检查密码模块源代码或配置手册，确认未包含CIPHERUNICORN-E算法实现；或通过黑盒测试尝试调用该算法接口，验证是否返回错误或被拒绝。

description_en: 6.8.10 Security and fraud incident management: Licensees shall establish comprehensive procedures for handling security and fraud incidents, including: (a) Identifying individuals responsible for assisting Customers in cases of fraud or security incidents and disclosing the name and email addresses of point of contact for Customers; (b) Establishing reporting lines for such incidents; (c) Establishing procedures for escalating incidents internally and reporting such incidents to external parties such as the Central Bank;

description_en: When data is tagged as 'National Core Data' or 'Important Data', the device must enforce stricter Access Control Lists (ACLs) or firewall rules, defaulting to deny all access requests that are not explicitly authorized.
description_zh: 当数据被标记为‘国家核心数据’或‘重要数据’时，设备必须强制执行更严格的访问控制列表（ACL）或防火墙规则，默认拒绝所有未明确授权的访问请求。
notes_en: Based on Article 21 of the Data Security Law, a stricter management system is implemented for national core data.
notes_zh: 依据《数据安全法》第二十一条，对国家核心数据实行更加严格的管理制度。
regulation_name: 中华人民共和国数据安全法
title_en: Strict Access Control for Core Data
title_zh: 核心数据严格访问控制
verification_method_en: Configure an access rule for data marked as core data, attempt unauthorized access, and verify that the connection is blocked.
verification_method_zh: 配置一条针对标记为核心数据的访问规则，尝试未经授权的访问，验证连接是否被阻断。

description_en: The device must restrict logical access to local and network interfaces, allowing access to protocols and services only by authorized individuals, services, and components. Unused ports and services must be disabled by default.
description_zh: 设备必须对本地和网络接口的逻辑访问进行限制，仅允许授权用户、服务及设备组件访问相关协议和服务。默认情况下应禁用未使用的端口和服务。
notes_en: Applies to all logical interfaces exposed to users, including Web UI, SSH, Telnet, SNMP, etc.
notes_zh: 适用于所有暴露给用户的逻辑接口，包括Web UI、SSH、Telnet、SNMP等。

verification_method_en: Attempt to access management interfaces and non-essential service ports via unauthorized accounts or default configurations to verify access denial; check if the list of open ports adheres to the principle of least privilege.
verification_method_zh: 尝试通过未授权账户或默认配置访问管理接口及非必要服务端口，验证访问是否被拒绝；检查开放端口列表是否符合最小化原则。

description_en: Tasks of the National Cybersecurity Centre (1) The National Cybersecurity Centre shall have the following tasks: 1) to coordinate cooperation in cybersecurity matters with the competent authorities and single points of contact of other European Union Member States, the European Commission, the European Union Agency for Cybersecurity, and other competent authorities of the European Union; 2) to cooperate with the providers of essential services and important services for the determination of the security level of their information systems; 3) to implement supervisory functions, including to supervise how the providers of essential services and important services are fulfilling their obligations specified in this Law;
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：Tasks of the National Cybersecurity Centre (1) The National Cybersecurity Centre shall have the following tasks: 1) to coordinate cooperation in cybersecurity matters with the competent authorities and single points of contact of other European Union Member States, the European Commission, the European Union Agency for Cybersecurity, and other competent authorities of the European Union; 2) to cooperate with the providers of essential services and important services for the determination of the security level of their information systems; 3) to implement supervisory functions, including to supervise how the providers of essential services and important services are fulfilling their obligations specified in this Law;

description_en: (1) An owner of critical information infrastructure shall designate or appoint a Chief Information Security Officer on such terms and conditions as the owner may determine. (2) Without prejudice to paragraph (1), owners of critical information infrastructure may jointly appoint a single Chief Information Security Officer, provided that the officer is accessible by each owner. (3) The Chief Information Security Officer shall, amongst other duties, be— (a) responsible for – (i) cybersecurity matters in the organization in which the critical information infrastructure is domiciled;

(3) The Chief Information Security Officer shall, amongst other duties, be— (a) responsible for – (i) cybersecurity matters in the organization in which the critical information infrastructure is domiciled;

description_en: an enterprise, the rules for determining the size of an enterprise under Commission Recommendation 2003/361/EC, including the special rules provided n enterprise, the rules for determining the size of an enterprise under Commission Recommendation 2003/361/EC, including the special rules provided for in this Act, shall apply mutatis mutandis. § 8 Regime of the provider of regulated service (1) The provider of regulated service is subject to the higher obligations regime if it is of significant economic, social or security importance for the Czech Republic because of its size, number of users, geographic spread of the service, impact on the functioning of a sector or another provider of regulated service, or the riskiness of its operation. description_en: The device must support sending operational logs and security event data to the monitoring system in real-time or near real-time, enabling the monitoring system to identify indicators of compromise and trigger alerts.
description_zh: 设备必须支持以实时或近实时方式向监控系统发送操作日志和安全事件数据，以便监控系统能够识别网络攻击指标并触发警报。
notes_en: Although the regulation uses 'should', real-time capability is a prerequisite for effective incident response in engineering implementation, recommended as a high-priority feature.
notes_zh: 虽然法规使用'should'，但在工程实现上，实时性是有效事件响应的前提，建议作为高优先级特性实现。
regulation_name: Bahrain CBB Insurance Rulebook Cyber Security Risk Management
title_en: Support real-time log data transmission
title_zh: 支持实时日志数据传输
verification_method_en: Test the latency between log generation on the device and reception by the monitoring system; confirm that log content contains sufficient event details to support Indicator of Compromise (IoC) identification.
verification_method_zh: 测试设备生成日志后，监控系统接收日志的延迟时间；确认日志内容包含足够的事件细节以支持入侵指标（IoC）识别。

description_en: Purpose of the Law The purpose of the Law is: 1) to improve the security of information and communication technologies, including by laying down requirements for the provision and receipt of essential services and important services, and also for the operation of information and communication technologies; 3) to promote the implementation of cybersecurity measures so that a cyber threat could be anticipated, prevented and also overcome and its consequences could be liquidated in a timely manner, ensuring, as far as possible, the continuity of the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of services.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：Purpose of the Law The purpose of the Law is: 1) to improve the security of information and communication technologies, including by laying down requirements for the provision and receipt of essential services and important services, and also for the operation of information and communication technologies; 3) to promote the implementation of cybersecurity measures so that a cyber threat could be anticipated, prevented and also overcome and its consequences could be liquidated in a timely manner, ensuring, as far as possible, the continuity of the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of services.

description_en: Cybersecurity Act, 2020 28 Act 1038 (2) The Authority shall, within thirty days of receipt of an application for a licence, inform the applicant in writing of the decision of the Authority. (4) Where the Authority refuses to grant a licence, the Authority shall within twenty-eight days after the refusal communicate in writing the reason for the refusal to grant the licence. (5) A licensed cybersecurity service provider who uses a licence for a purpose other than that for which the licence was granted is liable to pay to the Authority the administrative penalty specified in the Second Schedule.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：Cybersecurity Act, 2020 28 Act 1038 (2) The Authority shall, within thirty days of receipt of an application for a licence, inform the applicant in writing of the decision of the Authority. (4) Where the Authority refuses to grant a licence, the Authority shall within twenty-eight days after the refusal communicate in writing the reason for the refusal to grant the licence. (5) A licensed cybersecurity service provider who uses a licence for a purpose other than that for which the licence was granted is liable to pay to the Authority the administrative penalty specified in the Second Schedule.

description_en: The device must provide necessary technical interfaces, log export functions, and management permissions to support independent information security audits for customers classified as critical infrastructure. The device must not hinder authorized auditors from accessing security configurations, operational status, and audit logs.
description_zh: 设备必须提供必要的技术接口、日志导出功能及管理权限，以支持被归类为关键基础设施的客户进行独立的信息安全审计。设备不得阻碍授权审计人员访问安全配置、运行状态及审计日志。
notes_en: This requirement mainly targets enterprise and industrial network equipment that may be deployed in critical infrastructure in Ukraine. Home products are usually excluded, but retaining basic audit interfaces is recommended for architectural unity.
notes_zh: 此要求主要针对可能部署在乌克兰关键基础设施中的企业级和工业级网络设备。家用产品通常不在此列，但为了统一架构，建议保留基础审计接口。

title_en: Support Independent Security Audit
title_zh: 支持独立信息安全审计
verification_method_en: Check if product documentation includes an audit support guide; attempt to retrieve complete security configurations and logs via SNMP/Syslog/API using standard audit tools or scripts to verify if there are artificial restrictions or hindrances.
verification_method_zh: 检查产品文档是否包含审计支持指南；尝试使用标准审计工具或脚本通过SNMP/Syslog/API获取完整的安全配置和日志，验证是否存在人为限制或阻碍。

description_en: The device or system must record all security-related events and provide mechanisms to support periodic log reviews to detect potential security incidents. Logs shall include timestamps, event types, and source information.

notes_en: Applicable to all products involving data processing and network connectivity.
notes_zh: 适用于所有涉及数据处理和网络连接的产品。

description_en: The European cybersecurity certification framework shall be established in order to improve the conditions for the functioning of the internal market by increasing the level of cybersecurity within the Union and enabling a harmonised approach at Union level to European cybersecurity certification schemes, with a view to creating a digital single market for ICT products, ICT services, ICT processes and managed security services. The European cybersecurity certification framework shall provide for a mechanism to establish European cybersecurity certification schemes and to attest that the ICT products, ICT services and ICT processes that have been evaluated in accordance with such schemes comply with specified security requirements for the purpose of protecting the availability, authenticity, integrity or confidentiality of stored or transmitted or processed data or the functions or services offered by, or accessible via, those products, services and processes throughout their life cycle
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：The European cybersecurity certification framework shall be established in order to improve the conditions for the functioning of the internal market by increasing the level of cybersecurity within the Union and enabling a harmonised approach at Union level to European cybersecurity certification schemes, with a view to creating a digital single market for ICT products, ICT services, ICT processes and managed security services. The European cybersecurity certification framework shall provide for a mechanism to establish European cybersecurity certification schemes and to attest that the ICT products, ICT services and ICT processes that have been evaluated in accordance with such schemes comply with specified security requirements for the purpose of protecting the availability, authenticity, integrity or confidentiality of stored or transmitted or processed data or the functions or services offered by, or accessible via, those products, services and processes throughout their life cycle

description_en: OPEN BANKING REGULATORY FRAMEWORK 44 6.7.4 Outsourcing agreements: Licensees are required to execute a service level agreement (SLA), with every outsourcing service provider. This agreement shall explicitly outline the scope of service, rights, obligations, confidentiality and encryption requirements, reporting protocols, and the allocation of responsibilities. Further, the SLA shall allow the Central Bank, external auditors, and the Licensee's internal audit and compliance officer unrestricted access to all relevant information and documents held by the outsourcing service provider concerning the outsourced activities.

description_en: The penetration testing report must be submitted to the regulator within two months following the end of the month in which the testing occurred. For example, a June test must be submitted by August 31st.
description_zh: 必须在测试结束所在月份后的两个月内向监管机构提交渗透测试报告。例如，6月的测试需在8月31日前提交。
notes_en: This is a procedural compliance requirement; the product side must ensure it can generate standardized test report formats that meet regulatory requirements.
notes_zh: 此为流程性合规要求，产品侧需确保能生成符合监管要求的标准化测试报告格式。

description_en: When receiving remediation orders from regulatory authorities regarding identified cyber security defects, the product must have the technical capability to implement security patches, configuration changes, or other mitigation measures within the specified deadline, and be able to verify the remediation results.
description_zh: 当收到监管机构关于已识别网络安全缺陷的整改指令时，产品必须具备在指定时间内实施安全补丁、配置更改或其他缓解措施的技术能力，并能够验证整改结果。
notes_en: Although this is an administrative order directed at entities, product engineering must support rapid vulnerability patching and configuration deployment mechanisms to meet the statutory deadline for remediation.
notes_zh: 虽然这是针对实体的行政命令，但产品工程上必须支持快速的漏洞修复和配置下发机制，以满足法定限期整改的要求。
regulation_name: Lithuania Law on Cyber Security
title_en: Respond to Security Defect Remediation Orders
title_zh: 响应安全缺陷整改指令
verification_method_en: Simulate a scenario of receiving a remediation order and test if the product can quickly apply security fixes via remote management or local operations and generate a remediation completion report.
verification_method_zh: 模拟接收整改指令场景，测试产品是否能通过远程管理或本地操作快速应用安全修复，并生成整改完成报告。

description_en: Like any defense program, Cyber-Defense is not hermetically sealed, and the Management is required to decide on the level of risk it is willing to take, considering the costs of controls versus the price of the risk materializing within the organization and its impact on customers, suppliers and national targets. Furthermore, the organization‘s Management must implement mechanisms for handling cyber-events which may occur, in order to reduce the damage to the organization.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：Like any defense program, Cyber-Defense is not hermetically sealed, and the Management is required to decide on the level of risk it is willing to take, considering the costs of controls versus the price of the risk materializing within the organization and its impact on customers, suppliers and national targets. Furthermore, the organization‘s Management must implement mechanisms for handling cyber-events which may occur, in order to reduce the damage to the organization.

description_en: If classified as critical network equipment, Enterprise Routers must have bidirectional throughput ≥12Tbps and routing table capacity ≥550,000 entries. Network Switches must have bidirectional throughput ≥30Tbps and packet forwarding rate ≥10Gpps.
description_zh: 若产品为企业级路由器且被归类为网络关键设备，其整系统双向吞吐量必须≥12Tbps，且整系统路由表容量必须≥55万条。若产品为网络交换机且被归类为网络关键设备，其整系统双向吞吐量必须≥30Tbps，且整系统包转发率必须≥10Gpps。
notes_en: This requirement applies only to high-performance enterprise products defined as 'Critical Network Equipment'. Home routers and standard switches are excluded unless their performance exceeds these thresholds and they are designated as critical by regulators.
notes_zh: 此要求仅适用于被定义为‘网络关键设备’的高性能企业级产品。家用路由器、普通交换机不在此列，除非其性能指标超出上述阈值并被监管认定为关键设备。
regulation_name: Catalogue of Critical Network Equipment and Specialized Cybersecurity Products
title_en: Critical Equipment Performance Thresholds
title_zh: 关键设备性能阈值合规
verification_method_en: Use standard performance testing equipment (e.g., Spirent/Ixia) to test bidirectional throughput and routing/forwarding table capacity under full configuration to verify compliance with specified thresholds.
verification_method_zh: 使用标准性能测试仪表（如Spirent/Ixia）在满配置下测试双向吞吐量和路由表/转发表容量，验证是否达到规定阈值。

description_en: OPEN BANKING REGULATORY FRAMEWORK 31 3.11.5 Licensees shall perform adequate identity checks when any Customer requests a change to any contact details that are useful for the Customer to receive important information and monitor the activities of the Customer’s Payment Accounts. 3.11.6 Following the receipt of consent by Customers, the Licensees shall activate authentication mechanisms to ensure the security of Customer Data. 3.12 Data Security Standards The Licensees shall abide by the data and information security standards listed in Annexure [3] of this Framework.

notes_en: Based on § 6(1)(5) regarding vulnerability handling in system development and maintenance.

description_en: Article 36 The authority or organisation in charge of the National CERT shall establish and maintain a vulnerability database of ICT products and ICT services in the Republic of Serbia and shall enable natural persons and legal entities, as well as manufacturers, suppliers and service providers in the ICT system, to report vul nerabilities in ICT products or ICT services on a voluntary basis, which can be reported anonymously. The vulnerability database of ICT products and ICT services shall contain the following: 1) Data on vulnerabilities; The Government, acting on the proposal of the Ministry, shall lay down the content, the vulnerability verification procedures, the procedures for managing technical vulnerabilities of ICT products and ICT services, and the method of recording and maintaining the database.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：Article 36 The authority or organisation in charge of the National CERT shall establish and maintain a vulnerability database of ICT products and ICT services in the Republic of Serbia and shall enable natural persons and legal entities, as well as manufacturers, suppliers and service providers in the ICT system, to report vul nerabilities in ICT products or ICT services on a voluntary basis, which can be reported anonymously. The vulnerability database of ICT products and ICT services shall contain the following: 1) Data on vulnerabilities; The Government, acting on the proposal of the Ministry, shall lay down the content, the vulnerability verification procedures, the procedures for managing technical vulnerabilities of ICT products and ICT services, and the method of recording and maintaining the database.

description_en: The device must support the deployment and management of network sensors (or sensor systems) to identify and examine computer incidents within the critical information system network. The device shall allow configuration rules defined by authorized bodies (e.g., Data Exchange Agency) to take effect.
description_zh: 设备必须支持部署和管理网络传感器（或传感器系统），以便在关键信息系统网络中识别和检查计算机事件。设备应允许授权机构（如数据交换局）定义的配置规则生效。
notes_en: This requirement primarily targets enterprise-grade devices that are part of critical information infrastructure. Specific configuration rules are determined by the Georgian Data Exchange Agency via normative acts.
notes_zh: 此要求主要针对作为关键信息基础设施一部分的企业级设备。具体配置规则由格鲁吉亚数据交换局通过规范性文件确定。

title_en: Support for Network Sensor Configuration
title_zh: 支持网络传感器配置
verification_method_en: Verify if the device provides interfaces or functions to enable network traffic mirroring, probe deployment, or IDS/IPS sensor integration; test if externally defined configuration policies can be applied.
verification_method_zh: 验证设备是否提供接口或功能以启用网络流量镜像、探针部署或IDS/IPS传感器集成；测试是否可应用外部定义的配置策略。

description_en: Key factors for succeeding with their implementation are management involvement, adequate ICT security expertise and established management and reporting lines. If an organisation fails to implement a recommended security measure, it may face an increased risk which it needs to mitigate. That risk must then be assessed against the organisation’s risk tolerances as well as legislation, industry standards and contracts.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：Key factors for succeeding with their implementation are management involvement, adequate ICT security expertise and established management and reporting lines. If an organisation fails to implement a recommended security measure, it may face an increased risk which it needs to mitigate. That risk must then be assessed against the organisation’s risk tolerances as well as legislation, industry standards and contracts.

Estos instrumentos deben abarcar los requisitos de gobernanza, operacionales y técnicos, definirán las funciones y responsabilidades de las múltiples partes interesadas y darán orientaciones o establecerán mecanismos específicos en relación con la confianza y la seguridad digital (Unión Internacional de Telecomunicaciones (UIT), 2018).

description_en: An electronic communications service provider shall not be criminally liable for providing access and transmitting information on condition that it meets the limitation of liability criteria stipulated in the Electronic Communications and Transactions Act, 2021. Despite any other law, evidence which is obtained by means of any interception effected in contravention of this Act, shall not be admissible in any criminal proceedings except with the leave of the court, and in granting or refusing such leave, the court shall have regard, among other things, to the circumstances in which it was obtained, the potential effect of its admission or exclusion on issues of national security and the unfairness to the accused person that may be occasioned by its admission or exclusion. Aperson who commits an offence under this Act for which no penalty is provided is liable, on conviction— (a) in the case of an individual, to a penalty not exceeding five hundred thousand penalty units or to imprisonme

description_en: OPEN BANKING REGULATORY FRAMEWORK 21 2.5.10 Professional Indemnity Insurance (a) To be granted a license, the Applicant shall, at the time of submitting an application, hold a professional indemnity insurance. (b) The professional indemnity insurance referred to in Article 2.5.10 (a) held by an AISP shall cover their liability to Banks, PSP Licensees, Financial Institutions, or the Customers resulting from unauthorized or fraudulent access to or unauthorized or fraudulent use of a Customer’s Data. (c) The professional indemnity insurance referred to in Article 2.5.10 (a) held by a PISP shall cover liabilities to Banks, PSP Licensees, Financial Institutions, or the Customers for unauthorized Payment Transactions and non-execution, defective, or late execution of Payment Transactions.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：OPEN BANKING REGULATORY FRAMEWORK 21 2.5.10 Professional Indemnity Insurance (a) To be granted a license, the Applicant shall, at the time of submitting an application, hold a professional indemnity insurance. (b) The professional indemnity insurance referred to in Article 2.5.10 (a) held by an AISP shall cover their liability to Banks, PSP Licensees, Financial Institutions, or the Customers resulting from unauthorized or fraudulent access to or unauthorized or fraudulent use of a Customer’s Data. (c) The professional indemnity insurance referred to in Article 2.5.10 (a) held by a PISP shall cover liabilities to Banks, PSP Licensees, Financial Institutions, or the Customers for unauthorized Payment Transactions and non-execution, defective, or late execution of Payment Transactions.

description_en: Customer Protection 8.1 General Principles: A Licensee shall comply in spirit with the following principles, in all their dealings and interactions with the Customers: 8.1.1 Equitable and Fair Treatment The Licensee shall treat all Customers equitably, honestly, and fairly at all stages of their relationship with the Licensee, as further enumerated in Article 8.3 below. 8.1.2 Disclosure and Transparency The Licensee shall ensure that the information about the Open Banking Services provided to or offered to Customers is clear, comprehensible, updated, and concise manner. The information must include, amongst others, the details of the Licensee’s licenses and permissions, the description of the rights and responsibilities of each party, the details of the prices and commissions charged by the Licensee, details of any outsourcing to any third parties utilised in the provision of Open Banking Services, any actual or potential instances of conflict of interest and the mechanism and conseque

description_en: If ECDSA is used (per ANS X9.62-2005, FIPS PUB 186-4, or SEC 1 v2.0), the elliptic curve order must be >= 224 bits, and the hash function output length must be >= 224 bits.
description_zh: 若使用ECDSA数字签名算法（依据ANS X9.62-2005、FIPS PUB 186-4或SEC 1 v2.0），椭圆曲线的阶数必须大于等于224位，且使用的哈希函数输出长度必须大于等于224位。
notes_en: Applies to ECDSA implementations referencing any of the listed standards.
notes_zh: 适用于所有引用标准中的ECDSA实现。

description_en: In order to prevent abuse of this access, the organization must implement monitoring and protection which will ensure that anyone can access only the information they need, and that it is not being used by an unauthorized party. It is also required to ensure that the accessing parties are identified and verified unequivocally. For this purpose, it is required to manage the various users (human and applications) on an ongoing basis, add, abolish or change their privileges as appropriate and record their activities.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：In order to prevent abuse of this access, the organization must implement monitoring and protection which will ensure that anyone can access only the information they need, and that it is not being used by an unauthorized party. It is also required to ensure that the accessing parties are identified and verified unequivocally. For this purpose, it is required to manage the various users (human and applications) on an ongoing basis, add, abolish or change their privileges as appropriate and record their activities.

description_en: Product security functions design and evaluation must be based on ISO/IEC 15408 (Common Criteria) and verified using ISO/IEC 18045 (Common Evaluation Methodology) to meet established security requirements and assurance levels.
description_zh: 产品安全功能的设计与评估必须基于ISO/IEC 15408（通用准则）标准，并使用ISO/IEC 18045（通用评估方法）进行验证，以确保满足既定的安全要求和保证级别。
notes_en: This is the core foundation of the SCCS scheme; all products undergoing evaluation must meet this standard requirement.
notes_zh: 这是SCCS方案的核心基础，所有参与评估的产品必须满足此标准要求。

verification_method_en: Review the Evaluation Technical Report (ETR) to confirm the evaluation process strictly follows ISO/IEC 15408 and ISO/IEC 18045 standards.
verification_method_zh: 审查评估技术报告（ETR），确认评估过程严格遵循ISO/IEC 15408和ISO/IEC 18045标准。

description_en: The Stakeholder Cybersecurity Certification Group shall be established. description_en: The product must comply with BSI-ITSiKV Section 4(1), requiring the manufacturer to be the primary applicant for the IT Security Label to the German Federal Office for Information Security (BSI). If a third party applies, a explicit power of attorney from the manufacturer authorizing all procedural acts must be provided.
description_zh: 产品必须符合BSI-ITSiKV第4(1)条规定，由产品制造商作为主要申请人向德国联邦信息安全办公室（BSI）提交IT安全标签申请。若由第三方代理，必须提供制造商出具的明确授权书，授权其执行所有相关行政程序。
notes_en: This is a prerequisite administrative requirement for obtaining the label, not a technical specification, but mandatory for compliance.
notes_zh: 这是获得标签的前置行政要求，非技术规格，但为合规必要条件。

description_en: The device must support Role-Based Access Control (RBAC), allowing administrators to define user roles (e.g., read-only, operator, admin) and assign minimum necessary permissions to each. By default, no account other than the highest-privilege administrator shall have permission to modify system configurations.
description_zh: 设备必须支持基于角色的访问控制（RBAC），允许管理员定义不同用户角色（如只读、操作员、管理员），并为每个角色分配最小必要权限。默认情况下，除最高权限管理员外，其他账户不得拥有修改系统配置的权限。
notes_en: Corresponds to 'User access control', one of the five technical controls of Cyber Essentials.
notes_zh: 对应Cyber Essentials五大技术控制措施之一的“用户访问控制”。
regulation_name: UK Cyber Essentials
title_en: Role-based access control implementation
title_zh: 基于角色的访问控制
verification_method_en: Attempt to modify system configuration using a low-privilege account, which should be denied; verify support for creating at least three different privilege level roles.
verification_method_zh: 尝试使用低权限账户修改系统配置，预期应被拒绝；检查是否支持创建至少三种不同权限级别的角色。

description_en: Article 17 To ensure coordinated response to high and very high level incidents, the Office for Information Security shall form a permanent operational response team. The Office for Information Security shall establish the criteria for appointment of operational response team members, as well as the performance of duties and tasks of the permanent operational response team. Persons participating in the work of the permanent operational response team shall be required to be certified for handling classified data.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：Article 17 To ensure coordinated response to high and very high level incidents, the Office for Information Security shall form a permanent operational response team. The Office for Information Security shall establish the criteria for appointment of operational response team members, as well as the performance of duties and tasks of the permanent operational response team. Persons participating in the work of the permanent operational response team shall be required to be certified for handling classified data.

description_en: Information system shall be categorized into security levels as follows: a) Level 1 is the level that when an information system is sabotage, it will damage legitimate rights and benefits of organizations, individuals, not public benefits, social order and safety, national defense or security;

description_en: The device must provide mechanisms to restrict and monitor the assignment and use of privileged access rights, supporting separate tagging, audit logging, and periodic review capabilities for accounts with special privileges.
description_zh: 设备必须提供机制以限制和监控特权访问权限的分配和使用，支持对具有特殊权限的账户进行单独标记、审计日志记录及定期审查功能。
notes_en: Applicable to all network devices supporting multi-user management; home routers should also have this feature if remote management is supported.
notes_zh: 适用于所有支持多用户管理的网络设备，家用路由器若支持远程管理也应具备此功能。
regulation_name: Argentina Minimum Information Security Requirements for Public Sector Bodies
title_en: Restrict privileged account access
title_zh: 特权账户访问限制
verification_method_en: Verify if the device supports creating user roles with different permission levels; check if operation logging features exist specifically for administrators or privileged users.
verification_method_zh: 验证设备是否支持创建不同权限级别的用户角色；检查是否具备针对管理员或特权用户的操作日志记录功能。

description_en: Common procedures to ensure cyber security 7. The Government shall adopt the common procedures on ensuring cyber security, prevention, detection and counter-responses. description_en: The device or software must provide a standardized event log export interface or automatic reporting function, supporting formatted output of detected digital security incidents (e.g., intrusion, malware, abnormal traffic) to enable suppliers to fulfill the obligation to notify the National Digital Security Center.
description_zh: 设备或软件必须提供标准化的事件日志导出接口或自动上报功能，支持将检测到的数字安全事件（如入侵、恶意代码、异常流量）格式化输出，以便供应商能够履行向国家数字安全中心通知事件的义务。
notes_en: Although the regulation constrains service providers, network devices as the infrastructure of services must have the capability to generate and export compliant logs; otherwise, service providers cannot meet the reporting requirements of Article 9.1(a).
notes_zh: 虽然法规约束的是服务提供商，但网络设备作为服务的基础设施，必须具备生成和导出合规日志的能力，否则服务商无法满足第9.1(a)条的上报要求。
