description_en: Estas capacidades en seguridad digital son el conjunto de cualidades y aptitudes de un país que le permiten generar un entorno apropiado para abordar, generar conocimientos y aumentar el grado de desarrollo en materia de seguridad digital y pueden describirse teniendo en cuenta el marco de trabajo conceptual establecido por la UIT en el Global Cybersecurity Index 2018 , que se enfoca en 5 tipos de capacidades (legal, técnica, organizacional, de investigación e innovación y de cooperación) que deben tenerse en cuenta al momento de pensar en una cultura nacional de ciberseguridad que permita abordar la 4RI y el futuro digital. Para efectos del presente documento, se entenderán que estas capacidades son un conjunto, que debe tratarse como un todo pues la mejora en las mismas debe ser integral y homogénea.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：Estas capacidades en seguridad digital son el conjunto de cualidades y aptitudes de un país que le permiten generar un entorno apropiado para abordar, generar conocimientos y aumentar el grado de desarrollo en materia de seguridad digital y pueden describirse teniendo en cuenta el marco de trabajo conceptual establecido por la UIT en el Global Cybersecurity Index 2018 , que se enfoca en 5 tipos de capacidades (legal, técnica, organizacional, de investigación e innovación y de cooperación) que deben tenerse en cuenta al momento de pensar en una cultura nacional de ciberseguridad que permita abordar la 4RI y el futuro digital. Para efectos del presente documento, se entenderán que estas capacidades son un conjunto, que debe tratarse como un todo pues la mejora en las mismas debe ser integral y homogénea.

description_en: El acceso controlado a los sistemas de información comprendidos en el ámbito de aplicación de este real decreto deberá estar limitado a los usuarios, procesos, dispositivos u otros sistemas de información, debidamente autorizados, y exclusivamente a las funciones permitidas. Los sistemas de información y su infraestructura de comunicaciones asociada deberán permanecer en áreas controladas y disponer de los mecanismos de acceso adecuados y proporcionales en función del análisis de riesgos, sin perjuicio de lo establecido en la Ley 8/2011, de 28 de abril, por la que se establecen medidas para la protección de las infraestructuras críticas y en el Real Decreto 704/2011, de 20 de mayo, por el que se aprueba el Reglamento de protección de las infraestructuras críticas.

description_en: Devices must use cryptographic algorithms based on internationally recognized standards (including encryption/decryption, hashing, digital signatures, and key exchange). Implementation must allow selection of updated cipher suites and key lengths, and exclude obsolete elements specified in the standard.
description_zh: 设备必须使用基于国际公认标准的加密算法（包括加密/解密、哈希、数字签名和密钥交换算法）。实现必须允许选择更新的密码套件和密钥长度，并排除标准中规定的过时元素。
notes_en: Regularly review algorithm libraries to address newly discovered vulnerabilities or standard updates.
notes_zh: 需定期审查算法库以应对新出现的漏洞或标准更新。

title_en: Use internationally standardized crypto algorithms
title_zh: 使用国际标准化加密算法
verification_method_en: Inspect device configuration interface or technical documentation to confirm supported cryptographic algorithms comply with international standards (e.g., AES, SHA-256) and verify that obsolete algorithms (e.g., DES, MD5) are disabled.
verification_method_zh: 检查设备配置界面或技术文档，确认支持的加密算法列表符合国际标准（如AES, SHA-256等），并验证是否禁用了过时算法（如DES, MD5）。

notes_en: Assessment results must be updated regularly.

description_en: Article 11 Research and innovation In relation to research and innovation, ENISA shall: (a) advise the Union institutions, bodies, offices and agencies and the Member States on research needs and priorities in the field of cybersecurity, with a view to enabling effective responses to current and emerging risks and cyber threats, including with respect to new and emerging information and communications technologies, and with a view to using risk-prevention technologies effectively; (b) where the Commission has conferred the relevant powers on it, participate in the implementation phase of research and innovation funding programmes or as a beneficiary;

description_en: § 29 Mitigation of risks associated with supplier (1) The Agency shall issue a measure of a general nature setting conditions for providers of strategically important services or prohibiting the use of a supplier of security -significant supplies in a critical part of the specified scope if the Government decides that such a measure of a general nature is necessary for the protection of the security of the Czech Republic or internal order. The deadline for fulfilling the conditions or complying with the prohibition contained in the measure of a ge neral nature shall be se t by the Office, taking into account their impact on providers of strategically important services, whereby the Agency shall take into account the depreciation periods under the legislation governing income taxation when setting the deadline. (2) The Agency shall discuss the draft measure of a general nature referred to in paragraph 1 with the authorities referred to in § 28(1) to (3) and with the Ministry of Finance

The deadline for fulfilling the conditions or complying with the prohibition contained in the measure of a ge neral nature shall be se t by the Office, taking into account their impact on providers of strategically important services, whereby the Agency shall take into account the depreciation periods under the legislation governing income taxation when setting the deadline. (2) The Agency shall discuss the draft measure of a general nature referred to in paragraph 1 with the authorities referred to in § 28(1) to (3) and with the Ministry of Finance

description_en: Berdasarkan hasil evaluasi khusu s, apabila terdapat Produk yang disertifikasi tidak memenuhi persyaratan yang rolehnya keluhan atau informasi. Berdasarkan hasil evaluasi khusu s, apabila terdapat Produk yang disertifikasi tidak memenuhi persyaratan yang ditetapkan, maka LSPro mewajibkan Sponsor dan/atau Developer untuk menarik semua Produk yang terindikasi tidak sesuai, melaporkan kepada Badan dan melarang mencantumkan Tanda SNI dan Tanda SCCI atau Tanda SNI dan Tanda CC pada Produk dan/atau media lain sejak tanggal terjadinya ketidaksesuaian tersebut sampai dengan dapat dilakukan tindakan perbaikan. Tanda SNI dan Tanda SCCI atau Tanda SNI dan Tanda CC dapat dicantumkan kembali s etelah dilakukan tindakan perbaikan dan dinyatakan memenuhi oleh LSPro.

Berdasarkan hasil evaluasi khusu s, apabila terdapat Produk yang disertifikasi tidak memenuhi persyaratan yang ditetapkan, maka LSPro mewajibkan Sponsor dan/atau Developer untuk menarik semua Produk yang terindikasi tidak sesuai, melaporkan kepada Badan dan melarang mencantumkan Tanda SNI dan Tanda SCCI atau Tanda SNI dan Tanda CC pada Produk dan/atau media lain sejak tanggal terjadinya ketidaksesuaian tersebut sampai dengan dapat dilakukan tindakan perbaikan. Tanda SNI dan Tanda SCCI atau Tanda SNI dan Tanda CC dapat dicantumkan kembali s etelah dilakukan tindakan perbaikan dan dinyatakan memenuhi oleh LSPro.

description_en: The device must implement technical measures (e.g., encrypted transmission, ACLs) to ensure the confidentiality of service user information and network traffic, preventing unauthorized access or leakage.

notes_en: Regulation requires the Licensee to take all organizational and technical measures for protection and confidentiality of information/data.
notes_zh: 法规要求持牌人采取所有组织和技术措施保护信息和数据保密性。
regulation_clause: 5-3 First: All organizational as well as technical measures...

title_en: Protect User Data and Traffic Confidentiality

verification_method_en: Verify if the device supports and enables data encryption by default (e.g., TLS/IPsec), and confirm via packet capture that sensitive data is encrypted during transmission.

description_en: Article 22 (1) The central government authority for cybersecurity shall create and maintain a special registry of the following entities: ‒ DNS service providers ‒ ccTLD name registry ‒ registrars ‒ cloud computing service providers ‒ data centre service providers ‒ content delivery network providers ‒ managed service providers ‒ managed security service providers ‒ providers of online marketplaces ‒ providers of online search engines and ‒ providers of social networking services platforms. (2) The registry referred to in paragraph 1 of this Article shall be maintained independently of the obligation to maintain a list of essential and important entities.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：Article 22 (1) The central government authority for cybersecurity shall create and maintain a special registry of the following entities: ‒ DNS service providers ‒ ccTLD name registry ‒ registrars ‒ cloud computing service providers ‒ data centre service providers ‒ content delivery network providers ‒ managed service providers ‒ managed security service providers ‒ providers of online marketplaces ‒ providers of online search engines and ‒ providers of social networking services platforms. (2) The registry referred to in paragraph 1 of this Article shall be maintained independently of the obligation to maintain a list of essential and important entities.

description_en: Cyber security risk assessment shall be conducted by legal persons registered at the state central administrative organization in charge of digital development and communications . The legal person stipulated in article 8.1 of this law shall have an employee on staff that has been certified by an international professional or standards association, or an equivalent organization . The state central administrative organization in charge of digital development and communications and the intelligence agency shall jointly adopt the procedures and methodology for conducting cyber security risk assessment .

The legal person stipulated in article 8.1 of this law shall have an employee on staff that has been certified by an international professional or standards association, or an equivalent organization . The state central administrative organization in charge of digital development and communications and the intelligence agency shall jointly adopt the procedures and methodology for conducting cyber security risk assessment .

description_en: When product components, known threats, or mitigations change, the manufacturer must timely disseminate relevant cybersecurity information to customers and ecosystem participants via broadcast (e.g., public announcements) or distribution (e.g., direct user notifications).
description_zh: 当产品组件、已知威胁或缓解措施发生变化时，制造商必须能够通过广播（如公开公告）或分发（如直接通知用户）的方式，向客户及生态系统参与者及时发布相关的网络安全信息。
notes_en: The focus is on the capability to 'broadcast' and 'distribute' information, ensuring users are informed when risks change.
notes_zh: 重点在于信息的‘广播’和‘分发’能力，确保用户在风险变化时能被告知。

title_en: Proactively Disseminate Security Info
title_zh: 主动发布安全相关信息
verification_method_en: Review the manufacturer's security announcement history to confirm whether security information was released to the public or users via website press releases, mailing lists, or in-app notifications during past security incidents or firmware updates.
verification_method_zh: 审查制造商的安全公告历史记录，确认在过往的安全事件或固件更新中，是否通过网站新闻稿、邮件列表或应用内通知等渠道向公众或用户发布了安全信息。

description_en: The device must store local audit information in non-volatile memory. Storing audit logs exclusively in volatile memory (e.g., RAM) is prohibited to ensure data retention after power loss.
description_zh: 设备必须将本地审计信息存储在非易失性存储器中，严禁仅存储在易失性内存（如RAM）中，以确保断电后日志不丢失。
notes_en: Based on the Canadian Common Criteria Program endorsement statement for NDcPP v4.0, CCCS strongly recommends this configuration.
notes_zh: 依据加拿大通用准则计划对NDcPP v4.0的背书声明，CCCS强烈建议此配置。
regulation_name: Canada Common Criteria Program
title_en: Persistent Audit Log Storage
title_zh: 审计日志持久化存储
verification_method_en: Inspect device configuration to confirm audit log storage path points to non-volatile media. Perform a power-cycle test to verify that logs generated before reboot are still readable after reboot.
verification_method_zh: 检查设备配置选项，确认审计日志存储路径指向非易失性存储介质；执行断电重启测试，验证重启前生成的日志在重启后依然可读取。

description_en: The organization must establish a mechanism to ensure that the Information Security Policy is reviewed and updated (if necessary) at least every 12 months. Review records must be retained and traceable.
description_zh: 组织必须建立机制，确保信息安全策略至少每12个月进行一次审查和更新（如有必要）。审查记录必须保留并可追溯。
notes_en: Although this is an organizational requirement, customers may audit the vendor's own policy maintenance status for cloud desktop and management software providers.
notes_zh: 虽然这是组织层面的要求，但对于云桌面和管理软件供应商，客户可能会审计供应商自身的策略维护情况。

title_en: Annual Security Policy Review
title_zh: 安全策略年度审查机制
verification_method_en: Check the version history of the Information Security Policy document to confirm the last review date is within the last 12 months; review meeting minutes or approval documents.
verification_method_zh: 检查信息安全策略文档的版本历史记录，确认最近一次审查日期距离当前不超过12个月；查看审查会议纪要或批准文件。

description_en: The device must have the capability to generate and log cyber security incident records, enabling entities to notify the National Cyber Security Centre of cyber incidents occurring in their controlled/managed systems and applied management measures, in accordance with the National Cyber Incidents Management Plan.
description_zh: 设备必须具备生成和记录网络安全事件日志的功能，以便实体能够按照《国家网络事件管理计划》规定的条款和程序，向国家网络安全中心通知其控制和/或管理的通信和信息系统中发生的网络事件及采取的管理措施。
notes_en: Products must ensure log formats are standardized to facilitate entities' legal obligation to report to NCSC. Small and micro enterprises are exempt.
notes_zh: 产品需确保日志格式符合标准，便于实体履行向NCSC报告的法律义务。小型和微型企业豁免。
regulation_name: Lithuania Law on Cyber Security
title_en: Support Cyber Incident Notification
title_zh: 支持网络安全事件通知
verification_method_en: Verify that the device can record key security events (such as intrusion attempts, configuration changes, abnormal traffic) and supports exporting or sending these logs for incident reporting.
verification_method_zh: 验证设备是否能记录关键安全事件（如入侵尝试、配置更改、异常流量），并支持导出或发送这些日志以用于事件报告。

description_en: The device must support encrypted transmission of network traffic (e.g., TLS/DTLS/IPsec) to ensure the confidentiality of user data is not stolen or tampered with during transmission.
description_zh: 设备必须支持对网络流量进行加密传输（如TLS/DTLS/IPsec），以确保在网络传输过程中用户数据的机密性不被窃取或篡改。
notes_en: The regulation explicitly requires protecting the confidentiality of data pertaining to network traffic.
notes_zh: 法规明确要求保护涉及网络流量的数据机密性。
regulation_name: Egypt NTRA Internet of Things Regulatory Framework
title_en: Protect Network Traffic Confidentiality
title_zh: 网络流量机密性保护
verification_method_en: Perform packet capture on management and business traffic to confirm the use of encrypted protocols and ensure no sensitive information is transmitted in plaintext.
verification_method_zh: 抓包分析设备发出的管理流量和业务流量，确认是否使用加密协议，且无明文敏感信息传输。

description_en: OPEN BANKING REGULATORY FRAMEWORK 46 6.8.2 Risk management framework: Licensees shall establish and maintain a comprehensive risk management framework proportionate to the nature, size, complexity, and risk profile of the Licensee, enabling the identification, measurement, management, and monitoring of various risks, including the key risks highlighted under Articles 6.8.3 to 6.8.9. Licensees shall establish and maintain: (a) A risk management function; and (c) Risk measurement and internal reporting methodologies.

Licensees shall establish and maintain: (a) A risk management function; and (c) Risk measurement and internal reporting methodologies.

description_en: The device must secure communication links connecting to the outside world to ensure confidentiality and integrity of data transmission.

title_en: Section 1 > Section 2 - Security Updates and Vulnerability Management requirement

description_en: Devices must possess automated and secure software/firmware update mechanisms. The update process must employ appropriate encryption methods to protect the transmission channel, implement authentication to prevent unauthorized updates, and use integrity checks (e.g., digital signatures) to ensure update packages are not tampered with.
description_zh: 设备必须具备自动化且安全的软件/固件更新机制。更新过程必须采用适当的加密方法保护传输通道，实施身份验证以防止未授权更新，并使用完整性校验（如数字签名）确保更新包未被篡改。
notes_en: Applicable to all final versions intended for commercial sale.
notes_zh: 适用于所有最终用于商业销售的版本。
regulation_name: ANATEL Ato 77 Cybersecurity Requirements for Telecommunications Equipment
title_en: Automated Secure Update Mechanism
title_zh: 自动安全更新机制
verification_method_en: Packet capture analysis of communication protocols during updates to verify use of encryption (e.g., TLS/SSL); inspect update package signature verification logic; attempt to inject tampered update packages to verify integrity checks.
verification_method_zh: 抓包分析更新过程中的通信协议，验证是否使用TLS/SSL等加密协议；检查更新包签名验证逻辑；尝试注入篡改的更新包以验证完整性校验是否生效。

description_en: 43 National Cyber Security Centre B4.c Secure Management You manage your organisation's network and information systems that support the operation of your essential function(s) to enable and maintain security. Not Achieved Partially Achieved Achieved At least one of the following statements is true All the following statements are true All the following statements are true Your systems and devices supporting the operation of the essential function(s) are administered or maintained from devices that are not corporately owned and managed. Your systems and devices supporting the operation of the essential function(s) are only administered or maintained by authorised privileged users from devices sufficiently separated, using a risk- based approach, from the activities of standard users.

description_en: The certificate or the EU statement of conformity shall refer to technical specifications, standards and procedures related thereto, including technical controls, the purpose of which is to decrease the risk of, or to prevent cybersecurity incidents. A European cybersecurity certificate or EU statement of conformity that refers to assurance level ‘basic’ shall provide assurance that the ICT products, ICT services, ICT processes or managed security services for which that certificate or that EU statement of conformity is issued meet the corresponding security requirements, including security functionalities, and that they have been evaluated at a level intended to minimise the known basic risks of incidents and cyberattacks. The evaluation activities to be undertaken shall include at least a review of technical documentation.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：The certificate or the EU statement of conformity shall refer to technical specifications, standards and procedures related thereto, including technical controls, the purpose of which is to decrease the risk of, or to prevent cybersecurity incidents. A European cybersecurity certificate or EU statement of conformity that refers to assurance level ‘basic’ shall provide assurance that the ICT products, ICT services, ICT processes or managed security services for which that certificate or that EU statement of conformity is issued meet the corresponding security requirements, including security functionalities, and that they have been evaluated at a level intended to minimise the known basic risks of incidents and cyberattacks. The evaluation activities to be undertaken shall include at least a review of technical documentation.

description_en: Establish a mechanism to evaluate and recommend modifications to labeling program standards and testing procedures within 45 days of NIST guideline updates or new adoptions to maintain alignment.
description_zh: 产品合规团队必须建立机制，在NIST发布新指南或更新现有指南后的45天内，评估并建议对标签计划标准和测试程序进行相应修改，以保持与NIST指南的一致性。
notes_en: This requirement primarily targets the Label Administrator and collaborating stakeholders. Manufacturers must monitor this to ensure ongoing compliance. The regulation explicitly excludes wired IoT devices, focusing only on wireless consumer IoT devices capable of intentionally emitting RF energy.
notes_zh: 此要求主要针对标签管理员（Label Administrator）及与其合作的利益相关者，但作为制造商，需关注此动态以确保持续合规。法规明确排除了有线IoT设备，仅关注有意发射射频能量的无线消费类IoT设备。
regulation_name: Cyber Trust Mark Program Final Rule
title_en: Label standards aligned with NIST guidelines
title_zh: 标签标准需对齐NIST指南
verification_method_en: Review internal process documentation to confirm the existence of a monitoring and response mechanism for NIST guideline updates and verify that assessment processes are initiated within the 45-day window.
verification_method_zh: 检查内部流程文档，确认是否有针对NIST指南更新的监控和响应机制，以及是否在规定的45天窗口期内启动了评估流程。

description_en: Information system owners shall provide training and education of knowledge and skills for managers and technicians in network information security. Officers in charge of network information security shall be provided with conditions for working appropriately with their skills, and with priority to receive training in network information security skills. The Ministry of Home Affairs shall preside over and cooperate with the Ministry of Information and Communications and relevant ministries and sectors to make plans and organize for training in and improvement of knowledge and skills of network information security for public officers and employees.

The Ministry of Home Affairs shall preside over and cooperate with the Ministry of Information and Communications and relevant ministries and sectors to make plans and organize for training in and improvement of knowledge and skills of network information security for public officers and employees.

description_en: Manufacturers must proactively provide security-related information (e.g., support period, vulnerability reporting channels) on their official website or controlled sites without prior request, free of charge, in English, without requiring personal data, and in plain language understandable by non-technical users.
description_zh: 制造商必须在产品官方网站或控制的其他网站上，无需用户请求即可免费提供安全相关信息（如支持期限、漏洞报告渠道）。信息必须以英文提供，不得要求用户提供个人信息，且内容必须通俗易懂，无技术背景的用户也能理解。
notes_en: This requirement applies to all listed connected products. The focus is on 'proactivity' and 'accessibility'; security information must not be hidden in deep links or areas requiring registration to view.
notes_zh: 此要求适用于所有列出的联网产品。重点在于‘主动性’和‘可访问性’，不得将安全信息隐藏在深层链接或需要注册才能查看的区域。
regulation_name: Cyber Security (Security Standards for Smart Devices) Rules 2025
title_en: Proactive Security Info Disclosure
title_zh: 安全信息主动公开
verification_method_en: Access the manufacturer's website to verify that security support information is accessible without login or form submission; confirm the language is English; assess text readability (e.g., via Flesch-Kincaid test or manual review); ensure no personal identifiable information (PII) is collected to access this info.
verification_method_zh: 访问制造商官网，检查是否在无需登录、无需填写表单的情况下可直接查看安全支持信息；确认语言为英文；评估文本可读性（如使用Flesch-Kincaid测试或人工审核）；确认未收集任何个人身份信息。

description_en: En virtud del principio de proporcionalidad y buscando una eficaz y eficiente aplicación del ENS a determinadas entidades o sectores de actividad concretos, se podrán implementar perfiles de cumplimiento específicos que comprenderán aquel conjunto de medidas de seguridad que, trayendo causa del preceptivo análisis de riesgos, resulten idóneas para una concreta categoría de seguridad. De forma análoga a lo dispuesto en el apartado anterior, para posibilitar la adecuada implantación y configuración de soluciones o plataformas suministradas por terceros, que vayan a ser usadas por las entidades comprendidas en el ámbito de aplicación de este real decreto, se podrán implementar esquemas de acreditación de entidades y validación de personas, que garanticen la seguridad de dichas soluciones o plataformas y la conformidad con lo dispuesto en este real decreto.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：En virtud del principio de proporcionalidad y buscando una eficaz y eficiente aplicación del ENS a determinadas entidades o sectores de actividad concretos, se podrán implementar perfiles de cumplimiento específicos que comprenderán aquel conjunto de medidas de seguridad que, trayendo causa del preceptivo análisis de riesgos, resulten idóneas para una concreta categoría de seguridad. De forma análoga a lo dispuesto en el apartado anterior, para posibilitar la adecuada implantación y configuración de soluciones o plataformas suministradas por terceros, que vayan a ser usadas por las entidades comprendidas en el ámbito de aplicación de este real decreto, se podrán implementar esquemas de acreditación de entidades y validación de personas, que garanticen la seguridad de dichas soluciones o plataformas y la conformidad con lo dispuesto en este real decreto.

description_en: Article 34 The Office shall establish international cooperation in the field of ICT system s security, and shall, in particular, provide warnings about risks and incidents that meet at least one of the following conditions: 1) Grow rapidly or tend to become high-risk; When exchanging the data referred to in paragraph 1 of this Article, the Office shall act in such a way as to ensure that the confidentiality of the data is not jeopardized, as well as that such data exchange does not affect the potential violation of the security of the ICT system. Data exchange referred to in paragraph 1 of this Article shall include transfer or processing of data necessary for assessing and responding to security risks and incidents in accordance with this Law.

description_en: The manufacturer must publicly publish the 'Defined Support Period' for the product in a clear and transparent manner before delivery. This period must specify start/end dates or duration, covering all hardware capable of receiving updates, pre-installed software, necessary installable software for intended purposes, and related manufacturer-developed software.
description_zh: 制造商必须在产品交付前，以清晰、透明的方式公开发布产品的“定义支持周期”（Defined Support Period）。该周期必须明确起止时间或持续时间，涵盖所有能接收安全更新的硬件、预装软件、为实现产品功能所必需的安装软件，以及制造商开发的相关软件。
notes_en: Once published, the support period must not be shortened. If extended, the new period must be published as soon as practicable. This requirement applies to all listed connectable products.
notes_zh: 支持周期一旦发布，不得缩短。若延长，需尽快公布新周期。此要求适用于所有列出的联网产品。
regulation_name: Cyber Security (Security Standards for Smart Devices) Rules 2025
title_en: Publish Defined Security Support Period
title_zh: 公布定义的安全支持周期
verification_method_en: Verify that the product's official website, packaging, or user manual publicly displays a specific end date for the support period; confirm this information is accessible without prior request and covers all relevant hardware and software components.
verification_method_zh: 检查产品官方网站、包装或用户手册中是否公开了明确的支持周期结束日期；确认该信息无需用户请求即可获取，且覆盖所有相关软硬件组件。

description_en: Dalam hal melakukan verifikasi ditemuk an kekurangan kelengkapan persyaratan permohonan pemeliharaan jaminan keamanan Sponsor dan/atau Developer harus melengkapi kelengkapan persyaratan permohonan paling lama 2 (dua) hari kerja sejak pemberitahuan kekurangan kelengkapan persyaratan permohonan diterima. Jangka waktu melengkapi kelengkapan persyaratan permohonan tidak mengurangi jangka waktu verifikasi. Dalam hal Sponsor dan/atau Developer tidak me lengkapi kelengkapan persyaratan permohonan dalam waktu 2 (dua) hari kerja, LSPro dapat menolak permohonan pengajuan pemeliharaan jaminan keamanan.

description_en: The device must allow the Data Exchange Agency or independent competent persons/agencies permitted by it to conduct penetration testing and vulnerability assessment on the information system according to pre-scheduled and documented tasks.
description_zh: 设备必须允许数据交换局或经其许可的独立 competent 人员/机构，根据预先安排和记录的任务，对信息系统进行渗透测试和漏洞评估。
notes_en: Testing must be conducted based on predefined task statements, and the device provider must cooperate to provide necessary system access rights.
notes_zh: 测试需基于预定义的任务书进行，设备方需配合提供必要的系统访问权限。

verification_method_en: Verify if the device provides legitimate test accounts or sandbox environments, and confirm that authorized penetration testing traffic is not blocked upon consent.
verification_method_zh: 验证设备是否提供合法的测试账户或沙箱环境，并确认在获得同意后不阻断授权的渗透测试流量。

description_en: 32 COSTA RICAN NATIONAL CYBERSECURITY STRATEGY 2023 - 2027 Costa Rica will establish a governance framework that defines the roles, responsibilities, and coordination, collaboration, and communication mechanisms among government entities, private sector organizations, academia, civil society organizations, and the international community. • Establish and launch a roadmap to restructure the MICITT , by consolidating and centralizing cybersecurity efforts and activities at the national level. • Strengthen the national coordination body to direct the implementation of the 2023- 2027 National Cybersecurity Strategy and carry out continuous monitoring, thus equipping it with legal and technical tools that allow it to perform its functions most effectively.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：32 COSTA RICAN NATIONAL CYBERSECURITY STRATEGY 2023 - 2027 Costa Rica will establish a governance framework that defines the roles, responsibilities, and coordination, collaboration, and communication mechanisms among government entities, private sector organizations, academia, civil society organizations, and the international community. • Establish and launch a roadmap to restructure the MICITT , by consolidating and centralizing cybersecurity efforts and activities at the national level. • Strengthen the national coordination body to direct the implementation of the 2023- 2027 National Cybersecurity Strategy and carry out continuous monitoring, thus equipping it with legal and technical tools that allow it to perform its functions most effectively.

description_en: National Cybersecurity Strategy (1) The National Cybersecurity Strategy shall be developed once every four years by the National Cybersecurity Centre in cooperation with State administration institutions, State security institutions, and representatives of the private sector and shall be approved by the Cabinet. (2) The following shall be determined in the National Cybersecurity Strategy: 1) the strategic objectives and model of cybersecurity management, the resources necessary for cybersecurity management; 4) the procedures and requirements for the development of cyber incident readiness, response, prevention, and recovery plans, the ways of exchange of information, and also the procedures for the cooperation between the public and private sectors;

description_en: A non-staff Cyber security council (hereinafter referred to as "the Council") shall operate with the key functions to provide cyber security activities with unified supervision, coordinated facilitation, organize implementation, and ensure exchange of information . The Council shall be led by the Prime Minister , and the vice-director shall be the Member of Government in charge of digital development and communications as well as the Head of the General Intelligence Agency, and the Council shall have an office . The constitution and the rules of the Council shall be adopted by the Government .
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：A non-staff Cyber security council (hereinafter referred to as "the Council") shall operate with the key functions to provide cyber security activities with unified supervision, coordinated facilitation, organize implementation, and ensure exchange of information . The Council shall be led by the Prime Minister , and the vice-director shall be the Member of Government in charge of digital development and communications as well as the Head of the General Intelligence Agency, and the Council shall have an office . The constitution and the rules of the Council shall be adopted by the Government .

description_en: The system must support tagging information assets with classification levels based on Confidentiality, Integrity, and Availability (CIA) criticality, allowing different protection policies to be applied according to the level.
description_zh: 系统必须支持对存储和处理的信息资产进行分级标记，依据机密性、完整性和可用性（CIA）三要素确定关键等级，并允许基于等级应用不同的保护策略。
notes_en: This requirement primarily targets the logical layer of data processing; product documentation must explain how users can classify data.
notes_zh: 此要求主要针对设备处理数据的逻辑层面，需在产品文档中说明如何支持用户进行数据分类。
regulation_name: Argentina Minimum Information Security Requirements for Public Sector Bodies
title_en: Information Asset Classification
title_zh: 信息资产分类管理
verification_method_en: Inspect the device management interface or configuration files to verify the existence of asset or data classification tagging features, and test if different access control or encryption policies can be applied based on classification.
verification_method_zh: 检查设备管理界面或配置文件，验证是否存在资产或数据分类标签功能，并测试是否能根据分类应用不同的访问控制或加密策略。

description_en: The personal information owner shall have rights to require organizations, individuals handling personal information to update, change, and delete his/her personal information that the handling organizations, individuals collect, store or to cease, if he/she previously agrees on, the supply of his/her personal information to a third party. Upon receipt of a valid requirement of updating, change or deletion of personal information from the owner or a valid requirement of ceasing the supply of his/her personal information to a third party, organizations, individuals handling personal information shall: a) Fulfill the requirement and notice the personal information owner thereof or provide the personal information owner with rights to access, update, change or delete his/her own personal information;

description_en: The device must support and enable by default the DSA algorithm compliant with FIPS PUB 186-4 (DSS, July 2013) when using digital signature functions. Use of unlisted or deprecated signature algorithms is prohibited.
description_zh: 设备在使用数字签名功能时，必须支持并默认启用符合 FIPS PUB 186-4 (DSS, July 2013) 标准的 DSA 算法。禁止使用未在此规范中列出的或已废弃的签名算法。
notes_en: This requirement is based on the definition of approved security functions under the JCMVP system. Although only DSA is listed in the excerpt, as an engineering specification, it must ensure that the specific implementation strictly follows the referenced NIST standard version.
notes_zh: 此要求基于JCMVP制度下对批准的安全功能的定义。虽然原文仅列出DSA，但作为工程规格，需确保具体实现严格遵循引用的NIST标准版本。
regulation_name: Approved Security Functions
title_en: Compliant Digital Signature Algorithm
title_zh: 数字签名算法合规性
verification_method_en: Inspect the device configuration interface or API documentation to confirm that DSA is included in the list of supported signature algorithms and verify that its implementation references FIPS PUB 186-4. Attempting to configure non-standard algorithms should be rejected or unavailable.
verification_method_zh: 检查设备配置界面或API文档，确认支持的签名算法列表中包含DSA，并验证其实现引用了FIPS PUB 186-4标准。尝试配置非标准算法应被拒绝或不可用。

description_en: Privacy protection measures must be integrated into every stage of the product's Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC), with documentation proving privacy is embedded in design, development, testing, and deployment processes.
description_zh: 产品软件开发生命周期（SDLC）的每个阶段必须集成隐私保护措施，并提供文档证明隐私保护已融入设计、开发、测试及部署流程。
notes_en: Must comply with current personal data protection regulations.
notes_zh: 需遵守现行个人数据保护法规。

title_en: Lifecycle Privacy Compliance
title_zh: 全生命周期隐私合规
verification_method_en: Review product development documentation and Privacy Impact Assessment reports to confirm privacy measures were incorporated at the initial design stage.
verification_method_zh: 审查产品开发文档和隐私影响评估报告，确认隐私保护措施在设计初期即被纳入。

description_en: Products must not technically prohibit users from installing software of their choice, disabling security features, or replacing/modifying firmware and software components. Manufacturers must ensure the product's initial state meets label certification requirements despite these user rights.
description_zh: 产品不得通过技术手段禁止用户安装自选软件、禁用安全功能或替换/修改固件及软件组件。制造商需确保用户在行使这些权利时，产品初始状态仍符合标签认证要求。
notes_en: While user modification is allowed, manufacturers are not liable for insecure states resulting from user modifications, provided the factory state complies with specifications.
notes_zh: 虽然允许用户修改，但制造商对用户修改后导致的不安全状态不承担责任，前提是出厂时符合规范。
regulation_name: Cyber Trust Mark Program Final Rule
title_en: Preservation of User Modification Rights
title_zh: 用户修改权保留
verification_method_en: Attempt to install third-party firmware or disable specific security features on the device to verify that there are no insurmountable technical locks (e.g., locked bootloader without unlock mechanism).
verification_method_zh: 尝试在设备上安装第三方固件或禁用特定安全功能，验证系统未设置不可逾越的技术锁（如Bootloader锁且无解锁机制）。

description_en: [RT I, 30.12.2025, 4 – entry into force 01.01.2026] (8) The data to be submitted when notifying of a nt with a significant impact has been resolved. [RT I, 30.12.2025, 4 – entry into force 01.01.2026] (8) The data to be submitted when notifying of a cyber incident and the procedure for notification are established by a regulation of the minister in charge of the policy sector of national cybersecurity. [RT I, 30.12.2025, 4 – entry into force 01.01.2026] (81) If the European Commission adopts an implementing act specified in Article 23(11) of Directive (EU) 2022/2555 of the European Parliament and of the Council, specifying the format of, and the procedure for submitting, a notification or report on a cyber incident, including a cyber incident with a significant impact, the requirements provided in that implementing act must be followed.

description_en: The manufacturer must choose one of two methods for conformity assessment: 1. Conduct internal testing themselves; or 2. Commission a qualified conformity assessment body. If outsourced, the body must work directly for the applicant.
description_zh: 制造商必须选择以下两种方式之一进行符合性评估：1. 自行进行内部测试；2. 委托合格的符合性评估机构进行测试。若委托第三方，该机构需直接对申请人负责。
notes_en: The list of qualified bodies published by BSI does not constitute an official recommendation or quality endorsement.
notes_zh: BSI发布的合格机构列表不构成官方推荐或质量背书。

title_en: Conformity Assessment Execution
title_zh: 符合性评估执行方式
verification_method_en: Review the conformity assessment report to confirm whether it was issued by the manufacturer's internal team or an external certified body, and verify their qualifications.
verification_method_zh: 审查符合性评估报告，确认是由制造商内部团队出具还是由外部认证机构出具，并验证其资质。

description_en: If the incident is related to the commissionof a criminal offense that is prosecuted ex officio, the Office shall inform the competent public prosecutor ’s office thereof, which shall, on its own or through the competent ministry in charge of internal affairs, forward the report using the official procedure in accordance with ratified international agreements. The Office shall perform the duties of the single point of contact for information security in case of cross -border security threats and incidents and shall cooperate with single points of contact of other countries.

The Office shall perform the duties of the single point of contact for information security in case of cross -border security threats and incidents and shall cooperate with single points of contact of other countries.

description_en: Must establish and maintain an assessment process for the general quality and business continuity (disturbance tolerance) of products and services from immediate suppliers. Security qualification reviews of key component suppliers must be completed before product launch to ensure continuous compliance with resilience requirements.
description_zh: 必须建立并维护针对直接供应商产品和服务的通用质量及业务连续性（干扰耐受性）评估流程。产品上市前需完成对关键组件供应商的安全资质审查，确保持续满足抗干扰能力要求。
notes_en: The regulation requires considering the product quality and disturbance tolerance of immediate suppliers, which is a core part of supply chain security.
notes_zh: 法规要求考虑直接供应商的产品质量和干扰耐受性，这是供应链安全的核心部分。
regulation_name: Finland Cybersecurity Act 124/2025
title_en: Establish Supply Chain Quality and Resilience Assessment
title_zh: 建立供应链质量与韧性评估机制
verification_method_en: Inspect supplier management procedure documents and sample the most recent quality and resilience assessment reports for key hardware or software suppliers.
verification_method_zh: 检查供应商管理程序文件，抽查最近一次对关键硬件或软件供应商的质量与韧性评估报告。

description_en: Products must not contain any undisclosed hidden functions, backdoors, or malicious code. Verification must be performed via static code analysis and dynamic behavior testing to ensure no malicious logic exists.
description_zh: 产品中不得包含任何未向用户披露的隐藏功能、后门或恶意代码。必须通过静态代码分析和动态行为测试验证无恶意逻辑。
notes_en: Based on Article 7, the State strives to avoid the proliferation of malicious techniques and hidden harmful functions.
notes_zh: 依据第7条，国家致力于避免恶意技术和隐藏有害功能的扩散。

description_en: Terms Used in the Law The following terms are used in the Law: 1) maintainer of the top-level domain name registry - the authority to which a specific top-level domain has been delegated and which is responsible for the management of such top-level domain, including the registration of domain names in such top-level domain and the technical operation of the top-level domain, and also the operation of its name servers, the maintenance of databases, and the distribution of top-level domain zone files between name servers, regardless of whether any of such activities are performed by the authority itself, except for the use of top-level domain names solely for its own purposes, or by an outsourcing service provider; 3) domain name registration service provider - a registrar or an authorised pe

description_en: Para el sector privado en Colombia , el Estudio de Medidas de Seguridad en el Tratamiento de Datos Personales , analizó las medidas de seguridad implementadas para recolectar, almacenar, usar, circular o tratar datos personales en 3 1.41025 empresas (entre privadas, sin ánimo de lucro y mixtas) del país (Superintendencia de Industria y Comercio - SIC, 2019). Este estudio refleja que el 44 % de las empresas que hacen parte del estudio, tienen un nivel de implementación menor o igual al 25 % de las medidas apropiadas y efectivas para garantizar la seguridad de los datos personales y sólo el 15 % tienen un nivel de implementación igual o superior al 76 %, de todos los requerimientos de seguridad emitidos por la SIC.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：Para el sector privado en Colombia , el Estudio de Medidas de Seguridad en el Tratamiento de Datos Personales , analizó las medidas de seguridad implementadas para recolectar, almacenar, usar, circular o tratar datos personales en 3 1.41025 empresas (entre privadas, sin ánimo de lucro y mixtas) del país (Superintendencia de Industria y Comercio - SIC, 2019). Este estudio refleja que el 44 % de las empresas que hacen parte del estudio, tienen un nivel de implementación menor o igual al 25 % de las medidas apropiadas y efectivas para garantizar la seguridad de los datos personales y sólo el 15 % tienen un nivel de implementación igual o superior al 76 %, de todos los requerimientos de seguridad emitidos por la SIC.

description_en: Must notify the regulatory commission at least 30 calendar days in advance before putting into production any major change or update to the primary information system. The notification must include: name and version of the current system, name and version of the new system, and the schedule for production rollout phases.
description_zh: 在进行主要信息系统的主要变更或更新并投入生产前，必须至少提前30个日历日通知监管机构。通知内容必须包括：当前系统名称和版本、新系统名称和版本、以及投产阶段的时间表。
notes_en: This requirement primarily targets enterprise-grade network equipment and management software that form part of the core infrastructure of financial institutions. Home routers are generally excluded unless specifically deployed within regulated entities.
notes_zh: 此要求主要针对作为金融机构核心基础设施一部分的企业级网络设备和管理软件。家用路由器通常不在此列，除非特定部署于受监管机构。

description_en: Tasks of Computer Security Incident Response Teams Computer security incident response teams shall have the following tasks: 1) to conduct analysis at the State level of significant cyber threats, vulnerabilities, and cyber incidents; 2) to respond to cyber incidents, upon request of the subject to provide support in cyber incident handling or to coordinate the prevention of a cyber incident; 3) to warn and provide the National Cybersecurity Centre, the Constitution Protection Bureau, the subjects, and, if necessary, other institutions with the information on current significant cyber incidents, cyber incidents, near misses, cyber threats, and vulnerabilities;

description_en: The product firmware or software at factory release must not contain any malicious code, backdoors, trojans, or unauthorized remote control functions. Must be verified via static code analysis and dynamic behavior testing.
description_zh: 产品在出厂固件或软件版本中不得包含任何恶意代码、后门、特洛伊木马或未经用户授权的远程控制功能。必须通过静态代码分析和动态行为测试验证无恶意程序。
notes_en: Violation results in heavy fines and administrative penalties; this is a critical red-line requirement.
notes_zh: 违反此条将面临高额罚款及行政处罚，属于红线要求。

title_en: Prohibit Pre-installed Malware
title_zh: 禁止预置恶意程序
verification_method_en: Scan firmware images with authoritative antivirus engines and perform sandbox dynamic runtime testing to confirm no malicious behavior.
verification_method_zh: 使用权威杀毒引擎扫描固件镜像，并进行沙箱动态运行测试，确认无恶意行为。

description_en: The device or service backend must retain all transaction information and the database of contracted users for at least one calendar year. Data must be stored in a structured format and support access, extraction, and auditing by NTRA or its authorized parties upon request.
description_zh: 设备或服务端必须保留所有交易信息及签约用户数据库至少一个日历年度。数据必须结构化存储，并支持NTRA或其授权方在需要时进行访问、提取和审计。
notes_en: Applicable to IoT service platforms and related gateway devices involving user contracts and transaction records.
notes_zh: 适用于涉及用户签约和交易记录的IoT服务平台及相关网关设备。

description_en: Cyber security legislation shall consist of the Constitution of Mongolia, Law on National Security, Law on Armed Forces, Law on State and Official Secrets, Law on Communications, Law on the Intelligence Agency, Law on Organizational Secrets, Law on Transparency of Public Information, Law on Personal Secrets, the Law on Electronic Signatures, this law, and other legislative acts enacted in accordance thereto. Where an international treaty to which Mongolia is party stipulates differently from this law, the rules of such international treaty shall prevail.
description_zh: 原文要求（保守摘录）：Cyber security legislation shall consist of the Constitution of Mongolia, Law on National Security, Law on Armed Forces, Law on State and Official Secrets, Law on Communications, Law on the Intelligence Agency, Law on Organizational Secrets, Law on Transparency of Public Information, Law on Personal Secrets, the Law on Electronic Signatures, this law, and other legislative acts enacted in accordance thereto. Where an international treaty to which Mongolia is party stipulates differently from this law, the rules of such international treaty shall prevail.

regulation_name: Croatia Cybersecurity Act
title_en: Article 2 - Authentication and Access Control requirement
title_zh: Article 2 - 身份认证与访问控制要求
verification_method_en: Review authentication, authorisation, default credential handling, and access-control test evidence.
verification_method_zh: 核验证书/评估报告、适用范围、测试机构资质和官方注册或公告记录。

description_en: The device must provide a management interface or API allowing authorized law enforcement or administrators to immediately restrict or interrupt network access to specific users or services upon receiving a lawful order. For cases without court sanction, restrictions must be enforceable within 48 hours; if extension is required, the capability to maintain restrictions pending court ruling must exist.
description_zh: 设备必须提供管理接口或API，允许授权执法机构或管理员在接收到合法指令后，立即限制或中断对特定用户或服务的网络访问。对于无需法院制裁的情况，限制措施必须能在48小时内生效并维持；若需延长，必须具备等待法院裁决期间的持续限制能力。
notes_en: This requirement primarily targets network equipment serving as infrastructure for public communications network providers or digital service providers. Home routers are generally not directly subject to this clause unless used as public access points.
notes_zh: 此要求主要针对作为公共服务网络提供商或数字服务提供商基础设施的网络设备。家用路由器通常不直接受此条款约束，除非被用作公共接入点。
regulation_name: Lithuania Law on Cyber Security
title_en: Support Remote Service Restriction
title_zh: 支持远程服务限制指令
verification_method_en: Simulate receiving a restriction order and verify if the device can cut off service connections to specified targets within the mandated timeframe (e.g., immediately or within 48 hours), and check log records.
verification_method_zh: 模拟接收限制指令，验证设备是否能在规定时间内（如即时或48小时内）切断指定目标的服务连接，并检查日志记录。

description_en: 51 2018 Computer Misuse and Cybercrimes (3) Prior to the sharing of information under subsection (1), a party to an agreement shall review the information and ascertain whether the information contains personal details that may identify a specific person not directly related to a threat that amounts to a computer and cybercrime and remove such information. (4) A person shall not, under this Part, share information relating to the health status of another person without the prior written consent of the person to whom the information relates.
